subject: I’m running for Senate.

body:
I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down. I’m going to change that. |
---
| | [ ](https://everystate.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=79c57b22111745f6c03d5e836&id=6e32379ea2&e=f653f65525)
---
| Derek - I wanted you to hear it directly from me: I’m going to be challenging Kyrsten Sinema and running for the United States Senate in Arizona.

If that’s all you need to hear, I am asking you to become a Day One, Founding Donor to our historic campaign. The amount of the donation is not nearly as important as the number of people contributing today. [**Click below to split a donation between my campaign and** **EVERY STATE**:](https://everystate.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=79c57b22111745f6c03d5e836&id=ccefce1c8f&e=f653f65525)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](https://everystate.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=79c57b22111745f6c03d5e836&id=24bb4b893c&e=f653f65525 "CONTRIBUTE NOW >>")
---
| **Here is the truth: **The rich and the powerful don’t need more advocates in the Senate. It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help. For too long, Senator Sinema has used her position of power to help those who already have it all. She has stood in the way of raising the minimum wage, protecting voting rights, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and more. Now, we can argue about different ways to do the job as a United States Senator, but at the core of it all, if you are more likely to be meeting and helping the powerful than the powerless, you are doing this job wrong. I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down. [**I am going to change that.**](https://everystate.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=79c57b22111745f6c03d5e836&id=71eb670ec0&e=f653f65525) But in order to win this race against Senator Sinema and whoever the Republicans nominate, it’s going to take a historic grassroots effort. From day one. And that is why I am asking: [**Can you please split a $12 or more contribution between my campaign and EVERY STATE to become a Founding Donor to my campaign for U.S. Senate today? It all adds up when we’re all chipping in, and that’s how we’ll win this race. Together.**](https://everystate.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=79c57b22111745f6c03d5e836&id=f7e4a96ad5&e=f653f65525)
---

Hey Peter, it's Quentin.

I could not be more proud of all that we accomplished here at The Collective PAC in 2022.

But I want to make one thing clear: **The fight to fix the challenge of under-representation of the Black community in elected seats of power throughout our nation is far from over.**

Right now, a party led by racist, right-wing extremists holds the majority in Congress. And as long as people like Marjorie Taylor-Greene, Matt Gaetz, and Lauren Boebert have ANY power over our government, Peter, our work will never be over.

[I know it may seem like your support won’t make a difference, but I need you to understand that your $10 could be the difference between electing a Black progressive champion or a Republican extremist in 2023. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Hey Peter, it's Quentin. I could not be more proud of all that we accomplished here at The Collective PAC in 2022. But I want to make one thing clear: The fight to fix the challenge of under-representation of the Black community in elected seats of power throughout our nation is far from over. Right now, a party led by racist, right-wing extremists holds the majority in Congress. And as long as people like Marjorie Taylor-Greene, Matt Gaetz, and Lauren Boebert have ANY power over our government, Peter, our work will never be over. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | I am ALL-IN on doing this work, Peter — but I cannot do it alone. We ALL need to work together to elect Black Democrats up and down the ballot this cycle. In order to accomplish all of our goals this cycle (and believe me, we have a lot to get done) we MUST hit our $15,000 goal before tonight’s critical fundraising deadline. | As always, I want to sincerely thank you for supporting our mission so ardently, Peter. name: Josh Hawley (personal)
subject: Last email of the month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, It's Josh with one last email— we are just one month into 2023, and Democrats are already at it again. Biden held his staged border "visit," although don't expect a safe and secure border anytime soon. Democrats, led by the failing Joe Biden, will continue to push ruinous policies on the American people, policies that have failed time after time.

Today's Democrat party is the fringe — these aren't like previous generations of Democrats who at least were moored to reality by a deep love of America. These Democrats want to sell out to China, give a blank check to Ukraine, and pass wasteful green-energy bills while our _REAL_ energy bills skyrocket. Enough is enough.

I'm asking you to donate to my campaign and help me fight the left-wing INSANITY in Washington D.C. If you can, please contribute here: **[https://secure.winred.com/josh-hawley-committee/eom-hf/](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=62ca50bd434b4bab84d56a92c842fe52&_e=esT96Hk4lXAYZv2edkERxZ20nMlE4Pse7FZpwO_-TG3FRZaFw-IlT5y832SMdcu6hPPhnQF5nHUdngoxkc9iWHyxzXJDjl2Vlrykbk4tp_Gr3haDAfjZ_XjHEA6YtOtex_5eVgv0F3oC97RYe9qXYnyHX0nX0J-zSN5o5hUSjh79JupGWJ1zjA2JOs3Xys-hZ7iFhZiR7xoBFlFsZgmXweNelY-LTHb1OdZocDMoYrjF0MvIfcdo4-fWdDZ1qAbPe4G6bq1G8QyqldNBkryJYpw6LHPJQacGfsCERn6NOUheMbgxqlEfOXMmMZNVnnJn_tbI89F9uJ-UXtPgUvp1VTEeCHB39OWi--8gDT6Tyq8%3D)**

| Hi,

Tonight at midnight is our first big test of 2023. We need to hit our fundraising goal before midnight to stay on track with our fundraising benchmarks. Can you help out? Use this link to donate:

**[https://act.shariceforcongress.com/a/jan23-goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58096963/390017588/-1716626802?amount=20&contactdata=6RZ1wfVa/5npzw5ffWeqPf+uAlrlfKNmVTsTwR83ptrmE9cq5ieOeryLSEH9AHcZ2tbM69uDQ14F6qsyqjWqITI1KNlcIJwOABUBWWcw2DRmUxG8Td1cyeU8ioQYL+dk42uc2hbvsU0CcfAVsq4iig==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230131_FR_2.5_0_6MO_candidate_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGNhZDJlNC1jNWExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U0EdSxyUlyXdw6BYcYcWJ7S_vx8Ng1cDx6lEJtRdlAM=)**

But with their new majority, the House GOP has passed tax cuts for their rich friends and legislation that attacks reproductive freedom in America.

I want to get back to normalcy over negativity, economic opportunity over extremism, and democracy over demagogues, as Hakeem Jeffries said when he became leader. To do that, we need to retake the majority in 2024, and that starts right here in Kansas.

Will you contribute $20 or any amount to help us hit our monthly fundraising goal before midnight tonight?

Sharice

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: Our first deadline of the new year
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
Tonight is our first end-of-month deadline of the year, and I want to thank you for your continued support of our efforts. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230131?refcode=folf230131_nd]
Now that we’re one month into the new year, we’ve seen what the new House majority intends to do with its new power:
*
Banning
access
to
the
full
range
of
reproductive
health
care
in
all
50
states.
*
Threatening
the
full
faith
and
credit
of
the
United
States.
*
Making
devastating
cuts
to
Social
Security
and
Medicare.
*
Increasing
taxes
on
hardworking
Americans
with
a
new
30%
sales
tax.
And much more. Now, I’ll keep working to do all I can in Congress to make progress on the things that matter to us — to advance the good legislation and fight back against the bad. But without control of the House, it will be harder to do so.
Which is why we all have to have our eyes on 2024: a presidential election year, with control of the House and the Senate very much on the line.
To protect all we have worked for, Democrats must win back control of the House majority. That means holding this seat and helping pick up others. And I need your help to do my part. Can I count on your support before our end-of-month deadline? You can use this link to contribute: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230131?refcode=folf230131_nd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230131?refcode=folf230131_nd]
In 2022, we built on our work together to win this seat and to help others win as well. That’s our mission again this year. And I am confident we can do it again!
Together, we can do anything,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf-footer]

body:
| | | It's Sen. Schumer.

I'm between meetings, so I'll make this quick: Your name is on our list of inactive Democratic memberships for January, and I need to make sure you activate your membership by tonight’s end-of-month fundraising deadline.

If we want to save the Senate and stop Mitch McConnell **_again_** in 2024, we need to begin laying the groundwork immediately. Voting rights, reproductive justice, President Biden's judicial nominees, and our ultra-slim Democratic majority are all on the line. We can't afford for anyone to sit on the sidelines!

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far. | | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36f0e590398343c088b4676b78e56e47&_e=D00eEc5zygCnPN9Jj8chTQiE2AViWBHgXdVUrIpHLqOJbDqTakjr8BmzrgaHyA9a539dYcrGj4iai_o7cB56DPHV4HC5nZ9EE9m4j2zDmwI3YwPDR9KE32siShYGJC2ZEff5S8BXC_o2mttsGsj6Hq8zWqDfqywTzA3cNI4-ZcyTH_0OoEg-pxqATLFalnZLqyLvTCTChsx2OPrlE4Y2ogVWq9_iilbb2xhM-neza_MVsgGtGp7b9fxa5fHhnwr4nBmQR85B78gkTJM2Nz6Q8b2FoRYN_-iPiuBEeoby4xqqFXmdwGz7oKnXbe552qU28NlB3S0IvGiJlAxSAvPVRvJ65JYWRpw7E9NOxuknL28Xrg7-xB4qeEv-bH83_pI7Y5_xj13iCUIU_Lvfpp7RQA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36f0e590398343c088b4676b78e56e47&_e=D00eEc5zygCnPN9Jj8chTQiE2AViWBHgXdVUrIpHLqOJbDqTakjr8BmzrgaHyA9a539dYcrGj4iai_o7cB56DPHV4HC5nZ9EE9m4j2zDmwI3YwPDR9KE32siShYGJC2ZEff5S8BXC_o2mttsGsj6Hq8zWqDfqywTzA3cNI4-ZcyTH_0OoEg-pxqATLFalnZLqyLvTCTChsx2OPrlE4Y2ogVWq9_iilbb2xhM-neza_MVsgGtGp7b9fxa5fHhnwr4sNiLwrNkcuE5PirNJcKplsImAkef_hVd3GHeJ9xo34DOsDv_liQ4qDIDCLj9aeXPkO2xdCN7Y-pWIdeTHjc6J8UMPFYNycL0xpzc7QTvrJlL9D5Lwi3tvd91uWCdZhHDKsrsvP2bxw41Yq4jva_bJA%3D%3D) I hope you're having a great day so far. Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36f0e590398343c088b4676b78e56e47&_e=D00eEc5zygCnPN9Jj8chTQiE2AViWBHgXdVUrIpHLqOJbDqTakjr8BmzrgaHyA9a539dYcrGj4iai_o7cB56DPHV4HC5nZ9EE9m4j2zDmwI3YwPDR9KE32siShYGJC2ZEff5S8BXC_o2mttsGsj6Hq8zWqDfqywTzA3cNI4-ZcyTH_0OoEg-pxqATLFalnZLqyLvTCTChsx2OPrlE4Y2ogVWq9_iilbb2xhM-neza_MVsgGtGp7b9fxa5fHhnwr4RrnoORT4FWQGRItg_necjCG1wlzm4EeJ5128raIyZW7NCiN-5dpFOLFz8AO7YDNyWiANk4UM43YpsX-E_y9JLUyrlc3Rr14pBRlf-hfGI-w7rnpSXRdy9lbP4IjEQ5eicQGGbpGlXZp9DMyncoiIqA%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new "Constitution 101" DVD box set are limited, so I hope you'll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Joe Biden
subject: Great news, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
If you’re looking for a reason to support Democrats with a donation ahead of this first deadline of 2023, I’ve got it: The Biden-Harris agenda is working for working people. | |
---
If you’re looking for a reason to support Democrats ahead of the DNC’s first deadline of the year, I’ve got it: _The Biden-Harris agenda is working for working people._ More economic growth. Historic job creation. Better health care for millions. This is what happens when we build a strong DNC that lays the foundation for electing Democrats across the nation -- and when we do just that. When Democrats win, they deliver. It’s as simple as that. But our party needs YOU to renew your support before tonight’s fundraising deadline to keep up our party’s progress. **Together, we’ve accomplished big things, Derek. I’d love for you to be part of our work in 2023, too. Chip in $10 ahead of the DNC’s midnight fundraising deadline and the DNC will send you a personalized 2023 membership card.**

clean_body: If you’re looking for a reason to support Democrats with a donation ahead of this first deadline of 2023, I’ve got it: The Biden-Harris agenda is working for working people. | | If you’re looking for a reason to support Democrats ahead of the DNC’s first deadline of the year, I’ve got it: The Biden-Harris agenda is working for working people. More economic growth. Historic job creation. Better health care for millions. This is what happens when we build a strong DNC that lays the foundation for electing Democrats across the nation -- and when we do just that. When Democrats win, they deliver. It’s as simple as that. But our party needs YOU to renew your support before tonight’s fundraising deadline to keep up our party’s progress. Together, we’ve accomplished big things, Derek. I’d love for you to be part of our work in 2023, too. Chip in $10 ahead of the DNC’s midnight fundraising deadline and the DNC will send you a personalized 2023 membership card. The road ahead isn’t going to be easy, and I need to know you’re as committed to the fight for a better America as I am -- and as hundreds of thousands of your neighbors are as well. Grassroots donations from folks like you had a direct impact on our party’s ability to win big, elect more Democrats, and build an economy that works for everyone throughout the entirety of 2022. But we need to finish the job. I’m really grateful to know I can count on you, Derek. Talk soon, Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6211%2E878179%2E7rVJnR). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6211%2E878179%2E7rVJnR).**

We will do EVERYTHING possible to win, which means our Chairman has AUTHORIZED a 1100%-Match on your next donation towards CRUSHING our FIRST End-of-Month fundraising goal of the YEAR. name: Brittany Pettersen (personal)

body:
Friend, I know my team reached out yesterday, but I needed to follow up personally, because this is really important.

Friend, I know my team reached out yesterday, but I needed to follow up personally, because this is really important. Just a few weeks into the GOP-controlled House, we have seen a barrage of attacks against the wellbeing of regular families. We’ve seen multiple bills to restrict the right to an abortion. We’ve seen a bill to inflict a 30% national sales tax on everything from gas to groceries. (In fact, Kevin McCarthy promised his GOP colleagues he would bring that disgraceful bill to the floor in exchange for the Speakership.) We’ve seen threats to cut Social Security and Medicare. We’ve seen far-right election deniers like Marjorie Taylor Greene and Lauren Boebert get appointed to powerful committees. Friend, I’m fighting hard every day against this kind of extremism — and to make progress creating more opportunities for the regular families I promised I would help. But if we’re going to win these fights over the long haul — and retake control of Congress next year — I need your support. **We have our first big deadline of 2023 in just a few hours, and as of right now, my team tells me we are behind on our fundraising goal. This is a big test of the long-term strength of our movement, and I want to make sure we don’t fall short. Will you pitch in any amount and help us begin the year in a position of strength?** **Here is a secure link to donate:[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/january-bp-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58098050/390036044/-373509776?refcode=email_013123_followup&amount=20&amounts=5,20,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTYyYmZjMC1jYmExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XXHYK22vH5naaN-E3l8CrcJITb_VeVy2kau1TJdA6y0=)** Thank you so much for everything you do, Brittany

clean_body: With your help | Fellow American, I am proud to share that I have been re-elected to run the Republican National Committee for the 2024 Election Cycle. I want to thank our entire party–especially our amazing grassroots supporters–for continuing to place their trust in me. I wanted to reach out to you first because as one of our most loyal supporters, I need you to step up and show your support to the RNC. We need YOU, Fellow American, to stand up and show your support if we’re going to build momentum for 2024. Fellow American, we have a lot of work to do. We MUST get our country back on the right track, but to do that I need to know if I can count on you. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: YouTube Banned Us For This
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=youtube_banned_us_for_this&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Big Tech is at it again. **They're trying to silence us; get us to change our narrative. Or they're trying to get us to leave the public conversation completely.** Because we dare to question the effectiveness of the COVID jab, we're in the crosshairs of Google and it subsidiary, YouTube. Lucky for us, our videos on [**Rumble**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=w5XKTZ0h8dEcNEoc_HghfNozVCjr0nHuGtoPJQU9um1B-M6rlcl3MKINOwjwDNmq&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=youtube_banned_us_for_this&n=2) stay up, so the content isn't lost forever. But YouTube gave us a second strike and banned us for two weeks - one more strike and our YouTube page will be gone for good. What's interesting about this strike (they claim was due to medical misinformation) is that we covered two topics... First, we played the video of Bill Gates admitting that the vaccine was not effective. There's no way that was what got us in the dog house - is it? The other topic we discussed on the banned show was the infamous Project Veritas video that exposed Pfizer for doing Gain of Function research. But [**Pfizer admits it's engineering the virus**](https://www.action4liberty.com/youtube_banned_us_for_this?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=youtube_banned_us_for_this&n=3) in their official response to the video. So what Medical Misinformation are we being accused of here? **Have you seen what it's like to have a YouTube channel taken down? We covered it on today's show. Check it out:** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/youtube_banned_us_for_this?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=youtube_banned_us_for_this&n=4) This censorship doesn't only happen on YouTube. Gmail (which is Google's email platform) also censors conservative voices, like mine, by sending emails to people's SPAM folder. I hear all the time that they aren't receiving my emails on their gmail account. **This is a HUGE problem. But I have a solution!** First, STOP watching political videos on YouTube and START watching them on Rumble instead. Get a free account and subscribe to our page. If we all refuse to use the YouTube platform and go with its free speech alternative, then they have no power over us.
## [1\. SUBSCRIBE TO RUMBLE](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=w5XKTZ0h8dEcNEoc_HghfNozVCjr0nHuGtoPJQU9um1B-M6rlcl3MKINOwjwDNmq&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=youtube_banned_us_for_this&n=5)
Second, get a Proton Mail account as an alternative to gmail. Proton is an encrypted email account that reduces the government's ability to snoop on you. They have free email accounts, just like Gmail, and also subscriptions with cloud storage and VPNs. Once you have a Proton account, please resign up on our email account here:
## [2\. SIGN UP WITH PROTON ACCOUNT](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=t7MUSxII5sHexfaVWaIFWQq9y3heI3BTYUisThBguxk&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=youtube_banned_us_for_this&n=6)
Action 4 Liberty's mission is to protect liberty for the next generation. We will fail at this mission if we are not capable of communicating with you. It's EXACTLY why Big Tech is doing all of this. So let's reduce our dependence on Google and it's platforms. **Please follow these two steps above so you can stay in contact with us as we distribute important political information.** Thank you! **In Liberty,** **** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=youtube_banned_us_for_this&n=7 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=youtube_banned_us_for_this&n=7)
---
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=youtube_banned_us_for_this&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=youtube_banned_us_for_this&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=youtube_banned_us_for_this&n=10), software for leaders.

body:
I wanted to reach out quickly to share why it's important we hit our fundraising goal by midnight tonight. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58098104/390036330/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTYyYmZjMC1jYmExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_H3cn8pX9fW4uzUry-GDaza9H7gVkQ0gs0f0BFAqNiE=&emci=a1044d89-609e-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=ca62bfc0-cba1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter:

We are just a few hours away from our first end-of-month deadline of 2023. I wanted to reach out quickly to share why it's important we hit our fundraising goal by midnight tonight.

Republicans have only been in power for a few weeks, but it's clear how dangerous their agenda is. They've already passed legislation attacking reproductive rights, proposed a 30% sales tax, and threatened to gut Social Security and Medicare.

We need to retake the House majority to put a stop to the Republicans' dangerous agenda and pass legislation that will help people in Washington State – and across the country. But we have a tough fight ahead of us, which means we need to get to work now.

Last year, this grassroots team helped me beat the odds and keep Washington's 8th District blue. We know Republicans are once again looking to flip this seat to expand their majority, and it's only a matter of time before the attacks start. Reaching tonight's goal is crucial to ensuring we have the resources to fight back against whatever comes our way and build another winning campaign.

**[Will you make a donation before midnight to help us reach our first end-of-month goal of 2023? clean_body: I wanted to reach out quickly to share why it's important we hit our fundraising goal by midnight tonight. Peter: We are just a few hours away from our first end-of-month deadline of 2023. I wanted to reach out quickly to share why it's important we hit our fundraising goal by midnight tonight. Republicans have only been in power for a few weeks, but it's clear how dangerous their agenda is. They've already passed legislation attacking reproductive rights, proposed a 30% sales tax, and threatened to gut Social Security and Medicare. We need to retake the House majority to put a stop to the Republicans' dangerous agenda and pass legislation that will help people in Washington State – and across the country. But we have a tough fight ahead of us, which means we need to get to work now. Last year, this grassroots team helped me beat the odds and keep Washington's 8th District blue. We know Republicans are once again looking to flip this seat to expand their majority, and it's only a matter of time before the attacks start. Reaching tonight's goal is crucial to ensuring we have the resources to fight back against whatever comes our way and build another winning campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. | |
Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxFUMtOwzAQ_JrklsheJ3Z7yAEoBQlVAon2wKVy401jkYdlO4L-PZtQimxZmtnZ8Wiw4lKVwIUQq9RUBWje1KmtgIFgwDgd4GXOoRDMCCVZKeSqxqRg2Gvb5Y1HjK0dPtEbwpe8Hvu0rYxYN7pQ5VrjSUkuhYKCaWCSr5XhpUq7qo3RhUTcJbClG7CePJq8tV0XjO4wRzMRf8OzZnJu9DFr0KDXnQ0xc9qhD7OF2E6xP4Zx8pRObJwfg8M62uGcgJxHPRo79TRagl_JWvdO2_NA9L_rn-mvYhwiDpEEj5tdZk7ZLVGGPStOGWNA0lCTYvfCgT_u1tdVN53IrkU_u0dD7HHorCH0js1HXazUs1zI1hpqYqOMbA9v3yr1lXFf9I0NUlHT56XpuVhK29nmUiXqPgFY1gCWDmGK4qD3-52_ZHevOnsqD3Ceh_BAb7w4vCmvJvm1B0jU5gcCqKP7)**** on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**

| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxFUMtu2zAQ_BrpJoFcSqJ10MGp7RwCA-nB7jGgyJVFVA-CpNr477tSHQckCMzs7HAw2PBKlsCFELvUNAUo3unUNsBAMGCcDvAy51AIZoSsWCmqncakYDgqO-SdR4y9nX6jN4TvuZ7HtG9qbdBoZnY12wlRa8la3nIspDSq7pRKh6aP0YVE7BM40Q2oF48m7-0wBKMGzNEsxD_xqlmcm33MOjTo1WBDzJxy6MNqIU5LHD_CvHhKJw7Oz8Ghjna6JVCtoxGNXUYabcEfpFajU_Y2Ef3t-mX6XzFPEadIguPhnJk2eybKcGRFmzEGJA2aFOc3Dvx4rh-rbmnJrke_ukdD7Mc0WEOo_RMvZbj2-18b2VtDTRykqfrrz0-Z-sa4v_SNDZWkpm9b02uxlHaw3b1J5EsCsK0BbB3CEsVVXS5nf8_27yp7La9wW4fwg954d_hUPkzyRw-QyMM_b-ul6w) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is flawed , outdated , and incapable of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: The Federalist Papers. | | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | “The Federalist Papers” course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of “The Federalist Papers” on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of “The Federalist Papers” right now: Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

subject: Quick update for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
Hi there,

With just a few hours left in January, we're still a bit short of our fundraising goal. [**Will you chip in right now to help us raise $1,510 more before midnight? The money we raise now will be critical as the new electoral cycle quickly takes shape in the weeks ahead.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58098650/390040512/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230131EOM_EOM_JW_FULL_4_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzc5NWE5Ny1jY2ExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2dk2Lh0Iu3uD6o-EJuheq86oKfPaCgeTO5gBk8M6JI=)

This is the first major deadline of the year. Candidates and PACs will be using it to make important early spending decisions that will define the next stage of the campaigns for 2024. I know that Kevin McCarthy and all the far-right groups aligned with him will be leaving no stone unturned, and they'll try to gain early ground in swing districts like mine.

We have to be ready for anything that's thrown our way, and I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you for the road ahead.

**So please, will you chip in $10 to help us close our January fundraising gap? You can make your donation here:** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jw_em**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58098651/390040513/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230131EOM_EOM_JW_FULL_4_NG_N_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzc5NWE5Ny1jY2ExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2dk2Lh0Iu3uD6o-EJuheq86oKfPaCgeTO5gBk8M6JI=)

Thanks!

Jennifer

| | Good morning. Andrew here, Dr. Bob Lorinser's son. After what has felt like 100 days, January finally ends at midnight. As my dad's books reset, he and the campaign are up against an important fundraising deadline. Dr. Bob Lorinser doesn't spend his time hobnobbing at private, exclusive fundraisers with bigwigs and corporate CEOS. Instead, he's busy planning to travel across this giant, beautiful district, inviting anyone and everyone to free public town halls, meet and greets and coffee hours. We'll announce some big plans soon. As we see it, if every voter had the opportunity to have a one-on-one conversation with my dad, there's no doubt voter turnout would be on his side. So, he's spending the next 18 months getting in front of the constituency, visiting small, rural towns and fighting for Democratic values in Michigan's 1st District. It requires resources. We're also saving every penny we can to ensure his campaign remains strong through the general election. My dad believes that accessibility to your Congressman — and those vying for the position — is important to Democracy. As his team sets up campaign infrastructure, I've been asked to help him hit some critical fundraising goals. This campaign is funded entirely by the generosity of individual donors like you. Your contributions enable us to keep going and reach every voter in MI01! Please make a contribution to the [Rural Fund](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/33OOAMzKe/c?w=1IJAR79_Tod_sGEya4pww7myUdEgx3LAE7N8JJU_f3g.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6ImRhNzUyZTFkLTllYWQtNDE1My1iMGViLTBlZTA3NDE0N2YwNiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) and let's show voters that Democrats have not -- and will not ever -- give up on Rural America.

We cannot let Democrats get ahead. We have less than 2 years to build up our warchest and make sure we flip the Senate in 2024.

America needs help. Republicans across the country are standing up to protect their communities against the Radical Left, but right now, things are not looking good for Conservative fighters like Jim Banks.

| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That's why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled ["](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dffaa2cc4eeb46c9a1fb2284c8594c7d&_e=pkXVE6av0Efgu27n4FzXBagi3hkum2Nae73h2Jv_U44NWi24jX03K-OES1mdg5s9pqqewGd9zxRBDkd4mZ5cwAvuNrFyZpe93HV_NUpPw-EWfm4zvU4g2N-FgSsNTS3UT0dkx0y1x5ZOm3InSgHei8TqlwDma5Ju1yBLgcxOvPl445GJsQt25zVyaVLLdqqqNMBz_-Md2vzzs-jkNKft6iYcwUYF1Wd55CC3OIOMhJyVeCUbXfBTAsiGWZSYj1Xqn1k8sWFbi1IIr7j01oXSNBIlT7V0OR7Z4VjGqX5Ja3d8N7KaV9vyANMfJn0C4lpaatUTVMQmxuR372J47wnFhXPjlZz4ElTWh2u5FXaKMwNyp9LnjMCnhVqBEs6kPG0A691-FHiFap2WPf2uqYPrPQ%3D%3D)**[The Second World Wars."](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dffaa2cc4eeb46c9a1fb2284c8594c7d&_e=pkXVE6av0Efgu27n4FzXBagi3hkum2Nae73h2Jv_U44NWi24jX03K-OES1mdg5s9pqqewGd9zxRBDkd4mZ5cwAvuNrFyZpe93HV_NUpPw-EWfm4zvU4g2N-FgSsNTS3UT0dkx0y1x5ZOm3InSgHei8TqlwDma5Ju1yBLgcxOvPl445GJsQt25zVyaVLLdqqqNMBz_-Md2vzzs-jkNKft6iYcwUYF1Wd55CC3OIOMhJyVeCUbXfBTAsiGWZSYj1XqUyZUV4KHMhxERJwn2QRwa-sa9MvfCraHH47tt5O5IKYH1FawdsS9sy48uL7PAQnl0mg6VY0K_WToN1A95Q6PHWONDcayHGBFsOUMMJ5RNmPRAfiApdBpgF01bMH0DTPPcfUHgZJYoMxky2jRsUKZWw%3D%3D) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies' victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: California
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1741%2E5257348%2EPdWf7i ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, when I think about the issues facing us here in
California, they are the same issues we face as a nation.

The sky-high cost of housing, as folks pay more than half of their income
to keep a roof over their heads — with little left over for retirement,
emergencies, or even just a family outing to see the Dodgers.

The ever-present threat of wildfires, drought, and floods to our
neighborhoods, as we face a global climate crisis.

The lack of resolution for more than 2 million undocumented individuals in
our state after years of Senate dysfunction, and in spite of their efforts
to simply live, work, and raise their families — the American Dream.

The escalation of homophobic and transphobic rhetoric among the far-right
as communities like West Hollywood show the country how to lead on LGBTQ+
civil rights with compassion and grace.

The reproductive healthcare crisis. Californians passed Prop 1 to enshrine
abortion rights into the state constitution, but cannot protect the right
to abortion nationwide without decisive Senate action to codify Roe v.
Wade.

The need to build an economy that works for everyone. Not just the rich
and powerful.

I’m running for U.S. Senate because we need leaders who will put it all on
the line to solve the problems we face. That’s exactly what I am prepared
to do.

Are you with me?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch._tD9LH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20230131_PM2_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1741%2E5257348%2EPdWf7i ]Pitch in $10 or any amount you can spare to help us build the momentum
for our Senate campaign to represent California and take the bold action
the American people demand.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

So, let me tell you why this deadline matters: We know that Oregon's Fourth Congressional District is a key piece of Congressional Republicans' plans to expand their majority in the House. **That means they're going to go on the attack early, and they're going to keep it up all the way through next year.** [**We need to be ready, Peter. name: 3X-Match Expiring (via DLCC.org)
subject: Your 3X-match expiring
body:
This is the last time I’ll email you about our end-of-month deadline. | | |
---
| | **This is the last time I’ll email you about our end-of-month deadline.** But first, here’s where things stand:
* There are **2 HOURS** left until our first end-of-month deadline of the year.
* But we’re still **$21,807** short of our critical goal.
* And based on our projections, we need **6** grassroots Democrats **in your area** to help us close this gap.

name: James Carville (via Democrats.org)
subject: This fundraising deadline is no joke.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
My friends at the DNC only have until midnight to knock this fundraising goal out of the park, so I’m begging: | |
---
I’m sorry to message you like this, Derek, but with the DNC’s fundraising numbers where they’re at right now, I’m too damn worried to sit on the sidelines! **As of right now, the DNC is projected to fall short of their first end-of-month fundraising goal of the year. That could make a huge difference in our fight to keep moving the country in the right direction.** Tonight’s fundraising deadline is no joke. Hitting this goal will help support the DNC’s continued investments in innovative organizing, voter protection, data and technology, and so much more that we need to elect Democrats in 2023 and 2024. **Grassroots donations had tremendous power in last year’s elections, and it’d mean a lot if you made your first contribution of 2023. So, I’m humbly asking: Will you rush $7 to the DNC before their fundraising deadline tonight? 7 more supporters from Manassas will help get the job done.**

clean_body: My friends at the DNC only have until midnight to knock this fundraising goal out of the park, so I’m begging: | | I’m sorry to message you like this, Derek, but with the DNC’s fundraising numbers where they’re at right now, I’m too damn worried to sit on the sidelines! As of right now, the DNC is projected to fall short of their first end-of-month fundraising goal of the year. That could make a huge difference in our fight to keep moving the country in the right direction. Tonight’s fundraising deadline is no joke. Hitting this goal will help support the DNC’s continued investments in innovative organizing, voter protection, data and technology, and so much more that we need to elect Democrats in 2023 and 2024. Grassroots donations had tremendous power in last year’s elections, and it’d mean a lot if you made your first contribution of 2023. So, I’m humbly asking: Will you rush $7 to the DNC before their fundraising deadline tonight? 7 more supporters from Manassas will help get the job done. Derek, I’ve been in politics for a long time, and I’ll tell you one thing: Democrats defied the odds in 2022. Grassroots donors dug deep to support Democrats nationwide, and it paid off. But know this: Things will be tougher going forward. Donald Trump has already announced he’s running for president again, and we can expect a whole slew of extreme MAGA Republicans to run for office up and down the ticket. We need to fight back as early as possible, and that starts with closing the DNC’s January fundraising gap ASAP. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6213%2E878179%2E5_PqvH). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6213%2E878179%2E5_PqvH).**

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: I’m Not Done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62273529:JHWr9HGNN:m:1:3331421248:289D2AB251CEF39E88ED67C7D86BC46F:r)
---
Peter, No one loves America like I do, and I don't say that lightly either. Being a refugee at 4 years old after escaping communism makes you appreciate every single moment in life, **especially here in America.**

In a place like America, you're not put on a kill list for having a different opinion like my father was in Vietnam, and his only crime was working in the South Vietnamese Government when the Communists took over.

Now, I didn't serve in Combat operations fighting terrorism throughout Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia just to sit by watching Joe Biden and the Washington Democrats turn their backs on American Values.

My family didn't escape communists and their brutal dictatorship just to watch America be torn apart from the inside by those same radical ideals that are now being forced on us today.

**That is why I'm working with Unleash America PAC to help elect REAL leaders who will defend our American values once and for all, and[we need your support.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62273529:JHWr9HGNN:m:1:3331421248:289D2AB251CEF39E88ED67C7D86BC46F:r)**
---
[STAND FOR FREEDOM >> UNLEASH AMERICA](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62273529:JHWr9HGNN:m:1:3331421248:289D2AB251CEF39E88ED67C7D86BC46F:r)
---
The America we know and love is under attack from woke socialists who are determined to silence anyone who opposes them, and we need to do everything we can to stop their radicalism before it's too late, Peter.

[**Can I count on your support to help fight for the American values that so many in this world look to for hope and as a sign of what freedom means?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62273529:JHWr9HGNN:m:1:3331421248:289D2AB251CEF39E88ED67C7D86BC46F:r)
---
[STAND FOR FREEDOM >> SUPPORT HUNG CAO](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62273529:JHWr9HGNN:m:1:3331421248:289D2AB251CEF39E88ED67C7D86BC46F:r)
---
_The time for standing on the sidelines is over._ We have an obligation to elect leaders who will restore confidence in American politics. **Every contribution you make will go towards our mission to elect patriots who will keep the American dream alive for the next generation just like it was for me.**

I can't win this battle without you, Peter. **[So please let me know ASAP if we can count on your help to UNLEASH AMERICA.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62273529:JHWr9HGNN:m:1:3331421248:289D2AB251CEF39E88ED67C7D86BC46F:r)**
---
In Liberty,
---
[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62273529:JHWr9HGNN:m:1:3331421248:289D2AB251CEF39E88ED67C7D86BC46F:r)
---

body:
I’m doing everything I can to support our veterans

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58099974/390050065/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDcwNDRmMy1lOGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2n9tqWqyvD0FX3SbtS3WolKpV48xvUK3HvgdvzuQrj4=)
---
Peter, this is a longer email about our veterans. Sadly, I know some people will just delete this email without reading it or look the other way, but I hope you're not one of them. This is very important.

U.S. military veterans have sacrificed so much to protect our nation’s freedom, values and interests around the world. That’s why I believe our government has a duty to ensure veterans receive the care and benefits they deserve.

**And as the chairman for the House Committee on Veterans’ Affairs, I am hard at work to make sure our government lives up to that duty.

But sadly, our committee has found a serious, unique threat to veterans: Veterans are being targeted by violent, right-wing extremist groups for recruitment.**

We’ve also found that on Jan. 6, more than 10% of the insurrectionists had ties to the military. Veteran Ashli Babbitt was even shot dead by police while attempting to break into the House chamber.

Right-wing recruitment of veterans is a serious problem that would not only affect veterans but could further political violence in our country. So, I’m working day after day to protect veterans from this threat while also addressing other concerns that affect our veterans like ensuring access to critical benefits and health care.

**But troublingly, Republican lawmakers on the Veterans’ Committee have attempted to obstruct our work and attacked me personally for addressing these subjects.**

[**Peter, with a new GOP majority in the House, Republicans will be targeting me for pushing strong progressive policies and protecting vulnerable Americans like our veterans. In order to fight back, my campaign has set a goal of raising $10,000 by the end of the month. Can I count on you to chip in $3 to support my campaign and my work in Congress? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58099975/390050066/299171790?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20230131_EMDF_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDcwNDRmMy1lOGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2n9tqWqyvD0FX3SbtS3WolKpV48xvUK3HvgdvzuQrj4=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58099982/390050073/299171790?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20230131_EMDF_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDcwNDRmMy1lOGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2n9tqWqyvD0FX3SbtS3WolKpV48xvUK3HvgdvzuQrj4=)

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: Holding racist journalism accountable in federal court
body:
The San Francisco Chronicle's publication of election disinformation in 2020 prompted a federal lawsuit and a court hearing this Thursday that anyone can observe via zoom.
| |
---|---|---
| | | [Open in app](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/holding-racist-journalism-accountable?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store) or [online](https://substack..Sn4jyIBRmVrzeEWRNNxULEzXyqrdsvpB_JQKrsKorSs?)
---
[](https://substack..Sn4jyIBRmVrzeEWRNNxULEzXyqrdsvpB_JQKrsKorSs?)
---
# [Holding racist journalism accountable in federal court](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=100073899&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTAwMDczODk5LCJpYXQiOjE2NzUyMjkxODYsImV4cCI6MTY3NzgyMTE4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.3JubTN7CVFMZnhfEW1qrf2O2eKaSlM2TfSRjooXdINc)
### The San Francisco Chronicle's publication of election disinformation in 2020 prompted a federal lawsuit and a court hearing this Thursday that anyone can observe via zoom.

This Thursday, the U.S. District Court for the Northern District of California will hold oral argument in [an important lawsuit](https://substack.com/redirect/b1e68390-28cd-41b7-b662-192deb3d2d94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) aiming to hold the _San Francisco Chronicle_ accountable for its disappointing history of publishing election disinformation. Below is a brief summary of the case, as well as an invitation to [attend the hearing via Zoom](https://substack.com/redirect/a6c28f85-aae5-47cb-899e-fff80a8d6612?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2eaa1428-9eac-46f9-9b55-08be2fd9c20e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### Background
In 2020, I became the only Democratic candidate to ever challenge Nancy Pelosi in a general election. Four months before San Francisco's first contested federal election in 35 years, a series of newspapers published reports about various false ad hominem accusations made towards me by a series of political critics.
Newspaper editors--from the _San Francisco Chronicle_ to the _Intercept_ , _Mission Local_ , _48 Hills_ , _Broke Ass Stuart_ , the _Bay Area Reporter_ , _SF Gate_ , _Salon_ , _Mother Jones_ , and others--published these lies despite documentary evidence that the claims were politically motivated, documented histories of previous false accusation, verifiable conflicts of interest, and multiple whistleblowers who spoke out to expose the plot they were recruited to join by Democrats loyal to Pelosi (several of whom infiltrated my staff before they were eventually removed).
By maliciously and recklessly misleading the public about a figure in a once-in-a-generation election, each of the newspapers that published these reports not only silenced women (including women of color who were recruited to join the plot), smeared an immigrant, undermined election integrity, and denied the city its first contested election in a generation, but also unfortunately eroded their own credibility and legitimacy, as well as those of the [Democratic Party that relies on false racist accusation](https://substack.com/redirect/0a7ec957-e827-4e88-a159-4fef8d824a44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to defend the seats of their corrupt leaders.
And by insulating corrupt Democrats from electoral accountability, the newspapers played an unfortunately active role in eroding press freedom, inviting authoritarianism, and [creating political opportunities for Republicans](https://substack.com/redirect/60cee047-fe7b-44b6-bef2-4c20dc6caa69?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) responding to the ethical failures of Democrats.
A [spring 2022 profile published by SF Gate](https://substack.com/redirect/9a8a097b-13d4-4145-b794-56385f4645a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) offers some further about the background of the lawsuit.
> SFGATE: I want to ask you about some of your messaging and public statements. You invoke the phrase "white supremacy" frequently and make many identity-based appeals. There was a survey done recently by Jacobin and YouGov that found that working class voters typically "prefer progressive candidates who focus primarily on bread-and-butter economic issues, and who frame those issues in universal terms," shying away from so-called "woke" language around identity. You don't seem to subscribe to this school of thought. Why not?
> Buttar: I disagree. I absolutely subscribe to it. My campaign is based on class, and it's why I'm fighting for universal health care. It's why I'm fighting for the minimum wage to be $25 an hour. It's why I'm fighting for a basic human right to health care, housing and food. I say a lot of things and I'm absolutely committed to the interests of working class America. What you're reflecting on with the language, I would describe that as sort of the inability of the political system to hear two things at once and understand the complexity of a political message.
> All of these things are true. There is class-based marginalization and _white supremacy is real. It's also widely misunderstood, particularly by white people. And part of the problem here is that white people reduce white supremacy to an ideology, not understanding that it is the water in which they swim_. And they might have a hard time coming to recognize it because their privilege blinds them to it....I don't think that the white journalists who fabricated lies and printed weaponized smears to mislead the public, I don't think they think of themselves as white supremacists. I don't know if they are white supremacists.
> Do [their] articles reflect white supremacy? Hell yes, they do.
> Not only are they resting on stereotypes, not only do they silence a whistle-blower of color, not only they insulate a white, wealthy oligarch who has defended militarism, mass surveillance and mass incarceration -- quintessential demonstrations of authoritarian policies that themselves represent white supremacy in policy.
Thank you for reading! I work to expose corruption and the institutions that enable it--but because those institutions enjoy wider reach than I do, I rely on supporters to spread the word and help get the truth out.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=100073899&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTAwMDczODk5LCJpYXQiOjE2NzUyMjkxODYsImV4cCI6MTY3NzgyMTE4NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.3JubTN7CVFMZnhfEW1qrf2O2eKaSlM2TfSRjooXdINc)
While SF Gate's editors declined to [name the many voices who organized](https://substack.com/redirect/92a17ef4-0fb2-476a-b754-30c8f095a839?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a racist plot to insulate corruption and mislead the public (from San Francisco Supervisor Dean Preston to former candidate Jackie Fielder, and from the Dramatic Socialites of America to the even more deeply and consistently racist Harvey Milk LGBTQ Democratic Club), I remain committed to accountability both for those sycophants and the oligarchs whose corruption they unfortunately chose to enable.
After the _San Francisco Chronicle_ published its libelous stories in July 2020, it was followed by a range of other publications across the country repeating its false narrative while fabricating others to extend the character assassination into further arenas. Ultimately, more disinformation was published about me in 2020 than accurate reports about the policies I offered my city and the future.
Other journalists more committed to the truth eventually exposed the fraud perpetrated by Democrats loyal to Pelosi and the writers who amplified their lies. But their stories reached audiences far more limited than those of the newspapers than smeared me. Our campaign for climate, racial, and economic justice never recovered the momentum that we lost during the months when the truth remained suppressed.
Within days of my initial accusation, a grassroots journalist from Utah who was previously accused by the same figure in Washington, DC who falsely accused me [published an expose](https://substack.com/redirect/ebb40fd8-332e-406a-a30a-aa22f5689d07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) documenting the history that San Francisco journalists chose to suppress. It took two months before her article reached a wider audience when it was [cited by ](https://substack.com/redirect/cefb6550-4d2d-4554-8e33-31a5dfee4ab7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[the Intercept](https://substack.com/redirect/cefb6550-4d2d-4554-8e33-31a5dfee4ab7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_.
A year later, a whistleblower elected to the San Francisco Democratic Party's County Central Committee [published her account of being recruited to join the plot](https://substack.com/redirect/ed444a48-374c-4d4f-b7d4-267a6dfdbc61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to insulate Pelosi and undermine the election. Black editors at the _San Francisco Bayview_ , a national Black newspaper, described her report as documenting a "civic lynching."
The only other newspaper to cover the experience of whistleblower Gloria Berry was the _Marina Times_ , an outlet across the city with a nearly diametrically opposed editorial perspective serving a largely white audience that observed how the "smear campaign" targeting me ultimately "[smacks of racism](https://substack.com/redirect/26a1cffd-3a0b-42cb-a803-446b2fc80912?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
For _the Bayview_ and the _Marina Times_ to agree on anything is remarkable in itself. It is all the more remarkable given long form analyses published by _[the Intercept](https://substack.com/redirect/cefb6550-4d2d-4554-8e33-31a5dfee4ab7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ and _[Salon](https://substack.com/redirect/85b5a704-6f95-4c8d-8b73-1da3543d7aac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ in 2020 that exposed the unreliability of the claims on which other journalists--including those from the _San Francisco Chronicle_ --based their previous, inaccurate stories. After suppressing her voice for months, these stories by the _Intercept_ and _Salon_ eventually quoted [whistleblower Gloria Berry](https://substack.com/redirect/ebb40fd8-332e-406a-a30a-aa22f5689d07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), while continuing to water down her role and mischaracterize the [experience she eventually published herself](https://substack.com/redirect/ed444a48-374c-4d4f-b7d4-267a6dfdbc61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
### What the court will hear
Several filings before the court explain the crucial importance of the issues at stake. Our [Amended Complaint](https://substack.com/redirect/3829cf29-b1d6-4342-815d-c92c45fa0291?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) summarizes the facts. It notes, among other things, that:
> _" The Chronicle_ has never published a [similar] piece...about a White male candidate for office....
> Joe Biden and Pete Buttigieg, who are both White males, were both accused of sexual misconduct during their respective Presidential candidacies. _The Chronicle_ did not rush to publish any of those accusations. Instead, the Chronicle demonstrated the care it owed its readers and the public at large.
> Had Mr. Buttar been a White male such as Joe Biden or Pete Buttigieg, rather than an immigrant Muslim of Pakistani descent, the _Chronicle_ would not have rushed to publish the Original Piece, let alone publish it.
In addition to our filings, the court will also consider [an amicus brief](https://substack.com/redirect/91ab2500-6789-482f-b3da-4e5845b1a31d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) submitted by the [Rutgers Center for Security, Race and Rights](https://substack.com/redirect/72bd7ba2-89ce-48f1-afab-a614f9337b5c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at Rutgers Law School. As the Center observed, from across the country in New Jersey as a friend of the court:
> "Islamophobia is pervasive and normalized in American society. Presumptions that Muslims are terrorists and anti-American have infected politics over the past twenty years. One of the most pernicious Islamophobic stereotypes is that Muslim immigrant men are misogynistic and regularly engage in sexual misconduct. Such anti-Muslim stereotypes are taken as true by the public in large part because the media has perpetuated these stereotypes without consequence or accountability. The resulting Islamophobia causes tangible harm to Muslims' livelihoods, safety, and civil rights.
> A perverse feedback loop fuels Islamophobia. Politicians and pundits propagate anger and fear of Muslims, which the media often covers as clickbate. As media publishes more antiMuslim stories, negative public perceptions of Muslims solidify. Among the harms arising from biased journalism is defamation of high-profile Muslims. Muslims running for elected office are frequently targeted in Islamophobic smear campaigns, making the cost of political participation prohibitively high. In a study examining the experiences of Muslim candidates who ran in the 2018 midterm elections, researchers found "a social media narrative of manufactured outrage that was disproportionately Islamophobic, xenophobic, racist, and misogynistic." The disproportionately Islamophobic vitriol is likely to deter many Muslims from running for elected office, lest their professional and personal reputations be ruined.
> While the media is certainly free to publish criticism of political candidates, it corrupts the political process and harms individuals' reputations when news outlets publish false information that exploits and perpetuates racist stereotypes against minority candidates. Absent judicial accountability of media misconduct, the destructive Islamophobia feedback loop will continue, and American Muslims will remain at the margins of their country's political system.
Ultimately, we are calling on the court to enforce the press ethics principles announced by the Supreme Court in its historic _New York Times v. Sullivan_ decision in 1964. That case is widely remembered for granting media outlets insulation from defamation claims based on mere negligence when covering public figures. That rule makes sense: the law should encourage the press to report on issues of public concern, without discouraging editors from publishing stories that might expose them to liability.
But _New York Times v. Sullivan_ preserved liability--even when newspapers cover public figures--when the press exhibits actual malice or reckless disregard for the truth. _The Chronicle_ 's coverage meets each of those standards: the newspaper suppressed evidence known to its journalist & editors; silenced multiple voices who spoke out to expose the history the editors chose to suppress; reinforced racial and religious stereotypes; did grave harm to not only me, but also the political process, the City and County of San Francisco, and 800,000 San Franciscans denied a legitimate congressional election for the 35th year in a row; failed to ever correct itself once [the facts were finally exposed](https://substack.com/redirect/ebb40fd8-332e-406a-a30a-aa22f5689d07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by grassroots journalists; and reinforced [the corruption of an intergenerational oligarch](https://substack.com/redirect/f235d36d-1b21-43d6-9bd7-443e4b02a1e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by insulating Pelosi from long overdue electoral accountability.
### How to listen in
Thursday's hearing will address the Hearst Corporation's Motion to Dismiss, and will be accessible to the public via Zoom. Anyone who may be interested in election integrity, press ethics, Islamophobia, political corruption, the First Amendment, or press ethics is welcome to attend.
Our hearing is scheduled for Thursday, February 2, 2023 at 1:30pm PT. It may include other unrelated matters that Judge Chen will hear before turning his attention to our case. To observe, please join via Zoom at [this link](https://substack.com/redirect/a6c28f85-aae5-47cb-899e-fff80a8d6612?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Further information is available on [the court's website](https://substack.com/redirect/21b9b546-0fc8-4ddf-b967-a999d2a8b0fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
If you would like to [join a discussion](https://substack.com/redirect/d24f3a46-dd9b-4660-8d10-913082e9b7c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after the conclusion of our hearing, please do so [here](https://substack.com/redirect/d24f3a46-dd9b-4660-8d10-913082e9b7c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Because we do not know precisely when Judge Chen will hear our arguments, we can not specify an exact time when the post-hearing discussion will begin, but anticipate starting it soon after our hearing concludes.
My work exposing bipartisan corruption is supported by readers. To receive new analysis explaining law, politics, and media through the lens of an immigrant constitutional lawyer, join us as a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..4Ty4ckbqJrnSxmT85HghQHfWlINkjxLzLSdGXFM5kxY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=100073899)
Paid subscribers can access a poem I wrote responding to the Islamophobia to which I was subjected, two years to the date from when the _San Francisco Chronicle_ published the racist lies of my political critics on my birthday in 2020.
**A racist city with a progressive reputation (July 22, 2023)...**
