What you're reflecting on with the language, I would describe that as sort of the inability of the political system to hear two things at once and understand the complexity of a political message. All of these things are true. There is class-based marginalization and white supremacy is real. It's also widely misunderstood, particularly by white people. And part of the problem here is that white people reduce white supremacy to an ideology, not understanding that it is the water in which they swim. And they might have a hard time coming to recognize it because their privilege blinds them to it....I don't think that the white journalists who fabricated lies and printed weaponized smears to mislead the public, I don't think they think of themselves as white supremacists. I don't know if they are white supremacists. Do [their] articles reflect white supremacy? Hell yes, they do. Not only are they resting on stereotypes, not only do they silence a whistle-blower of color, not only they insulate a white, wealthy oligarch who has defended militarism, mass surveillance and mass incarceration -- quintessential demonstrations of authoritarian policies that themselves represent white supremacy in policy. Thank you for reading! I work to expose corruption and the institutions that enable it--but because those institutions enjoy wider reach than I do, I rely on supporters to spread the word and help get the truth out. While SF Gate's editors declined to a racist plot to insulate corruption and mislead the public (from San Francisco Supervisor Dean Preston to former candidate Jackie Fielder, and from the Dramatic Socialites of America to the even more deeply and consistently racist Harvey Milk LGBTQ Democratic Club), I remain committed to accountability both for those sycophants and the oligarchs whose corruption they unfortunately chose to enable. After the San Francisco Chronicle published its libelous stories in July 2020, it was followed by a range of other publications across the country repeating its false narrative while fabricating others to extend the character assassination into further arenas. Ultimately, more disinformation was published about me in 2020 than accurate reports about the policies I offered my city and the future. Other journalists more committed to the truth eventually exposed the fraud perpetrated by Democrats loyal to Pelosi and the writers who amplified their lies. But their stories reached audiences far more limited than those of the newspapers than smeared me. Our campaign for climate, racial, and economic justice never recovered the momentum that we lost during the months when the truth remained suppressed. Within days of my initial accusation, a grassroots journalist from Utah who was previously accused by the same figure in Washington, DC who falsely accused me documenting the history that San Francisco journalists chose to suppress. It took two months before her article reached a wider audience when it was . A year later, a whistleblower elected to the San Francisco Democratic Party's County Central Committee to insulate Pelosi and undermine the election. Black editors at the San Francisco Bayview , a national Black newspaper, described her report as documenting a "civic lynching." The only other newspaper to cover the experience of whistleblower Gloria Berry was the Marina Times , an outlet across the city with a nearly diametrically opposed editorial perspective serving a largely white audience that observed how the "smear campaign" targeting me ultimately "." For the Bayview and the Marina Times to agree on anything is remarkable in itself. It is all the more remarkable given long form analyses published by and in 2020 that exposed the unreliability of the claims on which other journalists--including those from the San Francisco Chronicle --based their previous, inaccurate stories. After suppressing her voice for months, these stories by the Intercept and Salon eventually quoted , while continuing to water down her role and mischaracterize the . What the court will hear Several filings before the court explain the crucial importance of the issues at stake. Our summarizes the facts. It notes, among other things, that: " The Chronicle has never published a [similar] piece...about a White male candidate for office.... Joe Biden and Pete Buttigieg, who are both White males, were both accused of sexual misconduct during their respective Presidential candidacies. The Chronicle did not rush to publish any of those accusations. Instead, the Chronicle demonstrated the care it owed its readers and the public at large. Had Mr. Buttar been a White male such as Joe Biden or Pete Buttigieg, rather than an immigrant Muslim of Pakistani descent, the Chronicle would not have rushed to publish the Original Piece, let alone publish it. In addition to our filings, the court will also consider submitted by the at Rutgers Law School. As the Center observed, from across the country in New Jersey as a friend of the court: "Islamophobia is pervasive and normalized in American society. Presumptions that Muslims are terrorists and anti-American have infected politics over the past twenty years. One of the most pernicious Islamophobic stereotypes is that Muslim immigrant men are misogynistic and regularly engage in sexual misconduct. Such anti-Muslim stereotypes are taken as true by the public in large part because the media has perpetuated these stereotypes without consequence or accountability. The resulting Islamophobia causes tangible harm to Muslims' livelihoods, safety, and civil rights. A perverse feedback loop fuels Islamophobia. Politicians and pundits propagate anger and fear of Muslims, which the media often covers as clickbate. As media publishes more antiMuslim stories, negative public perceptions of Muslims solidify. Among the harms arising from biased journalism is defamation of high-profile Muslims. Muslims running for elected office are frequently targeted in Islamophobic smear campaigns, making the cost of political participation prohibitively high. In a study examining the experiences of Muslim candidates who ran in the 2018 midterm elections, researchers found "a social media narrative of manufactured outrage that was disproportionately Islamophobic, xenophobic, racist, and misogynistic." The disproportionately Islamophobic vitriol is likely to deter many Muslims from running for elected office, lest their professional and personal reputations be ruined. While the media is certainly free to publish criticism of political candidates, it corrupts the political process and harms individuals' reputations when news outlets publish false information that exploits and perpetuates racist stereotypes against minority candidates. Absent judicial accountability of media misconduct, the destructive Islamophobia feedback loop will continue, and American Muslims will remain at the margins of their country's political system. Ultimately, we are calling on the court to enforce the press ethics principles announced by the Supreme Court in its historic New York Times v. Sullivan decision in 1964. That case is widely remembered for granting media outlets insulation from defamation claims based on mere negligence when covering public figures. That rule makes sense: the law should encourage the press to report on issues of public concern, without discouraging editors from publishing stories that might expose them to liability. But New York Times v. Sullivan preserved liability--even when newspapers cover public figures--when the press exhibits actual malice or reckless disregard for the truth. The Chronicle 's coverage meets each of those standards: the newspaper suppressed evidence known to its journalist & editors; silenced multiple voices who spoke out to expose the history the editors chose to suppress; reinforced racial and religious stereotypes; did grave harm to not only me, but also the political process, the City and County of San Francisco, and 800,000 San Franciscans denied a legitimate congressional election for the 35th year in a row; failed to ever correct itself once by grassroots journalists; and reinforced by insulating Pelosi from long overdue electoral accountability. How to listen in Thursday's hearing will address the Hearst Corporation's Motion to Dismiss, and will be accessible to the public via Zoom. Anyone who may be interested in election integrity, press ethics, Islamophobia, political corruption, the First Amendment, or press ethics is welcome to attend. Our hearing is scheduled for Thursday, February 2, 2023 at 1:30pm PT. It may include other unrelated matters that Judge Chen will hear before turning his attention to our case. To observe, please join via Zoom at . Further information is available on . If you would like to after the conclusion of our hearing, please do so . Because we do not know precisely when Judge Chen will hear our arguments, we can not specify an exact time when the post-hearing discussion will begin, but anticipate starting it soon after our hearing concludes. My work exposing bipartisan corruption is supported by readers. To receive new analysis explaining law, politics, and media through the lens of an immigrant constitutional lawyer, join us as a free or paid subscriber. Paid subscribers can access a poem I wrote responding to the Islamophobia to which I was subjected, two years to the date from when the San Francisco Chronicle published the racist lies of my political critics on my birthday in 2020. A racist city with a progressive reputation (July 22, 2023)... | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 1 ICYMI: KELLY LOEFFLER OFFERS GOP GAME PLAN IN EXCLUSIVE FOX NEWS INTERVIEW ATLANTA - In case you missed it, Kelly Loeffler was featured yesterday in an exclusive interview with Fox News Digital following the release of her [2022 Impact Report](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qiAVX88yYAxx1yrrM05A2Pwnu1JhuQcU1BocJNMazsjq_6rNtDudsfpfhcpc6TfN2bvLtHpGrFGii1WwV200lo-1SUYwTj6-iMWCavcVS5ReyyZkP5ltqQaPbk2dBJJ_Agq-SYqkSQBvpmqmU-f7M2kwewS8Qaohi0RZdymQUgY8xW3krN7qSA==&c=po1HD1dZDgV6MfCD_R-nJuI9t1CpL4au7t2zDK_KD_tHPBLap0VEhQ==&ch=UlKE4ENbuPWZ56vbr1-KxRQO2s4Gfnl4oRoKhZzQkolPl8hPPBUcRg==). In the interview, Kelly discusses Greater Georgia and Citizens for a Greater Georgia's roles in helping keep the state red last cycle, and also offers a path forward for conservatives in battleground states across America - rooted in year-round registration, a robust ground game, and strong messaging and advocacy.
To view yesterday's Fox News interview, click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qiAVX88yYAxx1yrrM05A2Pwnu1JhuQcU1BocJNMazsjq_6rNtDudseXpW8t7SoSP7Wxi1VMVr-4KTzrf6GBpmyTs3eSmFCDHJSltSIGPQWQocIY4Z4GJb5N0_pbtp2XsbvARMh-wJvDGB7m82c17AOyD-y26mLVmUAzxmiqnGhQfnE6bj_7YUGEyH663GdGR1wnJm6UjbE4j96cWJ_4bBQwWvVxDDErwzP9EnFXg60eJEtJv_ZRxDPaendZSxZZjNvIEiLjaLAL21p7Fspolzw==&c=po1HD1dZDgV6MfCD_R-nJuI9t1CpL4au7t2zDK_KD_tHPBLap0VEhQ==&ch=UlKE4ENbuPWZ56vbr1-KxRQO2s4Gfnl4oRoKhZzQkolPl8hPPBUcRg==) or read the excerpts below. To view previous coverage on the Report, including a recent editorial from the Atlanta Journal-Constitution, click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qiAVX88yYAxx1yrrM05A2Pwnu1JhuQcU1BocJNMazsjq_6rNtDudseXpW8t7SoSP6G3rywW5axFq5MUaAAJu35lHwnM0J9Q0DCDASLyHL8UbXXfCnxUbSQsmK1M5-jAvPx9ZJxfkYpnBdKawAXezQsA2ySv4VMc22ERuAGz1Vkl5uKrb82Il4BUmjO2kYhHMQmP_cEr1O0_MlzEEV86omGkHHzv4HWp9noyJ0EUZYJ2L0gz0vSwx73MXp9PmHCATSojA6xH7wsYKChncjV_YhA==&c=po1HD1dZDgV6MfCD_R-nJuI9t1CpL4au7t2zDK_KD_tHPBLap0VEhQ==&ch=UlKE4ENbuPWZ56vbr1-KxRQO2s4Gfnl4oRoKhZzQkolPl8hPPBUcRg==).

| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qiAVX88yYAxx1yrrM05A2Pwnu1JhuQcU1BocJNMazsjq_6rNtDudseXpW8t7SoSP7Wxi1VMVr-4KTzrf6GBpmyTs3eSmFCDHJSltSIGPQWQocIY4Z4GJb5N0_pbtp2XsbvARMh-wJvDGB7m82c17AOyD-y26mLVmUAzxmiqnGhQfnE6bj_7YUGEyH663GdGR1wnJm6UjbE4j96cWJ_4bBQwWvVxDDErwzP9EnFXg60eJEtJv_ZRxDPaendZSxZZjNvIEiLjaLAL21p7Fspolzw==&c=po1HD1dZDgV6MfCD_R-nJuI9t1CpL4au7t2zDK_KD_tHPBLap0VEhQ==&ch=UlKE4ENbuPWZ56vbr1-KxRQO2s4Gfnl4oRoKhZzQkolPl8hPPBUcRg==)
---
| Stacey Abrams' playbook to boost Democrat turnout is being countered by a new GOP plan from this growing group
The group - Greater Georgia - was founded in 2021 by former Sen. Kelly Loeffler, R-Ga., with the aim of registering more conservatives to vote, engaging a more diverse slate of voters, and turning out the vote with the necessary ground game infrastructure, all in an effort to prevent similar defeats to what Republicans in the state experienced in the 2020 elections.
Speaking with Fox News Digital, Loeffler detailed the success Greater Georgia saw during the 2022 midterm elections in each of those areas - all things she says can be emulated in other swing states - as well as what improvements she said Republicans needed to make in order to overcome Democrats' financial and organizational advantages...
She attributed this success, in part, to Greater Georgia's recruiting nearly 1,000 grassroots volunteers, registering more than 36,000 new voters, and holding 26 community roundtables to recruit more diverse conservative voters, all of which she detailed in the organization's [annual report](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qiAVX88yYAxx1yrrM05A2Pwnu1JhuQcU1BocJNMazsjq_6rNtDudsfpfhcpc6TfN2bvLtHpGrFGii1WwV200lo-1SUYwTj6-iMWCavcVS5ReyyZkP5ltqQaPbk2dBJJ_Agq-SYqkSQBvpmqmU-f7M2kwewS8Qaohi0RZdymQUgY8xW3krN7qSA==&c=po1HD1dZDgV6MfCD_R-nJuI9t1CpL4au7t2zDK_KD_tHPBLap0VEhQ==&ch=UlKE4ENbuPWZ56vbr1-KxRQO2s4Gfnl4oRoKhZzQkolPl8hPPBUcRg==) following the midterms.
When asked about Abrams' GOTV organization, "Fair Fight," and how it saw success in helping elect Democratic Sens. Warnock and Jon Ossoff, as well as deliver the state to Biden over former President Donald Trump in 2020, Loeffler said it came down to its ability to effectively organize and fund a massive ground mobilization of voters.
"When we looked at the landscape after the 2020 cycle, what I saw was a lack of organization and activism on the ground. Now, there were tremendous numbers of people involved and in mobilizing," she said...
She emphasized that although Georgia was still a red state in terms of values and electoral success in the midterms, it was also "vital" to recognize it as "a canary in a coal mine" for the rest of the country because of its changing electorate, as well as the need to reach those new groups of voters.
"We have seen the trends that are playing out, whether it's younger voters, more diverse voters or independent voters. And we have to have the infrastructure and outreach to conduct that persuasion, mobilization, registration, and then getting them to the polls in 2024," she said.
### Media Contact: Caitlin O'Dea press@kellyloeffler.com

body:

| | | | | Peter, **_GOOD NEWS:_ [We can shrink the GOP House Majority THIS MONTH and make Kevin McCarthy miserable by electing Jennifer McClellan in Virginia!!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tad5da95c-a22f-410c-bd67-f6b7664b866d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T58eb638b-4d11-455b-8185-69ca64a4056d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** _It's been painful watching the clown show in Congress, led by Weaker (as I like to call him) McCarthy. He's brought chaos, stupidity and incompetence to the House, and endangered us by putting Marjorie Taylor Greene on the Homeland Security Committee._ _Yet, his weakness is opportunity._ _House Republicans have one of the smallest majorities ever and we can shrink it further. There's an open seat in Virginia, sadly, vacated when Rep. Donald McEachin passed away in November. **Progressive Democrat Jennifer McClellan is running for it, and the election's only weeks away!**_** ** [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in making history and adding another Democrat to the House? Can you please give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can elect Democrat Jennifer McClellan to Congress?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf7d34504-1c34-472c-bcdd-b9953fa4c032/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Yes, it's a Democratic seat. Yet, so was George Santos' seat. We MUST NEVER take anything for granted. **

This Includes her role as Vice-Chair of the Virginia Legislative Black Caucus._** _McClellan's opponent is a MAGA nut who attacked our democracy and endangered election workers by claiming the 2020 election was stolen. He would ban abortion and eliminate all gun laws._ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in making history and adding another Democrat to the House? Can you please give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can elect Democrat Jennifer McClellan to Congress?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T317c85b1-a025-41a3-8350-6150e638260c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping Democrats thrive, passing progressive policy and increasing Kevin McCarthy's suffering as he manages an even smaller caucus._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taf0a790e-6501-4a65-b02c-bacc7960d213/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Laurie Teper
subject: Important Updates & Opportunities - A message from Courtney
body:
Hey volunteers!

I wanted to give an update on what I am working on right now, and I want to ask you all to consider getting involved. This is an invitation to work together!

I am working for the foreseeable future with the North Carolina Values Coalition as their Grassroots Director. The coalition's primary actions are writing Christian conservative bills and lobbying to have them passed at the state level. They also endorse candidates in many elections. You all experienced a very large grassroots campaign with me, and I saw how the opposition PACs run a lot of elections in my district. I want to see us working just as hard or harder from the other side.

As you heard me say so many times before, one of the biggest problems we have is the Church at large not being involved in government. This is a great opportunity for us to assist an established God-honoring coalition in North Carolina. After the 2022 election, we are only one vote short in the legislature from a supermajority to override Cooper's veto. NCVC's number one priority right now is to pass pro-life legislation, specifically a heartbeat bill. There are some pro-life democrats in the state legislature. There are multiple pro-life groups in NC that are working together to convince them to vote with the Republicans.

I want to invite you all to our upcoming **NC Values Information and Advocacy Breakfast on February 18, 2023, from 9:30am-11:30am at Fellowship Baptist Church (450 Muldee St, Durham). A $20 donation will cover your breakfast and help support the NC Values Coalition. Please register at the link below:**
<https://secure.anedot.com/nc-values-coalition/grassroots-breakfast>

Tami Fitzgerald, the Director of NC Values Coalition will speak and answer any questions you might have. I will explain how you can be involved and we will have an action item that we can complete together that day!

I hope to see you on February 18th!

-Courtney Geels
(new email: [courtney@ncvalues.org](mailto:courtney@ncvalues.org))

Laurie Teper
Temporary Email: [volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (847)212-5651
Home Email: [teper@sbcglobal.net](mailto:teper@sbcglobal.net)

**_URGENT UPDATE FROM WASHINGTON:_**
**Kevin McCarthy and House Republicans have announced a dangerous plan to CUT Social Security benefits.**
We need top Democrats to defend Social Security before it's too late. Respond now to make your voice heard:
**Do you support cuts to Social Security?**

Friend, instead of spending their first 100 days of Congress helping American families and tackling the urgent issues facing our nation, **House Republicans are racing to CUT Social Security benefits.**
More than 65 _million_ Americans count on Social Security. Families have made decisions and built their lives around these benefits for generations.

**That's why Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand has always supported Social Security, fighting tooth and nail to protect these crucial benefits.** Just last year, she helped achieve cost of living increases for Social Security recipients, and she's still pushing for even more increases in the years ahead.
**But now the GOP is trying to undo this progress and push America back to a world where retirement was out of reach for all but the ultrawealthy.**
**That's why we're calling on 1,500 Democrats from across the country to respond to our live poll – including you, friend. This poll closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight, so please respond ASAP to stand with Kirsten and show the GOP that we won't sit idly by while they cut this vital public program.**
**Do you support cuts to Social Security?**

name: Alan Keck
subject: It’s time to turn up the heat.
body:
With just under four months left before the primary election and with HOURS before our first End-of-the-Month-Deadline of the year, it’s now or never.
[](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nkulla-dytiuyidkd-r/) **_Friend,_ Team Keck and I have wrapped up a fantastic month on the campaign trail!**Together, we've joined Kentuckians in Fort Thomas, Bowling Green, Williamsburg, online during our livestreams and elsewhere-to rally for the change we know Kentucky so desperately needs. [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nkulla-dytiuyidkd-j/) _**We 've barrelled into the new year having ended 2022 with over $200k in generous support from Kentuckians like you,**_ and we've only just now completed my latest of many tours of the state. We've also committed to our first primary debate. We can't let up on this incredible momentum-momentum that wouldn't have been possible without your time, talent and treasure. [DONATE YOUR TIME OR TALENT AS A VOLUNTEER](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nkulla-dytiuyidkd-t/) [DONATE YOUR TREASURE OF ANY AMOUNT](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nkulla-dytiuyidkd-i/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nkulla-dytiuyidkd-d/) **Because now it 's time to turn up the heat.**With just under four months left before the primary election and with HOURS before our first End-of-the-Month-Deadline of the year, it's now or never. **[Any donation, of time, talent or treasure, no matter how small, goes far to electing a Governor who 's accomplished the impossible.](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nkulla-dytiuyidkd-h/)** [DONATE YOUR TIME OR TALENT AS A VOLUNTEER](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nkulla-dytiuyidkd-k/) [DONATE YOUR TREASURE OF ANY AMOUNT](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nkulla-dytiuyidkd-u/) That's what we've done in Somerset, where we've rejuvenated the city's economy, one that now grows at nearly TWICE the rate of the Commonwealth's at-large. _**I don 't just want my hometown to reap the benefits of smart leadership, of smart policy-I want that for all of Kentucky.**_**[I hope you do too -and if you do, your support puts us one step closer to that reality.](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nkulla-dytiuyidkd-o/)** So, whether it's your time, talent or treasure, I hope you'll consider supporting our campaign-or consider continuing to support our campaign.**[Only together will we prove, #KentuckyWins.](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nkulla-dytiuyidkd-b/)** God bless. [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nkulla-dytiuyidkd-n/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nkulla-dytiuyidkd-p/) Alan Keck [DONATE HERE](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nkulla-dytiuyidkd-x/) | [Unsubscribe](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-u-nkulla-dytiuyidkd-m/)
---
clean_body: With just under four months left before the primary election and with HOURS before our first End-of-the-Month-Deadline of the year, it’s now or never. Friend, Team Keck and I have wrapped up a fantastic month on the campaign trail!Together, we've joined Kentuckians in Fort Thomas, Bowling Green, Williamsburg, online during our livestreams and elsewhere-to rally for the change we know Kentucky so desperately needs. We 've barrelled into the new year having ended 2022 with over $200k in generous support from Kentuckians like you, and we've only just now completed my latest of many tours of the state. We've also committed to our first primary debate. We can't let up on this incredible momentum-momentum that wouldn't have been possible without your time, talent and treasure. Because now it 's time to turn up the heat.With just under four months left before the primary election and with HOURS before our first End-of-the-Month-Deadline of the year, it's now or never. That's what we've done in Somerset, where we've rejuvenated the city's economy, one that now grows at nearly TWICE the rate of the Commonwealth's at-large. I don 't just want my hometown to reap the benefits of smart leadership, of smart policy-I want that for all of Kentucky. So, whether it's your time, talent or treasure, I hope you'll consider supporting our campaign-or consider continuing to support our campaign. God bless. Alan Keck |

name: Andy Biggs
subject: Expose the lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62276595:JOc2_HGZN:m:1:3334294963:5D1DABAF4B29774EB7E87AB7FBC5722E:r)
---
| Peter,
Remember when the Left couldn't stop screaming about how Russia "rigged" the 2016 election?
You and I knew it was a lie all along...and now, **a major study from New York University confirms that "RUSSIA RUSSIA RUSSIA" was an election-denying "Big Lie" from the very beginning.**
The entire Russian Collusion Delusion was a sham and so was the phony impeachment Democrats used to defame and shame President Trump.
It's time we get retribution for the Democrats' frivolous lies and disgraceful behavior...and we can make this happen now that we have a House majority.
But in order to do so, I'll need to get my fellow colleagues on board and the message out to millions of Americans. **[Can I count on you to join me in my fight to expose the Democrats?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62276595:JOc2_HGZN:m:1:3334294963:5D1DABAF4B29774EB7E87AB7FBC5722E:r)** | | | | [EXPOSE THE LIES](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62276595:JOc2_HGZN:m:1:3334294963:5D1DABAF4B29774EB7E87AB7FBC5722E:r)
---
We cannot sit back now that the Russian Collusion Delusion is confirmed to be one of the biggest political lies in US history.

**Democrats knew Russian interference did little to sway voter opinion, and so did we, yet they still used it to delegitimize President Trump and destroy his public image.**

Now is our best shot to expose every single Democrat who supported this lie, especially the ones who used it to launch the sham impeachment.

**[I'll need your support right away](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62276595:JOc2_HGZN:m:1:3334294963:5D1DABAF4B29774EB7E87AB7FBC5722E:r)** to demand my Republican colleagues work with me to get this information out to millions of Americans. Together we can demand action, but it'll take us all.

Yours in Liberty,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62276595:JOc2_HGZN:m:1:3334294963:5D1DABAF4B29774EB7E87AB7FBC5722E:r)
---

NFL Quarterback Tom Brady officially made his decision today on whether he'd retire or not this off-season. Following the 2021 NFL off-season, it was falsely reported that Brady would retire. However, Brady stated that his mind was not made on the decision to retire, as he eventually decided to return to the Tampa Bay Buccaneers for the 2022 NFL season.

The Biden administration is trying another backdoor channel to bypass Congress and push forward its unfair and inflationary student debt amnesty plan. | | | Please see a note from one of our sponsors. ---
Peter, after the Supreme Court delivered a devastating blow to Joe Biden’s student loan bailout scheme, he’s back at it again. The Biden administration is trying another backdoor channel to bypass Congress and push forward its unfair and inflationary student debt amnesty plan. This time, Biden has a plan to cut millions of student loans by more than 75%. This proposal would...➡️ Cost hundreds of billions of dollars➡️ Rob American taxpayers ➡️ Cause inflation to skyrocket even further out of control➡️ Reward Left-wing universities for raising tuition rates That’s why Heritage Action launched a campaign to drive public comments against this proposed rule **UNTIL FEBRUARY 10th** and energize grassroots patriots against this terrible plan.
But efforts like these depend on conservatives like YOU continuing to support and fund our fight. [**Peter, will you help us by chipping in a critical deadline donation by February 10th?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fc005abb72bd42eab0bcb97b4c1ccd26&_e=BItF_bAofLmkBuDk80JAylD1fnSLz4rwPc-1I3HIA-i28FEsgRjxPAK5rRYgIOdVyD8lrzI4ykuIAjXXMx_Z-rD03cFbhnizIYaAF87-L_byLq4CyVQcuZ3XCavGjORSxdHffv6hNGxsCLJZDE48TF6bfJTsHZTFFd6kMvyflhuFgUHN-Q5DQXYzrwp1DtOx98MqSyXMDGMYwHZoU-Yu4ELQNWQfcXt1kA8mjo_ka4wFSVLeRiLRgzq-2WfmqXHY32zLqSVzZxqdx51rDXokKrnkK4-gfkkGr5WpmvpIUX3HsbYw6_sgahx2fwqXnBIB0f_fBSVwYuwZJoUhh0JbnWdLhAMp5Mo8YzW16QCc1c0%3D)

Peter, this proposed rule from the Biden administration is an economic disaster that would put even more of a burden on the American people. **We can’t let this proposed rule go through. ** _**[Help us continue to energize the grassroots until February 10th – chip in an emergency donation now >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=fc005abb72bd42eab0bcb97b4c1ccd26&_e=BItF_bAofLmkBuDk80JAylD1fnSLz4rwPc-1I3HIA-i28FEsgRjxPAK5rRYgIOdVyD8lrzI4ykuIAjXXMx_Z-rD03cFbhnizIYaAF87-L_byLq4CyVQcuZ3XCavGjORSxdHffv6hNGxsCLJZDE48TF6bfJTsHZTFFd6kMvyflhuFgUHN-Q5DQXYzrwp1DtOx98MqSyXMDGMYwHZoU-Yu4Kb3j_0uCZtlYJf-XEvUAH8Fys5lBk0B0a8sv_R-nWdJc_Zh1wXt7oUEA3zGcSfcjtncPawCJep5Yhrexc5wusQ3cpDMDWc59Juh58OaJe_DB_GOhds4mzeDh8m6OV6fa9icWuVdo2GdW4xGUZWmQpc%3D)**_ Thank you,Garrett Bess, Vice President | Heritage Action

| Success! My bill, [HB 1891](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wiIGhzP_v7tmZIZ9TsLw9cs_4UoR2GjD-Tf5sHA6NfGGRo23LivZrZbaeZyMDWLdqvgI3SplM4VOVTbuj80TRda4HF0LdwBZf9FkbnQxzqdXsNnnnv1qW-fhiNIwusdqv3oRi-uKIHEs9NyOtYM2h8AF7wFdpNeyhOqPeQFAB0lENH-XfLqfT3ksIwsUyf9MZuc3TRyTUzo=&c=Nqkx_g-_AsLTOVplWWRzIg-_zSM1-KQDiI3ZCXM1BpLjxiXmBX8gcQ==&ch=Hq2MnSDQGOa9UiYpbymMy2mxgl6Iq4CBI3Nue8nyImsWHiOi708hLQ==), a groundbreaking treatment ([Learn more here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wiIGhzP_v7tmZIZ9TsLw9cs_4UoR2GjD-Tf5sHA6NfGGRo23LivZrf5snpLiD0pRP42QoddQIHANidnfhQO7tllmTEBLZyZ99s-qlyXKNjgDbONNkqdYGNk5iFQREZyepYC2eS4DRdNhvWQVfK4dHTs9xhxPl7cCcaKyIftwB7RQ9XripGt3RSl1uwBkNyR2nKcMp3ylSJuc7b0QWOfCir74BUV1mSgpEsWUNfNEIds=&c=Nqkx_g-_AsLTOVplWWRzIg-_zSM1-KQDiI3ZCXM1BpLjxiXmBX8gcQ==&ch=Hq2MnSDQGOa9UiYpbymMy2mxgl6Iq4CBI3Nue8nyImsWHiOi708hLQ==)) that helps those with traumatic brain injury, mental health, addiction, and autism, by establishing a Trans-cranial Magnetic Stimulation pilot program in Virginia. Thank you, to Brandon Soleau, a medically retired Army Ranger from the Ranger regiment, for sharing your expertise to help pass this bill in the General Assembly.
This bill will help people struggling with mental health, and I am excited it passed Health Welfare and Institutions Sub Committee this week, unopposed! I've been working on this legislation all summer with State Senator John Cosgrove. His Senate version [SB1234](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wiIGhzP_v7tmZIZ9TsLw9cs_4UoR2GjD-Tf5sHA6NfGGRo23LivZrf5snpLiD0pR6ZxNFC3KZDeRPEAcEMrr2XTk-_wDYdc-HNhvZMdfmOJJGBGnwPwMkAcypOv0e4_oizIkFr2DddQvCl8GYo3BwAedoWB9_dbAUEZgl71SZ7BAjYDB4N7MxElmcqjaFBFwJiJn0Ssjanw=&c=Nqkx_g-_AsLTOVplWWRzIg-_zSM1-KQDiI3ZCXM1BpLjxiXmBX8gcQ==&ch=Hq2MnSDQGOa9UiYpbymMy2mxgl6Iq4CBI3Nue8nyImsWHiOi708hLQ==) has already passed the Senate floor 40-0!

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Endorsement List == | | | | == | == | | | | Reminder: I cannot accept donations until I get out of session February 25. | | | | 2023 Session Update Week 3 | | Governor Youngkin "Compete to Win" | | Governor Glenn Youngkin discusses teamwork "Getting it Done Together", and his major tax cut policies in Virginia including my bill to lower taxes on Virginia retired Veterans ==. | | I had the honor of addressing the crowd, leading the pledge of allegiance, and introducing my friend, and our caucus tax expert, Delegate Joe McNamara. | Finance Sub-Committee chair on State Taxation, Delegate Joe McNamara, speaking about how he eliminated the grocery tax in Virginia, and his two 2023 tax reducing bills, HB 2138 & HB 2319. | Congressman Rob Wittman seen here, speaking on Republicans working together, at all levels, to improve Virginia. | | | | | | | | | | | | | It was a huge honor to speak at Governor Youngkin's, "Compete to Win", event at the Carole and Marcus Weinstein Jewish Community Center (==) in Richmond. It was good to see Senator Siobhan Dunnavant, Delegates A.C. Cordoza, constituents, and many other friends there as well! | 2023 McGuire Legislative Agenda | == | The General Assembly convened on Wednesday, January 11th marking the beginning of the 403rd legislative session of the House of Delegates. We begin week four Monday. == for a list of legislation on the agenda brought to me by constituents, and sponsored by me, to improve Virginia. | Delegate Buddy Fowler | | Please support my friend and fellow Delegate Buddy Fowler for re-election to the Virginia House of Delegates. Due to redistricting, his district now includes Louisa County, western Hanover County, and part of Henrico County. | Amelia World Series Champions | | | | | | Amelia County Delegate Tommy Wright recognized and congratulated the Amelia Dixie Youth Major League All-Star boys Baseball Team for winning the Dixie Youth Division II Majors World Series in 2022! == to read Delegate Tommy Wright's resolution. Over the summer while campaigning for State Senate District 10 in Amelia County, I met the Dixie Youth Major All-stars players, coaches, and parents. They were doing a car wash to raise money so the team could go to South Carolina and compete in the World Series. Congratulations for winning the championship! | Parental Rights Success! | == | Parental Rights Success! == to watch me present my bill in K12 Subcommittee to return power back to parents in Virginia! | Eliminate Drop Box Success! | == | We need to restore confidence in our elections. Im excited to inform you my bill to remove drop boxes has passed the house. This will save, money, time, and improve confidence in our elections. == | Happy Birthday, Dale Hargrove Alderman of Hanover | | I stopped by Lola's Farmhouse Bistro and crashed former Hanover GOP Chair Dale Hargrove's Birthday Party. Her father Republican Delegate Frank Hargrove represented Hanover County in the House of Delegates and is the father of the modern Republican Conservative movement in Virginia. It is hard to believe, the last time my opponent ran at the state level in Virginia State Senate District 10, he ran as a Democrat against beloved Republican Conservative Frank Hargrove. | Support Local Business | | | Please support local businesses. Lola's Farmhouse Bistro is a great restaurant for a date night with your significant other. It was good to catch up with the owner Ronnie as well! | On The Campaign Trail | | | | We are making friends, and signing folks up to be delegates for the convention, all across State Senate District 10. Please go to www.john4va.com and pledge your support to be a delegate at our convention on May 6 at Buckingham County High School! | Buckingham Farm Bureau | | Thank you to members of the Buckingham Farm Bureau, for stopping by and sharing concerns for farmers in Buckingham County. I'm glad to hear you are very much in support of the Ag bill I am working on with Delegate Michael Webert. This bill gives Virginia Farmers more time by extending the effective date of the Chesapeake Bay Watershed Implementation Plan. | Farm Bureau Provided Cheese Burgers for Lunch | | Thank you, to The Farm Bureau, for providing a delicious lunch, with Virginia Angus Cheese Burgers, to remind legislators that agriculture is the largest industry in Virginia. Thank you for all you do to support Virginia Farmers! | Volunteers Wanted | | | Volunteers Wanted! Our team of staff and volunteers is growing. Thank you for helping us improve Virginia. If you want to volunteer on my campaign for State Senate, please email john@mcguireforvirginia.com. Please put, "volunteer", in the subject line. | Success | | | | Success! My bill, ==, a groundbreaking treatment (==) that helps those with traumatic brain injury, mental health, addiction, and autism, by establishing a Trans-cranial Magnetic Stimulation pilot program in Virginia. Thank you, to Brandon Soleau, a medically retired Army Ranger from the Ranger regiment, for sharing your expertise to help pass this bill in the General Assembly. This bill will help people struggling with mental health, and I am excited it passed Health Welfare and Institutions Sub Committee this week, unopposed! I've been working on this legislation all summer with State Senator John Cosgrove. His Senate version == has already passed the Senate floor 40-0! | Virginia State Capitol Art | | | | | Much of Virginia's history is depicted through art that is displayed in, and around, the Capitol. I highly suggest you sign up for a tour! | The "Teebow bill" | | | Unfortunately, the Teebow Bill, a bill I chief co-partroned with Delegate Marie March to allow home school students to participate in public school sports died in committee again this year. I am a big proponent of Home School and I believe this is great bill for Virginia youth. We will keep pushing! | American Veterans Vote (AVV) | | I am proud to be a founding member of "American Veterans Vote". Thank you COL Mike Flanagan USA (RETD) for delivering my official AVV T-shirt. == to learn more about AVV and why veterans should sign up and get involved. It is more important than ever for veterans to vote. | Session Visits | | | | | | | | Each day, individuals and groups visit legislators and share their concerns, which help us make the best decisions for Virginia. It is an honor to work on legislation for you. Thank you, for sharing your insight! | Virginia National Guard Reception | | | | | | | | Virginia National Guard Senior Leaders, public servants within the gubernatorial administration, and members of the Virginia General Assembly, including Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears, attended the Virginia National Guard Reception. The evening event included a catered buffet meal by Mission BBQ, complementary beverage service, and brief comments from the Virginia National Guard leadership, and leaders of the Commonwealth of Virginia. | Fluvanna SD10 Candidate Forum | | I really enjoyed talking with constituents in Fluvanna County about legislation I'm working on in the General Assembly, and my campaign to be your next State Senator. Together we will un-California Virginia! | Louisa Tea Party SD10 Candidate Forum | | I really enjoyed talking with constituents in Fluvanna County about legislation I'm working on in the General Assembly, and my campaign to be your next State Senator. Together we will un-California Virginia! | Senate District 10 Update: | We will have a convention for State Senate District 10 at 10am on May 6th, at Buckingham H.S. The address is 78 Knights Rd., Buckingham, VA 23921. Please ==, and fill out the form to submit your commitment to being a delegate for John McGuire at the Senate District 10 convention. By signing up now, we can provide you with details as they come in. | == | I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. I look forward to seeing you around the district. In the meantime, please continue the teamwork, and let me know what you are thinking. You can reach me during session through my Legislative Aid, Archer McGiffin, at deljmcguire@house.virginia.gov, or 804-698-1056. Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you. | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life Pro-Gun America 1st Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == Past Newsletters: Week 2 2023 == Week 1 2023 == 2022 Newsletter Links == Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | McGuire for Delegate | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

Friend,
History has shown us that, by working together, we can strengthen our democracy and change our country for the better.
As I reflect on everything we accomplished in 2022, I think about the young and not-so-young organizers who came together to help make a difference in our communities. You joined organizations like All On The Line and took action to bring the America we know closer to our founding ideals.

This year will bring a new set of challenges, with pending Supreme Court decisions in Alabama and North Carolina that could shape the future of our democracy, and redrawn maps in gerrymandered states that continue to prevent too many voters from making their voices heard.
**[Will you make a donation to support All On The Line?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58121260/390123497/-1385119474?refcode=20230201_AOTL_P_POTUS1_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNlYWQ3NTBlLTU2YTItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jZMmnIDDBpqB4JQrdI_xKlXAiW_vpWgYYz-AEayMCG8=)**
So we've got a lot of work to do. But friend, I believe we can make America more fair and more free -- not just for this generation, but for the next one, too.
Progress doesn’t always happen in a straight line, but it does happen. I still believe we have more in common than our politics suggest, and that if we keep standing up, speaking out, and pushing for change, we can strengthen our democracy and build a better future for all of us.
Thank you for helping us continue to make progress.
\-- Barack Obama

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Mississippi Republicans Act Like Democrats
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| This must be what it feels like to live in a BLUE - Democrat state. Yesterday was the committee deadline for bills in the MS Legislature, the first deadline for bills in the legislative process. All bills that were not successfully passed out of committee died. It was a tough day for true conservatives and Republicans that actually abide by the party platform. Deep red Republican-led states all over the country are passing bills that are:
* Reforming our elections and creating more integrity to our election system;
* Bringing educational freedom and more choices for parents to educate their children;
* Religious and Medical Freedom for parents and their children;
* Reforming the medical industry with free market solutions to lower prices and provide better care;
* Parents' Bill of Rights that acknowledges the Parent’s right to raise their children apart from the government;
* Eliminating the state’s income tax.

But not here in Mississippi. After yesterday’s deadline, bills to do all of these things have died in committee. Leaving little hope for conservative bills to be passed this year to do any of these things. After watching so many conservative bills die in committees led by Republican chairmen, with a supermajority of Republican members. We wonder, is this what it feels like to be a Freedom Caucus in a blue state like Illinois? Watching good conservative legislation die a quick death while bills to grow government, increase taxation, grow budgets, and stick it to the tax payers continue through the process. Today is the qualification deadline to challenge incumbents in the MS Legislature at 5:00 pm. It's not too late to challenge those members who call themselves conservatives on the campaign trail, but do the complete opposite, representing you here in Jackson.
---
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/Z3YVxsxKtMxByFT5mzAHxg) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---
| | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net)
---

body:
Would you like a SIGNED copy of my new book?

|
---
| | |
Friend,

I'm excited to release a new book about my time as President Trump's CIA Director and Secretary of State.

_**Never Give An Inch**_ contains dozens of untold stories you don't want to miss, including negotiations with North Korea's Kim Jong Un, rescuing American hostages, eliminating Qassem Soleimani, and much more!

**[I'm granting you SPECIAL ACCESS to your very own SIGNED copy before the book's release to the general public. Will you claim your book before they run out?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpi0puftsdifqsfo0t6943t0d1762dbvm6bmkcrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9jmcpb2cph2bs "I’m granting you SPECIAL ACCESS to your very own SIGNED copy before the book’s release to the general public. Unapologetically American,

Mike Pompeo

name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: This is exciting news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Would you like a SIGNED copy of my new book?

|
---
| | |
Friend,

I'm excited to release a new book about my time as President Trump's CIA Director and Secretary of State.

_**Never Give An Inch**_ contains dozens of untold stories you don't want to miss, including negotiations with North Korea's Kim Jong Un, rescuing American hostages, eliminating Qassem Soleimani, and much more!

**[I'm granting you SPECIAL ACCESS to your very own SIGNED copy before the book's release to the general public. Will you claim your book before they run out?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zc2b7avq426h620g6g6hrsci1ln1gf5gfukk5ovo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9jm2ob2clh2bs "I’m granting you SPECIAL ACCESS to your very own SIGNED copy before the book’s release to the general public. Will you claim your book before they run out?")**

---
I understand you're one of the top Republican patriots in the country, so I want to make sure you get a signed copy! But there are only a limited number available and supplies are quickly running out.

**[My new book _Never Give An Inch_ will be yours with a $45 donation to help Republicans take back America.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk0j2inoho64krphng63e6v5ko3j26smigb1a2ig_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9jm2ob2clh2bs "My new book Never Give An Inch will be yours with a $45 donation to help Republicans take back America.")**

Please hurry to order today.

Unapologetically American,

Mike Pompeo

body:
|
---
| | Peter — We just marked 13 years since the Supreme Court’s undemocratic _Citizens United v. FEC decision_.

**_[13 years in, we’re renewing our fight to demand Congress pass a constitutional amendment to undo this terrible ruling and protect our elections from hidden corporate influence. Will you be one of the 5,000 people we need to sign a joint petition this week as a citizens lobby for election reform?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58123904/390131771/1920676222?refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230201_PT_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjdlNDQ4OS01ZWEyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cnUsHj1x1VeTEq3laXihn-bLhR4H3ijY1gEuhecQRm4=&emci=a09a2f83-5ea2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4b7e4489-5ea2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5260669)_** | | ****_******[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58123905/390131772/1920676222?refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230201_PT_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjdlNDQ4OS01ZWEyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cnUsHj1x1VeTEq3laXihn-bLhR4H3ijY1gEuhecQRm4=&emci=a09a2f83-5ea2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4b7e4489-5ea2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5260669)******_****
---
Here is a glimpse of what Citizens United did.
* Election spending has exploded, with an estimated $16.7 BILLION spent on the 2022 midterm elections.
* Super PACs brazenly disregard campaign finance laws and corporations are engrossed in shady, backroom dealings.
* The ultra-wealthy's exorbitant power is leading our democracy down an oligarchic path.
* Foreign powers exploit Citizen United’s loopholes to sway our elections from abroad.

And that’s just the tip of the iceberg, Peter. It’s time we take action against these damaging precedents. **_[Help us make a bold statement by condemning Citizens United and promoting a constitutional amendment on this anniversary!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58123906/390131773/1920676222?refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20230201_PT_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjdlNDQ4OS01ZWEyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cnUsHj1x1VeTEq3laXihn-bLhR4H3ijY1gEuhecQRm4=&emci=a09a2f83-5ea2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4b7e4489-5ea2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5260669)_**

Undoing Citizens United means everyone will play by the same set of rules AND everyone’s voices will be heard — regardless of their wealth status.

Congress has the power to fix this. Peter, it’s up to us to apply pressure and ensure democracy is preserved. **Wealthy corporations should not have exorbitant political power, people should.**

|
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd8nbc1inu4bs4kh5ni47fdjso01bqlffc7k475o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9jmeo31chh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6id3rgccsrn33slcmkmgsnlqar5fd8a7qb2h1n0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9jmeo31chh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd8945sjnmug55cp3a4pbpd5v4eom9qt66o4md6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9jmeo31chh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrta14ljis5o7jap6scalhk07m48kddvbl9fm89g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9jmeo31chh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: It’s my birthday and I’ll raise money for abortion funds if I want to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Happy birthday to me!
I’ve already gotten an incredible present - watching this team step up in full force to support my birthday fundraising push for the National Network of Abortion Funds.
But it wouldn’t be a birthday without a few more gifts. So how about it: If you haven’t had a chance yet, will you make a donation of any amount to the National Network of Abortion Funds right now? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-nnaf?refcode=20230201_em_sjj_bday2]
This organization is doing such important work on the ground to break down barriers to necessary care, and I’m really proud that so many of you have seen its value and contributed what you could.
If you didn’t see my email yesterday, take a look below, and then please consider celebrating my birthday with the gift of giving.
Thank you!!
Sara
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Sara Jacobs <info@sarajacobsforca.com>
Date: Tue, Jan 31, 2023
Friends, my birthday is tomorrow!
I know what you’re thinking - she’s going to ask us to sign her birthday card and then ferry us over to a donation page and ask for money. Not today. (To be clear, there’s nothing wrong with political campaigns raising very necessary resources and celebrating people’s birthdays! This just isn’t that email.)
For my birthday, I’d like to fundraise for the National Network of Abortion Funds. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-nnaf?refcode=20230201_em_sjj_bday2]
I’m not setting a specific goal - I’m just asking all of you to take a moment and think about this organization, and then be as generous as you’re able to be.
Here’s what they do:
- Remove financial and logistical barriers to abortion access.
- Support nearly 100 local organizations around the country to direct funds where they’re most useful.
- Center their work on the intersectionality of racial, economic, and reproductive justice.
I’ve said this many times before and I’m not stopping anytime soon: Abortion rights are a kitchen table issue.
And while I am going to work as hard as I possibly can in the halls of Congress to restore and expand those rights, this is a battle that has to be fought on many grounds in order for us to win. Passing legislation to codify the rights of Roe and to protect people who need and want reproductive care is incredibly important - and we need to support people doing the work on the ground in our communities to secure access to care.
So today, a week after what would’ve been Roe v. Wade’s 50th anniversary, I hope you’ll join me and donate any amount you can to the National Network of Abortion Funds. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-nnaf?refcode=20230201_em_sjj_bday2]
Thank you for anything you’re able to give. Being together in this fight gives me hope.
Sara
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District
P.S. If giving financially doesn’t work for you today, that’s OK - consider following them on Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/abortionfunds/] or Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/NationalNetworkofAbortionFunds] to keep up with their work and share with your networks.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sjc-q4-2022-em?refcode=BLU-SJC-20221117-1-EM [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sjc-q4-2022-em?refcode=BLU-SJC-20221117-1-EM]
Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
Sara Jacobs for Congress
PO Box 120085
San Diego, CA 92112
United States
https://www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/ [https://www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/] https://www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/ [https://www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/] https://twitter.com/sarajacobsca [https://twitter.com/sarajacobsca]
CONTRIBUTE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230202_em_sjj_bday2]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/hyl6jC1aX0el_nwy_DShOA2?unsubscribedata=nFVM1O7hTNLrdj8dkMGRkeDjUXUwIIoKna3QQN5rdQArBJ4UFzRakdf2mzDvusa771RfoEvjs5i%2BvE9we8ZUNE5eEK2nEb84hUFytp79pWO4YFFWfclhVi16Kl%2FDI88iiFZ%2BhBrVFrO3%2FXvhda2cOISnuOiw7s51XqdqtPoyrQNgwznn2n4Db9M%2FKDKaz6XfeckLUJ4cKKNMILrkB4ccwLRlXVXdjlhZG6XsYZ50jhsYuweLHdUBfoWPB%2BXA7V%2B24acPoy4CRfyHcibWpcFI5bY5%2BGIwS1KABYTRKjiZjT1dPCRxkD%2BPW7URWDVq6%2BKWQJ0d6Pu0Me6K0Ak2J4PXqmeo2xilU7eQTL6XtjiOGcCJtYJ%2BlGN4Kf%2F%2Fov%2BytvVj2oSMTND92sGnEosdDLQBVcZggWPfO0GaHBIMaCU%2BVXpl6EBBLkKagXBlFK5O9LDb
This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I’m running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

I wanted you to hear it directly from me: I’m going to be challenging
Kyrsten Sinema and running for the United States Senate in Arizona.

If that’s all you need to hear, I am asking you to become a Day One,
Founding Donor to our historic campaign. The amount of the donation is not
nearly as important as the number of people contributing today. Use this
link to split a donation between my campaign and Charles Booker:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18877?t=1001&akid=2944%2E346206%2EyarDij ]secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-rg

CHIP IN →

Here is the truth:

The rich and the powerful don’t need more advocates in the Senate. It’s
the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help.

For too long, Senator Sinema has used her position of power to help those
who already have it all. She has stood in the way of raising the minimum
wage, protecting voting rights, lowering the cost of prescription drugs,
and more.

Now, we can argue about different ways to do the job as a United States
Senator, but at the core of it all, if you are more likely to be meeting
and helping the powerful than the powerless, you are doing this job wrong.

I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down.

I am going to change that.

But in order to win this race against Senator Sinema and whoever the
Republicans nominate, it’s going to take a historic grassroots effort.
From day one.

And that is why I am asking:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18877?t=1002&akid=2944%2E346206%2EyarDij ]Can you please split a $20 contribution between my campaign and Charles
Booker to become a Founding Donor to my campaign for U.S. Senate today? It
all adds up when we’re all chipping in, and that’s how we’ll win this
race. Together.

Thank you,

Ruben Gallego

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230201-2944-footer&t=1003&refcode2=2944_346206_yarDij&akid=2944%2E346206%2EyarDij

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2944%2E346206%2EyarDij

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign the petition: The US Consumer Product Safety Commission must take action to protect children from gas stove pollution
body:
Protect kids from indoor pollution
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5cf6eddd-8e41-44f1-b326-a3f5ed1f22a4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, There’s been a growing body of evidence going [_all the way back to the 1970s_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1b06851-cffb-48b3-ad93-46d230655492/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _ _ that gas stoves are bad for your health – and now another piece of the puzzle has fallen into place. A [new peer-reviewed study](https://default.salsalabs.org/T87e289e1-4c65-4089-95ea-3c61c1520f05/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) published in the International Journal of Environmental Research and Public Health found that in the U.S., **1 in 8 cases of childhood asthma is caused by gas stoves – a startling stat that’s on par with the risks posed by secondhand smoke. ** [**Add your name to the petition and demand U.S. regulators to protect children from gas stove pollution.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e24e0ea-2cdc-44d7-a9e3-5080a179b691/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **The fossil fuel industry has known for decades that gas stoves emit dangerous levels of formaldehyde, methane, nitrogen oxides, and other pollutants – it just hasn’t cared.** Even in the face of this latest research, it’s _still _pushing to add gas hook ups to new buildings and doom another generation of children to asthma and poor lung health. **Enough. **
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7e3529c-d7aa-4252-aaa8-05260e2d72e6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Nearly [100 cities across North America](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3118252f-c830-4ae3-a655-c7d790c8a02d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) – as well as the state of [Washington](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11a16f9e-3fa6-47cb-b117-55c2f3fafc36/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), the state of [California](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6179880-b179-47eb-a88e-ff7859cc8abf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and maybe soon the state of [New York](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfbdb190e-65f7-42e9-bce2-0f363369649c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) – are working on or have already passed [policies to electrify new and existing buildings](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0902d99f-cd3c-4c8f-bee9-9f459c766177/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) in order to protect their residents and the climate. Now it’s time for the federal government to get on board. **The US Consumer Product Safety Commission must act to keep our air clean and children safe. [Add your name to the petition and demand U.S. regulators to protect children from gas stove pollution.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T710ebaa0-8ac6-4fe7-9454-35cde4f32115/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thank you for standing up for kids’ health, Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7f67356c-71de-47e4-afc9-b7f25b6e8849/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/protectchildrenfromgasstoves-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb9aa9e72-ba74-481e-bc9f-d635c1b7b0ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: This is Zuckerbucks 2.0
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
The left is already plotting its next attack on the integrity of our elections... | | | | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c1b54c296f&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**BREAKING: ZUCKERBERG-FUNDED GROUP PUSHES “ZUCKERBUCKS” 2.0 FOR 2024**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=43f8ee0385&e=fdefed58de) Friend, while the media is fixated on Biden's document scandal and hypocrisy, the left is _already_ plotting its next attack on the integrity of our elections. Mark Zuckerberg is once again funneling his “Zuckerbucks” into the U.S. Alliance for Election Excellence which will send money to local election officials for “equipment, training, and consulting.” **Why do local election officials need the funding and consulting of Big Tech billionaires to run elections?**
---
| | [**DEFEND OUR ELECTIONS >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=504ddbd062&e=fdefed58de)
---
We must stay vigilant to ensure that liberal billionaires cannot directly influence our elections again. I’m leading the fight in Congress to ensure we take up _major_ election integrity legislation to defend our elections in 2024. But I’m in a race against time and liberal billionaires who seek to undermine our elections.
Friend, I’m asking you to infuse my fight with a grassroots donation to help defend our elections. [**Can I count on your help before my January 31st deadline?**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=f9c1e8d5ff&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**YES, DEFEND OUR ELECTION: $100 >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=588092a65f&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**YES, DEFEND OUR ELECTION: $75 >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a155492cfb&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**YES, DEFEND OUR ELECTION: $50 >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=da3d08ff00&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**YES, DEFEND OUR ELECTION: $25 >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d5b060d867&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Want to hear a crazy story? **I’m not your run-of-the-mill Republican.** I’m a true patriot and a conservative with a proven record of fighting for the American people.
**My election in 2020 was a bitter FIGHT.** At midnight on election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by **NEARLY 30,000 VOTES!**
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=f59d4cbbc0&e=fdefed58de)
---
Over the next **_90 DAYS_ ,** we fought against a team of lawyers who pulled out every shady tactic in the book to push my opponent ahead. After every ballot was scrutinized and legal vote counted, **I was declared the winner by a slim** _**109**_**votes!**
From that moment on, I knew I needed to lead the election integrity effort. **_And that’s why I founded and lead the Election Integrity Caucus in Congress._**
---
[**RUSH IN → DEFEND ELECTION INTEGRITY**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d5cceffc6d&e=fdefed58de)
---
_But my fight didn’t stop there._ At the same, I was SPEARHEADING an effort to overturn the unconstitutional concealed carry laws that plagued states like mine. **And I won.**
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=81fd0371e1&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**RUSH IN → DEFEND THE 2ND AMENDMENT**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=4e692f0f56&e=fdefed58de)
---
There are too many Republicans who talk a good game but never actually fight for YOU. [**Friend, will you help me continue racking up conservative wins for YOU by chipping in a generous donation in the NEXT HOUR?**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c087da719f&e=fdefed58de)
---
Thank you, Claudia Tenney

So if you haven't yet, [**please pitch in a quick donation.**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=42c020c2f0&e=fdefed58de)
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d40d88d561&e=fdefed58de)
Our last election came down to the wire – **we only won by 546 votes.**

We can’t risk losing another seat to Hakeem Jeffries and the radicals.

The **stakes couldn't be higher** for our country -- please help us stay ahead by [chipping in before midnight tonight.](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=f51e88602b&e=fdefed58de)

God Bless,
Lauren Boebert

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
February 1, 2022

Press Contact:
Jody Pyles
jody@chaseforva.com
804 912 6007

Scheduling Press Interview:
Debbie Gwynn
debbie@chaseforva.com
804 393 2715

SR87 Life Begins at Conception Act
to be Presented this Friday by
Senator Amanda Chase

This Act Recognizes that the Right to Life Begins at Conception

CHESTERFIELD, VA - Friday, February 3, Senator Amanda Chase will present SR87, otherwise known as the Life Begins at Conception Act, to recognize the science, that life begins at conception.

The American College of Pediatrics in March 2017 clearly defined the science; life begins at conception or fertilization:

"The predominance of human biological research confirms that human life begins at conception--fertilization.

At fertilization, the human being emerges as a whole, genetically distinct, individuated zygotic living human organism, a member of the species Homo sapiens, needing only the proper environment in order to grow and develop.

The difference between the individual in its adult stage and in its zygotic stage is one of form, not nature. This statement focuses on the scientific evidence of when an individual human life begins."

"Regardless of an individual's political, ideological or religious belief, the science clearly states that life begins at conception or the moment of fertilization."

"While we may share passionate differences in opinion on whether a mother can abort innocent life and when, the fact still remains; life begins at fertilization."

"If we're going to advocate supporting the science, then we must recognize this simple fact before any other debate can begin." Senator Amanda Chase

Senator Amanda Chase will present SR87 The Life Begins at Conception Act before the Senate Rules Committee in Room 3 at 10am at the Capitol in Senate Room 3, this coming Friday, February 3 .
###

While the Biden administration and Democrats insist these seriously scary economic downturns are nothing but hiccups they can finger-point elsewhere, the American people aren’t stupid. They know who is in charge and who is causing an inflation crisis that is devouring their paychecks and making it increasingly difficult for them to make ends meet. body:
Here’s the invitation
#

Peter -
Kyrsten Sinema says we all need a break after a tough election — one in which she didn’t do much to help any Arizona candidates.
But when it comes to her own big-money fundraising, there’s no break. It’s all gas... no brakes.
Here’s an invite for her event happening later tonight in Washington, D.C., of course.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb23.mRGPOt&refcode=em230201-1-7&t=1&akid=328%2E734936%2EIrwkF6)
Kyrsten Sinema hasn’t held a town-hall in years. But for $5,800 bucks... you can have 45 minutes with her.
We hadn’t planned on sending a fundraising email today, but we’re hoping to counteract some of the big money Senator Sinema will be raising tonight. So please:

Senator Sinema may accept huge checks, but we’re hoping for lots and lots of donations to catch up.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb23.mRGPOt&refcode=em230201-1-7&t=2&akid=328%2E734936%2EIrwkF6)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zotpirdee9870m862lqpgt4tts9e4h25m5pv2n3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ge4or0c3h2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn98mpem1f7g7rea2ev363c1rtd62s1blvt869n0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ge4or0c3h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhtqliq5c1btljubsv3ni5l1va92t1r1m26dun4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ge4or0c3h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
