name: Chuck Schumer
subject: I have a favor to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Friend -- I need to ask you for a favor.

Democrats from all across this nation came together to defend our Senate majority and stop the self-appointed "Grim Reaper" of legislation, Mitch McConnell, from taking control. This is a historic accomplishment, and one we should be immensely proud of.

Because of the efforts of grassroots Democrats like you, I am now serving another two years as Majority Leader of the Senate. I understand how immense this responsibility is, and I do not take it lightly. That's why I'm hard at work laying out our plans for how best to pass President Biden’s agenda and prevent GOP obstruction.

But our Senate majority is perilously thin, friend. **And that brings me to the favor I need to ask: I need to get a sense of what _your_ priorities are now that Congress is officially back open for business, so we can make the early investments needed to protect our majority.**

**I'd like to hear from you today, if possible (we're going through the responses tomorrow):[Will you take this exclusive survey and let me know what you want your Democratic leadership to prioritize in the next campaign?](https://go.dscc.org/go/11799?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230201-ChuckSchumer-PrioritiesSurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230201-ChuckSchumer-PrioritiesSurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9605%2E9716520%2EGrMqSK)**

| | [Start Your Survey](https://go.dscc.org/go/11799?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230201-ChuckSchumer-PrioritiesSurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230201-ChuckSchumer-PrioritiesSurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9605%2E9716520%2EGrMqSK)
---

In this beautiful, resilient democracy, we're all in this together. I don't trust anyone more than the people I serve. Thank you for doing your part.

Chuck Schumer
Senate Majority Leader

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/11799?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230201-ChuckSchumer-PrioritiesSurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230201-ChuckSchumer-PrioritiesSurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9605%2E9716520%2EGrMqSK)
| |
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2023-q1?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=9605_9716520_GrMqSK&akid=9605%2E9716520%2EGrMqSK)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=9605%2E9716520%2EGrMqSK)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9605%2E9716520%2EGrMqSK)** to unsubscribe.

Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: UPDATED: Appellate Court Affirms DeVore’s Equal Protection Argument, Assault Weapons Ban TRO
body:
We appreciate there is fierce pushback on this issue, because many have a vested interest in protecting Pritzker's Assault Weapons Ban.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/d42ed9f03fbc/updatedappellate-court-affirms-devores-equal-protection-argument-assault-weapons-ban-tro?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b6f62084d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_01_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b6f62084d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Appellate Court Affirms DeVore’s Equal Protection Argument, Assault Weapons Ban Temporary Restraining Order, Binds Courts Statewide (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-appellate-court-affirms-devores-equal-protection-argument-assault-weapons-ban-temporary-restraining-order-effective-statewide.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b6f62084d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_01_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b6f62084d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

UPDATE: Feb. 1, 2023, 8:40 am

Illinois Review originally ran this article (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-appellate-court-affirms-devores-equal-protection-argument-assault-weapons-ban-temporary-restraining-order-effective-statewide.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b6f62084d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_01_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b6f62084d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) with a headline stating that the Appellate Court’s mandate was effective statewide. We immediately revised the headline to clarify our position on the state of the law, which is that the mandate is binding on trial courts throughout Illinois on the Equal Protection issue for which the Temporary Restraining Order was entered by the Effingham County judge (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-judge-rules-in-favor-of-former-ag-candidate-tom-devore-and-over-860-plaintiffs-halts-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b6f62084d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_01_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b6f62084d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) and now affirmed by the Appellate Court, 5th District. This is a position shared by former Republican AG candidate Thomas DeVore (https://youtu.be/te42EgPhX4w?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b6f62084d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_01_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b6f62084d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , who filed the lawsuit. As we have reported, DeVore recently
filed a second case in White County (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-attorney-tom-devore-darren-bailey-file-another-lawsuit-after-an-effingham-judge-issues-a-temporary-restraining-order-pausing-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b6f62084d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_01_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b6f62084d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , and our position shared by DeVore is that the Appellate Court’s mandate directs the White County judge to enter a TRO on the basis that Pritzker’s Assault Weapons Ban violates the Equal Protection Clause of the Illinois Constitution. DeVore is now preparing a third lawsuit (https://devorelawoffices.com/illinois-assault-weapons-ban-case-3/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b6f62084d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_01_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b6f62084d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to be filed on the same grounds.

We appreciate that there is a lot of pushback on this issue, because many in the media have a vested interest in protecting Gov. Pritzker and the Democrats who hastily pushed the Assault Weapons Ban through the General Assembly. We also appreciate that there are various other pending lawsuits challenging the Assault Weapons Ban based on grounds other than violation of the Equal Protection Clause. No TROs have been entered in any of those lawsuits.

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-appellate-court-affirms-devores-equal-protection-argument-assault-weapons-ban-temporary-restraining-order-effective-statewide.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b6f62084d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_01_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b6f62084d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In a serious blow to Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker’s assault weapons ban, the 5th District Appellate Court affirmed on Tuesday Effingham County’s ** Temporary Restraining Order (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-judge-rules-in-favor-of-former-ag-candidate-tom-devore-and-over-860-plaintiffs-halts-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b6f62084d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_01_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b6f62084d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
(TRO), and goes beyond the original 866 plaintiffs in the original lawsuit, and is now binding against all courts statewide.

The lawsuit is based on alleged violations of the Illinois Constitution. One alleged violation is the Equal Protection Clause, because the Assault Weapons Ban provides exemptions for certain groups – for instance, active and retired law enforcement are exempted from the ban, as well as active military and private security guards.

Retired military, however, much like the general population, are not exempted from the ban. DeVore argues that these exemptions create unconstitutional classes of citizens where legislators have decided who is subject to the ban and who is not.

The Equal Protection argument was enough for the Appellate Court to affirm Effingham County Judge Joshua Morrison’s TRO.
** (https://drive.google.com/file/d/1OPDSbUjS4XMgGvfuNIc61KMuLJqa2cPn/view?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b6f62084d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_01_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b6f62084d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Last ** Wednesday (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-white-county-judge-hears-devores-arguments-during-hearing-on-assault-weapons-ban-no-ruling-yet.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b6f62084d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_01_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b6f62084d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, White County Judge T. Scott Webb heard arguments from representatives of Attorney General Kwame Raoul’s office, and from Tom DeVore, who is representing over 1,600 plaintiffs, including former Illinois State Senator and Republican nominee for governor ** Darren Bailey (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-attorney-tom-devore-darren-bailey-file-another-lawsuit-after-an-effingham-judge-issues-a-temporary-restraining-order-pausing-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b6f62084d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_01_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b6f62084d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
; 68 federal firearms dealers and 92 counties, saying the case is “under advisement” and that he would issue a ruling after further review.

However, this Appellate Court ruling will also bind Judge Webb, and will force him to issue a TRO.

A link to the mandate can be accessed
** here (https://drive.google.com/file/d/1OPDSbUjS4XMgGvfuNIc61KMuLJqa2cPn/view?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b6f62084d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_01_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b6f62084d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

Please continue to follow Illinois Review and
** DeVore Law Offices (https://devorelawoffices.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b6f62084d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_01_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b6f62084d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
for more updates as they become available.

** (https://youtu.be/r1BST11qzl8?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b6f62084d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_01_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b6f62084d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas and Publisher Scott Kaspar discuss Tom DeVore's lawsuit against Pritzker's Assault Weapons Ban and the ingenious Equal Protection claim the DeVore brought, on "Mark My Words with Mark Vargas," on AM 560 The Answer (Jan. 23, 2023).

To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b6f62084d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_01_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b6f62084d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b6f62084d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_01_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b6f62084d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b6f62084d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_01_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b6f62084d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Website (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b6f62084d8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_01_03_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b6f62084d8-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Email (mailto:articles@illinoisreview.com)
ILLINOIS REVIEW
Mark A. Vargas, Editor-in-Chief
Scott R. Kaspar, Publisher

Our mailing address is:
P.O. Box 2783, Orland Park, IL 60462

or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=b6f62084d8)

DEFENDER: Peter CONTRIBUTION STATUS: PENDING DEADLINE: IMMEDIATELY Contributions made to the Second Amendment Foundation are tax-deductible **************************************************************************************************************************************************************** ******************************************************************************************************************************************************** ******************************************************************************************************************************************************** ******************************************************************************************************************************************************** ******************************************************************************************************************************************************** If California's discriminatory law is allowed to stand, it will serve as a blueprint for other gun-grabbing states to subvert the Constitution. With your support, we'll continue to fight legal battles both in California and across the nation. Peter, can you step up and stand with our Foundation TODAY? subject: You’re invited to my special announcement on Feb. 15
body:
Please let me know if you’ll be able to attend.

| | | Friend,
---
I’ve been asked many times about my plans for the future. Now, I have an answer for you.
On February 15, I’m making a **special announcement** in Charleston, SC, and I want you to be there when I make it. [**RSVP today to join me at my special announcement.**](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=463c5b6f4b4a47b496da444dab5d8f03&_e=EmgEdV-B8D9XgD68_qQvSAPacLjgaVhpujk0FlWQywjc1xMn2DkkCfwbhi_gBCMvWJCDDkj9bVqVJqz526NqZW4lf6_-INa6JuFmYCv39d1VKYor0qXavqkPSo6yh08uk3DCYwg3nn4Q_wocsOWdmrmnUicQGv-8HNZmoopQR8k_seZFFBW7f0sgra6gRdlwirJPSQatJ9iYSrgdSwjGbWjl5OY5ubWO2O1WrfZ6y63ITG2gJ4UO-ThZ_poZTz7Yg2CUWY-xAEL7m6D2VUL1UbAstuiWvOcSMmRLpqBMCozClViyzrgrwvBLm-aGJZ5fHZzj-agbRW8bKdpl10WW0w%3D%3D)

---
Americans like you have been by my side every step of the way—from my first run for the South Carolina legislature to my time at the United Nations and everything else. I would be honored to know you’re with me on the road ahead as I make my special announcement. ** ****[Please let me know if you’ll be able to attend by submitting your RSVP here.](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=463c5b6f4b4a47b496da444dab5d8f03&_e=EmgEdV-B8D9XgD68_qQvSAPacLjgaVhpujk0FlWQywjc1xMn2DkkCfwbhi_gBCMvWJCDDkj9bVqVJqz526NqZW4lf6_-INa6JuFmYCv39d1VKYor0qXavqkPSo6yh08uk3DCYwg3nn4Q_wocsOWdmrmnUicQGv-8HNZmoopQR8k_seZFFBW7f0sgra6gRdlwGVM00-aOuU5nfNr2M-UyBj9ZvJbJ6zS2Xaz1G69zhQbFrYuEXfhMi5aZp52idfqRfiuvJ2mh4Sk4u8Zse8FIuQdj44BcYCNddY-xrieAzMjezvenkIOB5ZkFr0efL3oAUhaUe2t98GGn9yfXyuy7wQ%3D%3D) **** ** The future of our country matters, and it’s up to us to fight for it. I hope you’ll join me on this historic day for my special announcement.** ** My very best,**
**

clean_body: Please let me know if you’ll be able to attend. | | | Friend, I’ve been asked many times about my plans for the future. Now, I have an answer for you. On February 15, I’m making a special announcement in Charleston, SC, and I want you to be there when I make it. Americans like you have been by my side every step of the way—from my first run for the South Carolina legislature to my time at the United Nations and everything else. I would be honored to know you’re with me on the road ahead as I make my special announcement. The future of our country matters, and it’s up to us to fight for it. I hope you’ll join me on this historic day for my special announcement. My very best, Nikki Haley | | | Copyright © 2023 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. www.standforamericapac.com Contributions are not tax-deductible. name: Arizona Democrats
subject: Why Black History Month is still important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | We can’t let others whitewash history | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xTerfBqG0VHddyZFF79qWDL3jfMMv7xurqr8stBPvg3nRS6Lr_J7wtGuYRJ09HI1bQOPUDnZPp2Bl5SToKEWlWXqbz2Lf22lVGf8arNENQqLnpnSjZDs0NxqM5hrLzp8srkpq6hWseE4m3YCoJPjr2y2rMTHs7oFRErmKNpg_upexbCsPXAgdveO_3bbq5ryOa0yd-Qf-efORjlZTkUDT-c8NOrh0UJsb2i8LHbeEnb7llsV_IKHtvcPj2WFIEzJi5A9syKvvKtuA0wDmRUNJkelQKQWo5NBfU7DMcoiige4IWSp2xtTBb2mwHf2LQwVS4O9WTeknPVL-yituEqPSOKUD4Sm_MNZ717M6ZZsCU1xmOHvwDFbabujsBtjNw33oKWHlc54XLK1fBS8znvBL5wweNDWo3WfNvjGJhy8MNmA/3tc/JrCQhV1LRhWNXOTvkeusyA/h0/FHC_lDfT1ib4hdmyZN4CJy0DwKX-IblWtj2TeTDqCIw)
---
| Team,

It’s the first day of Black History Month, the time our nation sets aside to focus on Black history, Black leaders, and those in the Black community who continue to make history today.

We hope you take time this month to educate yourself on the history of Arizona’s Black leaders and community. We hope you also take time this month to join us in pushing back against the whitewashing of Black history that is currently surging through the GOP.

The GOP launched baseless attacks on Critical Race Theory – a college-level theory that has never been taught in K-12 schools – to cover up attacks on teaching about Black history and race. And it’s already becoming a reality – we’ve seen a literal rejection of Black history and studies in Florida.

**It’s clear we must continue to teach, learn and promote Black history this month and beyond.**

Here in Arizona, we promise to fight back against these baseless, pointed attacks and continue to work to build an Arizona for everyone. We hope you join us in these efforts and for the progress we still need to make to achieve that goal.

-Arizona Democrats

---

name: Del. Jazz Lewis
subject: Jazz with Jazz: February Newsletter
body:
Folks,

Forget what social media says, our January wasn’t a trial run. We jumped straight into the new year with a new leadership role, an ambitious legislative agenda, and for the first time in my tenure in Annapolis an ally as the Governor. I am really excited to see what 2023 will bring for our community.

As we mark the first day of Black History month, it gives us a moment to recognize the progress we’ve made to make our state more equitable for all Marylanders. But it is hard to celebrate when as a nation we are mourning the loss of Tyre Nichols in another brutal police involved killing. Know that we will continue to fight for greater accountability and transparency in policing.

We have a few highlights below of what we’ve been up to the last few weeks and look forward to what we can accomplish as we move through this session.

In solidarity,

Jazz

Legislative Priorities

Each year, we only get 90 days to hear and pass legislation in our General Assembly. Every moment matters. That’s why we jumped straight in and introduced five pieces of legislation on the first day of session that would bring tax cuts to middle class families, make our classroom sizes smaller, and promote more transit focused housing just to name a few.

We haven’t stopped there, we introduced two more bills just last week to scale the use of body-worn cameras across the state so that every law enforcement officer is able to have these critical tools as well as another bill to promote equity when we plan our state's transportation system moving forward.

People Power:

As you know, I cut my teeth in politics as a community organizer and I take pride in bringing people together. I have also been a vocal advocate for decreasing the density of liquor stores in our community.

Recently, there’s been a request to transfer a liquor license in an existing high density community in our district and me and my colleagues in District 24 are taking a stand. So I hope that you’ll join us in telling the Prince George County Liquor Board to deny this transfer.

Sign the Petition » https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSezudLku6CKaRaY-aiPvyr1_oY62M0j9kJ2vVY6vMQhrcQCmA/viewform?usp=sf_link

Teletown Hall:

Thank you to those who joined us last week for our legislative teletown hall. It was great to share with you a quick update from Annapolis on our legislative priorities this session and also hear from you about the issues you about the most from Blue Line Corridor development and middle class tax cuts.

If you weren’t able to join us, you can listen to the conversation on Facebook.

Watch Now » [https://www.facebook.com/VoteJazzLewis/videos/570516874958087]

As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.

by authority Friends of Jazz Lewis, Chris Taitt, Treasurer

Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/hz01xPWa8U6TZN4BL8L0dg2?unsubscribedata=K%2FDCNlfNaD%2B33x%2BzkEY%2FEIluejmzMQwYn9GmZV5KOtd99AujCthhosZsxiClWIGB98YuYkfz1FHesoZitSqLMpUBRS7M6KXlmVhJuWR4rlf7ejPd7g%2FR60Mjfsousc9ftoNeso1BaeRnqZ52DugFMCzVhWfnb6KosRJokmjSvfGarx9290T%2FkcwxA%2FcUMpX5d8HtyvK3XFWeXldh3l4YDswNdUl5i3OAi3NN2xZz%2BStZYCt1aRx1RxDODr3Vzl26xOx3ZRyatEfaRyfL8e0ijyeyo233wyql8jBDOnkzNV72cPuOxsmQx6wubgDXa3SsD1IG1es1fDZW76vxgFcnTnyNk2cc0zf5G2yFyTDpxmHVgyrLJg%2BngwWvPJyZyZfi9Z8p6bRQ%2BF%2BxPW1RV60lQmAFEmihaY7xsA106rzwXPFQbRH7nWGxbuWGSxLv4ayt .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tyler=20B.=20Jones?=
subject: Under the Dome - Your Update from the Legislature
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132788?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**Yesterday was the first deadline day in the Mississippi Legislature. For any general bill to potentially become law, it had to pass out of its original chamber's committee, or else it died!**

**The great news is that some of our bills made it!**
---
|
---
|
---
| **_A bill to combat ESG in Mississippi PERS_**

In an effort to maximize returns to our state's public servants, MCPP created a coalition amongst the Mississippi Bankers Association, the State Treasurer's Office, the State Attorney General's Office and ourselves to clarify the fiduciary duty of the Mississippi Public Employees' Retirement System Board.

**SB 2849 from Sen. Chad McMahan ensures the board invests the state's pension funds in a manner that prioritizes the safety and highest return on investment rather than on environmental, social and governance causes.** This bill has passed out of the Senate Finance committee and is on the calendar to be discussed on the Senate floor.

**_Municipal Recall_**

**HB 370 from Rep. Shanda Yates would give local residents the power to remove locally elected officials when they fail.** Too many mayors in our state are not effectively accountable outside of election time, and we feel this bill would allow citizens to take a stand against neglectful politicians.

This bill was discussed a few weeks ago on the House floor but has since been subject to call.

_**Deficit Reporting Bill**_

**SB 2053 from Sen. John Polk ensures that state agencies better manage their budgets. A new requirement to report deficits in a timely manner would enable our state officials to operate their overall budget in a more financially responsible and accountable way. **

This bill passed out of committee and will head to the Senate Floor.
---
|
---
| Several other bills made it out of committees in both chambers over the past week that we feel represent positive, conservative change in Mississippi.

**_HB 1317_ from Rep. Lee Yancey authorizes pharmacists to test or screen for and administer treatment for minor, non-chronic health conditions. **This would reduce delays and costs for patients.

**_HB 1150_ from Rep. Randy Boyd authorizes state institutions of higher learning and community and junior colleges to authorize charter schools. **This would allow more charter schools to open, progressing educational prosperity for children of our state.

**_HB 1045_ from Rep. Jill Ford provides that library books and collections aimed at children and teenagers shall not be allowed to include sexual or explicit materials. **

**_SB 2338_ from Sen. Joel Carter ensures just, reasonable and transparent billing in municipal waterworks.** This legislation bases water bills on usage rather than property value.

**_SB 2054_ from Sen. Kevin Blackwell provides for the removal of appointed state officers for certain forms of willful neglect.** If the Governor, State Auditor, House of Representatives or Senate feels an appointed member of a state board or agency has not properly fulfilled their administrative duty, they can file a complaint of neglect.

**_HB 729_ from Rep. Kent McCarty establishes The "Mississippi Successful Techniques Resulting In Delivering Excellence In Education And Employability (STRIDE) Scholarship Program."** This bill would make scholarships available to students who become eligible to participate in dual-enrollment courses.

I hope you have a great rest of your week!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2d4a92c6c3&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

---
| _PS you can stay up to date with every bill introduced during the session through the [2023 Legislative Tracker](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=6f38c79468&e=5703353baa) found on our website. _
---
|
---
| | _ _

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=4c5b1b022b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=4c5b1b022b).

| | | We’re only one month into 2023, and already there have been more mass shootings in this country than days this year. Gun violence is an epidemic and we must demand action from our leaders to stop the slaughter. [**One meaningful way to tackle this crisis is with an assault weapons ban.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf10925ba-baac-4037-8428-6d82a4b9e9d9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)The tragic shootings in recent years in Uvalde, Parkland, Las Vegas, San Bernardino, Sandy Hook, and so many more were carried out with an AR-15, a weapon designed to kill many people quickly. These assault weapons are tearing our country apart and don’t belong on our streets – there is no reason for any civilian to have a weapon of war in their possession. An assault weapons ban has been introduced in the Senate and we need Congress to pass it immediately and send it to President Biden’s desk. Enough is enough. **[Sign your name now: Demand Congress ban assault weapons>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc6a24ee6-faff-43a8-a272-d6249260319e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

name: VADEMS
subject: Happy Black History Month Virginia!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Hello Derek!

Happy Black History Month!

During Black History Month, we are reminded of the sacrifices made and victories won by Black Virginians that have made this Commonwealth what it is today.

The Democratic Party of Virginia has always committed itself to electing candidates that believe in the inviolable dignity of Black communities and work to empower those communities every day.

We will also continue to push for criminal justice reform, better schools and public education in Virginia’s predominantly Black and Brown neighborhoods and school districts, bring high quality and good paying jobs to regions that need it most, and continue to be an inclusive party that reflects the values of our voters.

Our Democrats in Congress and the General Assembly are working tirelessly to pass progressive policy reforms, and block policies that negatively impact Black Virginians.

From the decriminalization of marijuana, to abolishing the death penalty, to passing criminal justice reforms , Virginia Democrats have worked to remove racist Jim Crow-era policies and laws from the books. But we have so much farther to go.

It is crucial to elect candidates that recognize the need for change and are eager to do the work. Voting serves as one of the most impactful forms of advocacy.

Will you commit to voting for Democrats in this next election?

Yours in service,
Virginia Democrats

Now, we’re starting February even _further_ behind.

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Putting them on trial
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4i8quq84mvijdiqdk3gg3on003l4ibsot4hok4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie8o30c1h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9uk18oacbps3lt3j6cia4bqvdaaia7k93b5q3uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie8o30c1h2bs)

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrprfs7la91r7cfjqe57k9p7fl9681rrag5cpev8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie8o30c1h2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6l0ts7ep29itlllhla0l43234ria570m3e3ndag_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie8o30c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmhu7ej4v883ren9p8mpjov5lpd8ifs4k8ke7fmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie8o30c1h2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj9ej0lne28g2l6onb4qgsa2lmd6rbcq4dbanbuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie8o30c1h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh4kr3gu2kncdsupuc08teoa29f4do0u4nmh0ni8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie8o30c1h2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z54pu9t6vs5klfplfkqqiefo0qsgvqn8kjbc3p08_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie8o30c1h2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: Disabled U.S. Marine, crew chief for Presidents, thrown in prison
body:
His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine O
His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents. | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zudsa0mno1per32t3gbcfgkc3lcoo2989i8b3j50_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie0ob0shh2bs)
|
---

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfggka68l21f27cbrmlhhqhbiae97ikb7bibvt80_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie0ob0shh2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1ej5meb9hglp7412uses7itvu0jo92ph9qrlvgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie0ob0shh2bs)

His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents.

You've seen Marine One on TV countless times, I'm sure.

If you saw Marine One picking up or dropping off President George W. Bush, you may have seen John hard at work.

**But John, now an honorably discharged and disabled U.S. Marine, is going to federal prison for one year.**

Did John attack the U.S. Capitol Police on January 6, 2021? No.

Did he lash out violently or endanger anyone? No.

Did he break or destroy anything? No.

_Even liberal CNN admits he wasn 't charged with any violent crimes!_

John entered the Capitol Building through a window broken by someone else. He walked into the Capitol Building and into the chamber of the House of Representatives...that's it.

His alleged crime is called "obstruction of an official proceeding."

But as you recall, Antifa members rioted and committed violent assaults...Black Lives Matter members rioted, burned buildings to the ground, and terrorized whole cities...but they didn't even get arrested!

It sickens me that an honorable man like John Andries, who also suffers from multiple sclerosis, is doing hard time.

John could get beaten, extorted, abused, and even killed behind bars.

In America! IN OUR COUNTRY!

That's why I ask you to stand with me before it's too late.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Dear Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdtsnuob4226mg6v5emdh3kn5hbefk0ghpp3k040_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie0ob0shh2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

**So please give what you can right away.**[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z29k343djnp0g9h9j8j2if090gj24g4i7vvhlrgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie0ob0shh2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Dear Patriot, you and I know deranged Joe Biden and his out-of-control FBI and DOJ are committing terrible crimes against the January 6 Peaceful Protesters. [**But you can help me fight back for them peacefully and legally with your best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or more.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh13b2m0dc3mv641l2g3jffocvdu4993mu630ou8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie0ob0shh2bs)

name: Replace Sinema
subject: NEW POLLING: Sinema can’t win but she can hurt Ruben
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter, Today, the Replace Sinema PAC shared new polling on the 2024 Arizona Senate race. We polled a group of likely 2024 Arizona voters to see what chances, if any, Sinema stands for reelection in next year's Senate race. And, spoiler alert: it’s not looking good for Kyrsten Sinema. Take a look: [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcXkP9Dv1aj5xKuS5mz4fBFgDWtlSEVkMGt_hLg9T0UfNg2FvweqMl7myZprX3dY1kznS1DXv0kQgVaaFKD210O1G34heyQ8__NAPdizqhdBzy65sFmjPZLn83lTq8jbs7GzTDk3SfBBF2dk3VmmBGI0128GEHS8lvAHIuQbHdK9_slg-kHJI0TUw6ASf09Vl11Pl0hmnnDK91TsGKFz0qNaMIiRzqCt3opgkAWhakQW33iaDcPc3X3L_MQqml5IY-PLvqYDcCSwH35Cl-AUD0KYNKAvjLJgqrjQxw-DmhqlpW_5HP0rO_v7lxCfrxnX2KudgPdKYOK1l9kSy2d3KRDQ/3tc/rcAmpYivTJC62MuwsnpPzA/h0/7UevWD5At-80rkjARsQF51wOEvKfEiGEqmyCXuJZTj8)
Sinema sold out Arizona, and if there’s one thing everyone can agree on: no one likes a sellout. [**Help us spread the message that Sinema sold out Arizonans to pad her campaign account, chip in now >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcXkP9Dv1aj5xKuS5mz4fBFgnkac5LDNhVzRVsSftxmh5hB40mX7fBi_BrbZkbSXp_zOKyzqAU1TDWWukm7E4ZowMc_VIvRIx9S1wNf-qGKq3a29jEgyfxrOUE87XFBw8_u0kc9EoLP8yuoY9JNWltRVi8rwcZlSE9-RRz_WKZrCrb2j3uW2RUfzVl6NGcOtvgTFwYPr-QYlN5SEVLlICQ6oyGa-K5M787w4zD9AgkceqTuJO0IzgCKipaCOY89koYhMoqtgwymggj771K4yM-6IZ3hNnH4wtISJJrCiB9HKgRDheZuNB0lELUpD1j7VA4H2C-dLNy3pxrj8cUNwZMfg/3tc/rcAmpYivTJC62MuwsnpPzA/h1/n9X3fkLWm8Q3i2GPAJZ1bLsmf4J9aZN7ZBNuaNirUCQ) A few more things we learned: ✅Ruben Gallego is the frontrunner in the Arizona Senate race ✅Sinema is deeply unpopular, Gallego is popular ✅The more people know about Sinema’s Wall Street and Big Pharma ties, the more of the vote she loses Sinema is so deeply unpopular she stands little to no chance of winning, but she’s also acting as a spoiler by pulling voters from Gallego in a three-way race. That’s why we’re going to do everything we can to make sure Gallego, or whoever ends up the Democratic nominee, has all the resources they need to beat her in a three-way race. The more voters who understand that Kyrsten Sinema works for Wall Street and Big Pharma, the fewer votes she can take away from the Democrat. That’s why we’re going to be working every day now until the Election to educate voters about Sinema’s record. clean_body: | | Peter, Today, the Replace Sinema PAC shared new polling on the 2024 Arizona Senate race. We polled a group of likely 2024 Arizona voters to see what chances, if any, Sinema stands for reelection in next year's Senate race. And, spoiler alert: it’s not looking good for Kyrsten Sinema. Take a look: Sinema sold out Arizona, and if there’s one thing everyone can agree on: no one likes a sellout. A few more things we learned: ✅Ruben Gallego is the frontrunner in the Arizona Senate race ✅Sinema is deeply unpopular, Gallego is popular ✅The more people know about Sinema’s Wall Street and Big Pharma ties, the more of the vote she loses Sinema is so deeply unpopular she stands little to no chance of winning, but she’s also acting as a spoiler by pulling voters from Gallego in a three-way race. That’s why we’re going to do everything we can to make sure Gallego, or whoever ends up the Democratic nominee, has all the resources they need to beat her in a three-way race. The more voters who understand that Kyrsten Sinema works for Wall Street and Big Pharma, the fewer votes she can take away from the Democrat. That’s why we’re going to be working every day now until the Election to educate voters about Sinema’s record. Your contribution helps us conduct polls like this and more importantly, it helps us spread the message about Sinema’s corruption to the voters who need to hear it. That’s the only way we can make sure that Arizonans get the leadership they deserve. name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: Disabled U.S. Marine, crew chief for Presidents, thrown in prison
body:
His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine On
His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents. | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkkkqtp9v94p59m8jlp5rlbs9tcj3qrtkalhuqpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie8pb0c3h2bs)
|
---

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo07cqes0qbaa4hu898fv0b9tc620619r1ldm72o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie8pb0c3h2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlfnra5c5k0btmr3cmsn7ape7o6vu12v12mfrf7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie8pb0c3h2bs)

His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents.

You’ve seen Marine One on TV countless times, I’m sure.

If you saw Marine One picking up or dropping off President George W. Bush, you may have seen John hard at work.

**But John, now an honorably discharged and disabled U.S. Marine, is going to federal prison for one year.**

Did John attack the U.S. Capitol Police on January 6, 2021? No.

Did he lash out violently or endanger anyone? No.

Did he break or destroy anything? No.

_Even liberal CNN admits he wasn’t charged with any violent crimes!_

John entered the Capitol Building through a window broken by someone else. He walked into the Capitol Building and into the chamber of the House of Representatives...that’s it.

His alleged crime is called “obstruction of an official proceeding.”

But as you recall, Antifa members rioted and committed violent assaults...Black Lives Matter members rioted, burned buildings to the ground, and terrorized whole cities...but they didn’t even get arrested!

It sickens me that an honorable man like John Andries, who also suffers from multiple sclerosis, is doing hard time.

John could get beaten, extorted, abused, and even killed behind bars.

In America! IN OUR COUNTRY!

That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Dear Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9kt9i1on2bhtu4igg4rt5gp602tmof0u3o0dl30_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie8pb0c3h2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

**So please give what you can right away.**[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6dhr217kv6isgoa89snapaapueog84nf1s718d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie8pb0c3h2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Dear Patriot, you and I know deranged Joe Biden and his out-of-control FBI and DOJ are committing terrible crimes against the January 6 Peaceful Protesters. [**But you can help me fight back for them peacefully and legally with your best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or more.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuaou3dn07a2okrlbq7gec6s67bpbcn8uggqtaig_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie8pb0c3h2bs)

name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: Update on House Bill 1387
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate
body:
| | |
---
| | **Update on House Bill 1387**
---
| | Friends, Our girls deserve a league of their own, and my legislation to ensure that they have it is moving forward. On Monday, a House subcommittee voted to advance my House Bill 1387, which protects the rights of biological girls and women to compete in their own separate category of sports, both in K-12 sports and collegiate levels. Women and girls have fought for equality in sports for decades. Now, thanks to the hard work of generations, a level playing field is to be the rule, not the exception. Women’s sports must be given the same emphasis as men’s sports. But the trend of biological men identifying as women who then compete against biological women threatens this. Males are, on average, bigger, stronger, and faster than females. From puberty onward, they spend their lives soaked in the natural steroid testosterone. That isn’t politics. It’s biology. As I told the committee, if we allow biological males to compete against biological females, our girls will be at a disadvantage almost every time. What young woman would want to compete if she knew that the best she could ever accomplish was to be the first biological female to finish the race, behind the biological men? My bill creates three divisions in sports: one for biological males, one for biological females, and an ‘open’ division for all comers. Everyone can compete. No one is banned. But our girls get the assurance that they’ll be competing on a level-playing field, and that hard work and determination will make the difference, not the biological gender of their opponents. As the legislative process moves quickly in Richmond, you can easily track the status of all my [legislation here](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/c9878885439d5f06/afe6879039c878c1c3d6b838967d376c/37923). If you are interested in following any other legislation in the General Assembly, visit [www.lis.virginia.gov](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/c9878885439d5f06/da34893a61daa1d6c3d6b838967d376c/37923). If I can be of assistance to you or you would like to share your position on any of my legislation, please do not hesitate to reach out to me at delkgreenhalgh@house.virginia.gov or (804) 698-1085. You can also follow me on Twitter @KGreenhalgh85 or like my [Facebook page](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/c9878885439d5f06/9b2c08757db2f6f7c3d6b838967d376c/37923) to stay up to date on what I’m working on in Richmond.
---
| |
---
| Your Delegate, Karen **Delegate Karen S. Greenhalgh****House of Delegates** 1-804-698-1085 [karengreenhalgh.com](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/c9878885439d5f06/2f852bc0306408e3c3d6b838967d376c/37923 "http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/9206fe5164b4fa85041ad8cde91a9694/37923/c1e1fdff1fcd89fe/178744a2ec7ca92cc3d6b838967d376c/37923")

clean_body: | | | | | Update on House Bill 1387 | | Friends, Our girls deserve a league of their own, and my legislation to ensure that they have it is moving forward. On Monday, a House subcommittee voted to advance my House Bill 1387, which protects the rights of biological girls and women to compete in their own separate category of sports, both in K-12 sports and collegiate levels. Women and girls have fought for equality in sports for decades. Now, thanks to the hard work of generations, a level playing field is to be the rule, not the exception. Women’s sports must be given the same emphasis as men’s sports. But the trend of biological men identifying as women who then compete against biological women threatens this. Males are, on average, bigger, stronger, and faster than females. From puberty onward, they spend their lives soaked in the natural steroid testosterone. That isn’t politics. It’s biology. As I told the committee, if we allow biological males to compete against biological females, our girls will be at a disadvantage almost every time. What young woman would want to compete if she knew that the best she could ever accomplish was to be the first biological female to finish the race, behind the biological men? My bill creates three divisions in sports: one for biological males, one for biological females, and an ‘open’ division for all comers. Everyone can compete. No one is banned. But our girls get the assurance that they’ll be competing on a level-playing field, and that hard work and determination will make the difference, not the biological gender of their opponents. As the legislative process moves quickly in Richmond, you can easily track the status of all my . If you are interested in following any other legislation in the General Assembly, visit . If I can be of assistance to you or you would like to share your position on any of my legislation, please do not hesitate to reach out to me at delkgreenhalgh@house.virginia.gov or (804) 698-1085. You can also follow me on Twitter @KGreenhalgh85 or like my to stay up to date on what I’m working on in Richmond. | | | Your Delegate, Karen Delegate Karen S. GreenhalghHouse of Delegates 1-804-698-1085 "" | | | | | ---|---|--- | Donations can not be accepted | | | Paid for and Authorized by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate

[**Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3qlpj0hbh880mtjleu4rb9t1nkdjnenb5pu98j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie4ob4cth2bs)

His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents.

You’ve seen Marine One on TV countless times, I’m sure.

If you saw Marine One picking up or dropping off President George W. Bush, you may have seen John hard at work.

**But John, now an honorably discharged and disabled U.S. Marine, is going to federal prison for one year.**

Did John attack the U.S. Capitol Police on January 6, 2021? No.

Did he lash out violently or endanger anyone? No.

Did he break or destroy anything? No.

_Even liberal CNN admits he wasn’t charged with any violent crimes!_

John entered the Capitol Building through a window broken by someone else. He walked into the Capitol Building and into the chamber of the House of Representatives...that’s it.

His alleged crime is called “obstruction of an official proceeding.”

But as you recall, Antifa members rioted and committed violent assaults...Black Lives Matter members rioted, burned buildings to the ground, and terrorized whole cities...but they didn’t even get arrested!

It sickens me that an honorable man like John Andries, who also suffers from multiple sclerosis, is doing hard time.

John could get beaten, extorted, abused, and even killed behind bars.

In America! IN OUR COUNTRY!

That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Dear Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zecspjrbs5rq49f15bn9gpo2bh3rghjkhkh1ca30_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie4ob4cth2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

**So please give what you can right away.**[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zq17f980ohd48kcpoqm538eri85nv6gre8utk9ko_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie4ob4cth2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Dear Patriot, you and I know deranged Joe Biden and his out-of-control FBI and DOJ are committing terrible crimes against the January 6 Peaceful Protesters. [**But you can help me fight back for them peacefully and legally with your best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or more.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zeq4kpj99v5g4mfbvm0bqvsg03e7ml59ih30tibg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ie4ob4cth2bs)

name: Charles Harper, Evergreen Action
subject: EPA proposed allowing deadly levels of soot pollution
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
We have to demand better. [SIGN ON]
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-strengthen-soot-standard/?utm_source=ema_2023-02-01_soot_rule_comment_&source=ema_2023-02-01_soot_rule_comment_&t=2&akid=13264%2E53494%2E6Yoqx7) Friend, The science is clear: Soot pollution over a certain level is deadly. **But instead of keeping soot pollution below that level, EPA just proposed a rule that allows polluters to keep pumping out unsafe levels of soot that contribute to tens of thousands of deaths per year.** [_**Our health is on the line. Call on EPA to remedy this rule immediately by signing an official public comment.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-strengthen-soot-standard/?utm_source=ema_2023-02-01_soot_rule_comment_&source=ema_2023-02-01_soot_rule_comment_&t=3&akid=13264%2E53494%2E6Yoqx7) | [SIGN ON](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-strengthen-soot-standard/?utm_source=ema_2023-02-01_soot_rule_comment_&source=ema_2023-02-01_soot_rule_comment_&t=4&akid=13264%2E53494%2E6Yoqx7)
---
Soot pollution increases rates of infant mortality, cardiovascular disease, cognitive impairment, diabetes, and more. And as is all too often the case, these horrible burdens are disproportionately borne by low-income communities and communities of color.
Stronger soot rules will also have the co-benefit of reducing the carbon pollution driving the climate crisis.
**It's so important for EPA to get this rule right—and so outrageous that their proposed soot standards fall short of keeping us safe.**
[_**We're demanding EPA strengthen its soot standard and save lives. Sign an official public comment, and we'll put it in front of EPA decision-makers!**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-strengthen-soot-standard/?utm_source=ema_2023-02-01_soot_rule_comment_&source=ema_2023-02-01_soot_rule_comment_&t=5&akid=13264%2E53494%2E6Yoqx7)
[SIGN ON](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-strengthen-soot-standard/?utm_source=ema_2023-02-01_soot_rule_comment_&source=ema_2023-02-01_soot_rule_comment_&t=6&akid=13264%2E53494%2E6Yoqx7)
---
Onward,
Charles Harper
Power Sector Policy Lead, Evergreen Action
P.S. This is one of the 10 rules we called on EPA to move further, faster on in our EPA report card. With your help, we're going to keep the pressure up and ensure the Biden administration and EPA don't miss this crucial opportunity to protect our climate and defend our communities. [**Take action now.**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/EPA-strengthen-soot-standard/?utm_source=ema_2023-02-01_soot_rule_comment_&source=ema_2023-02-01_soot_rule_comment_&t=7&akid=13264%2E53494%2E6Yoqx7)

His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents.

You’ve seen Marine One on TV countless times, I’m sure.

If you saw Marine One picking up or dropping off President George W. Bush, you may have seen John hard at work.

**But John, now an honorably discharged and disabled U.S. Marine, is going to federal prison for one year.**

Did John attack the U.S. Capitol Police on January 6, 2021? No.

Did he lash out violently or endanger anyone? No.

Did he break or destroy anything? No.

_Even liberal CNN admits he wasn’t charged with any violent crimes!_

John entered the Capitol Building through a window broken by someone else. He walked into the Capitol Building and into the chamber of the House of Representatives...that’s it.

His alleged crime is called “obstruction of an official proceeding.”

But as you recall, Antifa members rioted and committed violent assaults...Black Lives Matter members rioted, burned buildings to the ground, and terrorized whole cities...but they didn’t even get arrested!

It sickens me that an honorable man like John Andries, who also suffers from multiple sclerosis, is doing hard time.

John could get beaten, extorted, abused, and even killed behind bars.

In America! IN OUR COUNTRY!

That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Dear Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658683%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a4ZWcUpZOq%2fhR56bw41%2bFg&sysid=1)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

**So please give what you can right away.**[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658684%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L4EdWRuVfYfai9gPGcjezQ&sysid=1)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Dear Patriot, you and I know deranged Joe Biden and his out-of-control FBI and DOJ are committing terrible crimes against the January 6 Peaceful Protesters. [**But you can help me fight back for them peacefully and legally with your best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or more.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658695%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RvYEmxXq6dPG86QoMCHsvw&sysid=1)

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: February is Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]
Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. believed in a brighter future for our nation, and today we honor his legacy. While time has passed since the tragic death of Dr. King, the lessons he preached continue to resonate throughout our nation to this day. He fought for peace. He fought for justice. He fought for a world where people were not judged by the color of their skin, but for the content of their character.
http://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [http://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]
Dr. King once said, “Give us the ballot, and we will no longer have to worry the federal government about our basic rights.” He knew that voting was a critical part of racial justice, and it is a fight we are still battling to this day. Communities of color across the nation are still having their vote suppressed, whether it be through gerrymandering, restrictive voting regulations, or unclear information about how to participate in our democracy.
Today, on MLK Day, I double down on my commitment to voting rights. In the North Carolina General Assembly, I fought against unfairly drawn district maps. In Congress, I will support nationwide voting reforms to make it easier to vote and give every eligible American the opportunity to have their voice heard.
I encourage you to look back on the inspirational work of Dr. King today and reflect on what we can do throughout our communities to continue strengthening his legacy.
Be well,
Wiley Nickel
Follow Wiley Online:
https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC [https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC] http://twitter.com/wileynickel [http://twitter.com/wileynickel] http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc [http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc]

body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de26c3cfa1e74fd09188b144637b0771&_e=S3LdlHNmis_6lQadyo2vr6Uda1gZErDnCkvWE5XMl6WUeKZyLBHRZr9sxCuOsffJwBIftOfy_uGaJVMZyh1Mt64qeTmvHGNkvAsvRQS1tb1Vee3ODu-d9q0LeDc5j_KPc3dIsdNTQ-Hm_Svhvuf2qINQsevXYykpvUYF4_OSRQUGs4cquc86k9SnSwF8cC-Z3TSdi0cXRptBkS7_DYsjWk9-0Tkwwi_RMfePCPclHKBfdqML_pFcMyWPFZx5p9yf7BNPLtwuLoSe_vWMwSsBehLUNoYOmFr40MRKAtXzLAs6cV1suJaFWqwiLbjuvnnsRrum_br2YuUzjzMxbSrDOLSttjgQXXm9uP8-UMEcXOpOBKIFNnCsX3h2TxE2hAYx-M9Rj90auVHwOBAd2TyTYfsj_lITsG49KArQzJQE2L-4So-XGKT_0SQqNLYkl_GL)

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de26c3cfa1e74fd09188b144637b0771&_e=S3LdlHNmis_6lQadyo2vr6Uda1gZErDnCkvWE5XMl6WUeKZyLBHRZr9sxCuOsffJwBIftOfy_uGaJVMZyh1Mt64qeTmvHGNkvAsvRQS1tb1Vee3ODu-d9q0LeDc5j_KPc3dIsdNTQ-Hm_Svhvuf2qINQsevXYykpvUYF4_OSRQUGs4cquc86k9SnSwF8cC-Z3TSdi0cXRptBkS7_DYsjWk9-0Tkwwi_RMfePCPclHKBfdqML_pFcMyWPFZx5p9yf7BNPLtwuLoSe_vWMwSsBenx6xIsRmdsOqkWilBIfYCp3Kf1wzsx0U1OiJoCTcDYmG5LZtRxo45iIpn4kzwaQ78ETmicrhwilJlFJek7-fhJPCKnBQsn9nQLeEmgQuxq1162bAnpRZr5rLMWJQwQQInjTZyTL7KK2exZVnvMQZ7DNmsfELCcD7QCPf5EZosOY)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de26c3cfa1e74fd09188b144637b0771&_e=S3LdlHNmis_6lQadyo2vr6Uda1gZErDnCkvWE5XMl6WUeKZyLBHRZr9sxCuOsffJwBIftOfy_uGaJVMZyh1Mt64qeTmvHGNkvAsvRQS1tb1Vee3ODu-d9q0LeDc5j_KPc3dIsdNTQ-Hm_Svhvuf2qINQsevXYykpvUYF4_OSRQUGs4cquc86k9SnSwF8cC-Z3TSdi0cXRptBkS7_DYsjWk9-0Tkwwi_RMfePCPclHKBfdqML_pFcMyWPFZx5p9yf7BNPLtwuLoSe_vWMwSsBeroJ5woni41qvOHjZJXkvf63w-sxMFZhZrK1hTEXoLWGuOausCcfz_LDp-jQhFWPPsp9QwQ6QJTxXUFNijcF7wW2nCIPVsBbB78NNcMYuTxa2UNI39B8uTZ5trPmmxtUN0XJd2Uq0gCLd4kdFD2pnolEmVYp7QDZ8elvWeHo8IwM)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=de26c3cfa1e74fd09188b144637b0771&_e=S3LdlHNmis_6lQadyo2vr6Uda1gZErDnCkvWE5XMl6WUeKZyLBHRZr9sxCuOsffJwBIftOfy_uGaJVMZyh1Mt64qeTmvHGNkvAsvRQS1tb1Vee3ODu-d9q0LeDc5j_KPc3dIsdNTQ-Hm_Svhvuf2qINQsevXYykpvUYF4_OSRQUGs4cquc86k9SnSwF8cC-Z3TSdi0cXRptBkS7_DYsjWk9-0Tkwwi_RMfePCPclHKBfdqML_pFcMyWPFZx5p9yf7BNPLtwuLoSe_vWMwSsBertV6T_p-F-G7if4B2V0f4LLKZTlRas1PfeiSWHlaoyKFtGzEnUPVGYcOSr3erpL9DtXgPCO6MkX4IgOfJiqCrWI22YlHx0XcqrlSPn2c0w2dYmdhspC4iTzeuzpCYk_Qu8DQap9s9odeOC857QGYw8T_mcbtr6Ba2ry4Ag1sWwc).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

clean_body: C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: Disabled U.S. Marine, crew chief for Presidents, thrown in prison
body:
His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine On
His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents. | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zakhd9fve1519jsd7fg1urtbcank5n1ot3m2pir8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ieap36cph2bs)
|
---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8o0q48pn9c7211nar570r4k24eui8th42r4b9eg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ieap36cph2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ktuhe9ltc5vuscdn200rh1gg7jpoc2dvba89d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ieap36cph2bs)

His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents.

You’ve seen Marine One on TV countless times, I’m sure.

If you saw Marine One picking up or dropping off President George W. Bush, you may have seen John hard at work.

**But John, now an honorably discharged and disabled U.S. Marine, is going to federal prison for one year.**

Did John attack the U.S. Capitol Police on January 6, 2021? No.

Did he lash out violently or endanger anyone? No.

Did he break or destroy anything? No.

_Even liberal CNN admits he wasn’t charged with any violent crimes!_

John entered the Capitol Building through a window broken by someone else. He walked into the Capitol Building and into the chamber of the House of Representatives...that’s it.

His alleged crime is called “obstruction of an official proceeding.”

But as you recall, Antifa members rioted and committed violent assaults...Black Lives Matter members rioted, burned buildings to the ground, and terrorized whole cities...but they didn’t even get arrested!

It sickens me that an honorable man like John Andries, who also suffers from multiple sclerosis, is doing hard time.

John could get beaten, extorted, abused, and even killed behind bars.

In America! IN OUR COUNTRY!

That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Dear Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3nptebbsgsa27qvhdascuatia6h7pc3h5khtldo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ieap36cph2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

**So please give what you can right away.**[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmj3rv82qhres6t4n86hjkpf550l94tbv0bjqqa8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ieap36cph2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Dear Patriot, you and I know deranged Joe Biden and his out-of-control FBI and DOJ are committing terrible crimes against the January 6 Peaceful Protesters. [**But you can help me fight back for them peacefully and legally with your best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or more.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za0689ftmklujcipd1fkb1vqp8bsc4munusjogeg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9ieap36cph2bs)

name: Full Mag News
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. | | | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0304d499542b4bec80ce2a2f2459b3d7&_e=CEwuzp-rDAif3H50hSLGV-HVljkpzuRvX16933rBwPDwpc90pu3ZNcRslPUrfFI2VVM01DYhH7ofNE4yOdG5vJVdedwsEtBELC0rcNmpo-y34-f2AMhUjN3IyF1YNJIN7AzH5akSZlZlY5lNL4rnGeJD2Mm9qep2gDTEFRPa6DuvwpmJth4e24JbRzfUHn8AeTorwe9nVgSQOVI_59xwczcCgeyhpSpYGMM5SB3-0828ROVYqbXXVIsgE2p3Ihn2sZoTFpTGoTsL-PYFJaTzX-4iobsoMVcfOQb8kW1U2PajlSw6naqsSDkfewfL841981LM7S0FGzNJTTFPYatEakERyg0LoYq6pGNh9mBaHpIl45SKv_rtlNbPXYAleEduta4mLwnU5eYKiDbfC_bQRw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
