clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. | | | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic " Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." Through "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry," you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Sent to Full Mag News subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I’m officially running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| I wanted to share this with you personally:

**I’m running for reelection to continue fighting for you and your family in the U.S. Senate. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign. But first, please let me explain why your support _today_ is so important.**

The truth is that the road to keeping this seat blue isn’t going to be easy. During the 2022 midterms here in New York, Republicans won more races across the state than they have in two decades — enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, they’re using that momentum to target this seat as a pickup opportunity in 2024 so that they can retake the Senate, too.

But I’ve never backed down from a challenge. My very first race for Congress was in a Republican district where people said that there were “more cows than Democrats.” I still ran, and we won. That’s because I had grassroots supporters like you by my side from the very beginning, making the early investments that are key to building a winning campaign.

**So that’s what I’m asking of you today. With so much at stake, I’m counting on you to step up and become a Founding Donor today to help make sure I have the resources it will take to defend New York’s Senate seat and our Democratic majority.**

[_Please, will you split $10 between my campaign and Voter Protection Project to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign to defeat the GOP in New York and defend the Senate for Democrats?_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39710?t=6&akid=6217%2E878179%2E6NIa3r) | [**SPLIT $10 NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39710?t=7&akid=6217%2E878179%2E6NIa3r)
---
I’ve taken on some tough fights in the Senate: Securing health care for the 9/11 first responders. Repealing “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” Making sure Americans got paid family and medical leave during the pandemic.

But there are so many critical fights ahead — for voting rights, for reproductive freedom, for health care, for a _permanent_ paid leave program. And I won’t let up until the fights are won. I promise you that.

**The GOP wants nothing more than to defeat me and halt progress on these critical issues, so I’m counting on your help to make sure we can take them head on and win.** [_Please, will you split $10 between my campaign and Voter Protection Project to defend our Democratic Senate majority and make sure that I can keep fighting for you in the Senate?_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39710?t=8&akid=6217%2E878179%2E6NIa3r)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Kirsten Gillibrand and VPP will go through immediately:
[$10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39711?t=9&akid=6217%2E878179%2E6NIa3r) | [$25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39712?t=10&akid=6217%2E878179%2E6NIa3r)
---|---
[$50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39713?t=11&akid=6217%2E878179%2E6NIa3r) | [$100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39714?t=12&akid=6217%2E878179%2E6NIa3r)
[$250 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39715?t=13&akid=6217%2E878179%2E6NIa3r) | [Custom »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/39716?t=14&akid=6217%2E878179%2E6NIa3r)
Thank you,

Kirsten
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6217%2E878179%2E6NIa3r). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6217%2E878179%2E6NIa3r).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6217%2E878179%2E6NIa3r) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=6217%2E878179%2E6NIa3r). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6217%2E878179%2E6NIa3r)

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5ebbe8773a9b4b31a8dbaec6d6f8655b&_e=gW6f3-k2AWfk7wCxmvWEodmQcQbwAWZ73ijecj6RDZWygenoyF09ItKw61ReES_vr75BTY4c6QZGzjJOWJZ0cDO71w60lseVWN4pKR5dnq69C6JO-r-jYRRMD1rhOS1AoRIgdcnCLCrnGRBAyXbIZ1phamPhgg3oAvOce7h5LnznNYmVLqNsjmJnoUxxCpARIi-FEWSUHRJVashbm3lDwmhYiBclJQte7GtBBXJYLEQM2LiyWHQe0oGtmu6cEMXRFBAEMp2yLARvbxmOQiXSZHUs38hmzP6rbGvq79Y9p9ZUO0sq8wUaSObqmZeHtoLQt0NHc4WkFd22PFFHdq1t5GhddklLJRe_DJmzrW-ZeOXQTs-ofj8QeGxacuQyfqf_Ds6l68OZI6PeWc0q55d1PQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5ebbe8773a9b4b31a8dbaec6d6f8655b&_e=gW6f3-k2AWfk7wCxmvWEodmQcQbwAWZ73ijecj6RDZWygenoyF09ItKw61ReES_vr75BTY4c6QZGzjJOWJZ0cDO71w60lseVWN4pKR5dnq69C6JO-r-jYRRMD1rhOS1AoRIgdcnCLCrnGRBAyXbIZ1phamPhgg3oAvOce7h5LnznNYmVLqNsjmJnoUxxCpARIi-FEWSUHRJVashbm3lDwmhYiBclJQte7GtBBXJYLEQM2LiyWHQe0oGtmu6cEMXRdaFJH-6AE0fdn7P7YhhHTMAkNOVgMtSPGyu1Nt61Oxkg1USa5uzpFjvxUycY3ih1l49DO6d7xNQG1UMMXLZC8cS14-hhf-G49I1zsM74PscMuHCJTqvgQ9v7ws64jeRYhF1-bqDFvLVXu9u-WKx0tQ%3D%3D)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. name: LCV Membership Team
subject: DEADLINE EXTENDED: Still time to join, Peter
body:
__You can still help |
---

| Peter,__

We took a look at the numbers this morning and unfortunately realized we came up **JUST SHORT of our $35,000 goal.** But the campaigns for climate action, clean energy, and environmental justice are too important to give up now.

We received authorization to _**extend our deadline by 24 hours**_ _**,**_ so you still have time to make an enormous impact on our work for the rest of 2023. The January Membership Drive is one of the most important campaigns of the year for LCV -- it's when we bring in the bulk of our funding to keep our work running for the first half of the year.

So %% FIRST NAME%%, don't miss this window. [Become an LCV member for just $5 today. Don't miss this chance to make 3X the impact >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/mkyVH2zZWAC-)

Thanks for being with us,

LCV Membership Team |

* * *

---

|
[MIDNIGHT DEADLINE:
Claim your 3X match by becoming an LCV member for just $5 today >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/mkyVH2zZWAC-)
Peter -- there's a critical fundraising deadline at midnight tonight. If we fall short, _it 'll mean scaling back major environmental campaigns in the coming days and weeks.___

**We can 't afford to miss this goal.** Not when House Republicans are leading an assault on public lands and clean energy. Not when the Biden administration is making final decisions on key environmental reforms. Not when so many pro-environment judges and other nominees are awaiting a vote in the Senate.

****We _need_ to keep our campaigns going. We need as many LCV members as possible to join our campaign for climate action, clean energy, and environmental justice. **** ****_****_

Our annual Membership Drive determines how big we can go and how hard we can fight each year -- and it ends at midnight tonight. So we're asking: [Become an LCV member for just $5 today. Don't miss this chance to make 3X the impact >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/mkyVH2zZWAC-)

| | **
** **_MIDNIGHT DEADLINE:_
League of Conservation Voters
2023 Membership Drive **

Supporter Record: Peter Willis
Match Status: [_TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE_](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Deadline: January 31, 2023
Fundraising Goal: $35,000

**Member Status:**[Claim your LCV membership today -- it only costs $5 right now](https://links.messages.lcv.)**** |
---|---|---

The January Membership Drive is one of the most important campaigns of the year for LCV -- it's when we bring in the bulk of our funding to keep our work running for the first half of the year. Here are just a few reasons why your contribution is so critical right now:
* **Because we 're keeping up the pressure to make sure that the commitments made in the Inflation Reduction Act are met.** This includes ensuring that Congress provides the necessary appropriations to federal agencies that will implement the climate, cost-saving, jobs, and health benefits unlocked by the law. [We must see this historic legislation through, and we need your help to make that happen >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/mkyVH2zZWAC-)
* **Because we 're calling on the Biden-Harris administration to exercise its full executive authority to protect the environment, our health, and the climate. **In doing so, the administration can stop future drilling on public lands, force dirty power plants to clean up, ensure more cars and trucks are electric, and accelerate deployment of clean renewable energy sources. But that's only going to happen if the environmental movement organizes and speaks out. [Power our response: pitch in to protect public lands >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/mkyVH2zZWAC-)
* **Because we 're pushing for confirmation of key executive branch vacancies. **Agencies such as the EPA and Federal Energy Regulatory Commission protect the environment and public health, deliver environmental justice, and advance clean renewable energy and climate action: [This is how we get climate action done, but we need support from the environmental movement to back us >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/mkyVH2zZWAC-)
* **Because your membership goes three times further right now.** A group of donors is triple matching every contribution through the end of the month. Your support will make triple the impact to ensure that we can accomplish all of our congressional priorities for this year: from implementing the historic pro-climate investments from the Inflation Reduction Act to supporting the environmental justice movement.****[Donate now and your contribution will go even further >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/mkyVH2zZWAC-)
* **Because membership is only $5 right now.** Environmental justice issues impact every single one of us: everyone deserves access to clean air, clean water, and a safe climate protected by a just and equitable democracy. [Help us build a sustainable future: any amount will help >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/mkyVH2zZWAC-)

The best thing you can do right now to help is to [become an LCV member for just $5 today. For a limited time, a group of generous donors will TRIPLE every gift to jumpstart our campaign.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/mkyVH2zZWAC-)

Thanks for all the work you do. We promise to never stop fighting for our environment.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

---
**[**JOIN FOR JUST $5 TODAY**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/pNy7f7Kx-)**

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9149466&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY4MDAzMzAwMQS2&spReportId=MTY4MDAzMzAwMQS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9149466&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY4MDAzMzAwMQS2&spReportId=MTY4MDAzMzAwMQS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.) |

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53b19ea92f4a4794b3d670a4d8ce23b6&_e=E1ArQbd0zzmd6EvYowesphuPGd6vq7XpcbsbXhiNZf5TMvHBSQV2VnoK0Vowl8ZRVpkkz_racGC8p_oGpI_U5Xthqi5iuR9yzNWS0cUZPAmzi9uvCOpk6vgGrwcfH5tvFBIFGa-p5jVMZqBx03Ng4OqobT8K09KBx1crf2RWEKc1HQAvaYiilZaF0XebNru9jgQRFAWUOWoAE6Te4_C1cq6vd9uHrOKjCFtVZ6p5TlbVGnS62y2-y4LMxaqg-jMpuVzpJpv73AfFgUa8OLK-jhTwXWIf9df4xJPaV4BDCx6TNpJdEWGZr3lzL6TGKWaGEAFSsL6xvNQ6hQn57LoFkdLKmBqSINhb42QqeWgkvx_Kgh_fDLlpf-MpMg5PxV7zJnY1D6nWOYiKXWWCh-Bl_fWstYYMcIgQ2sanC5kFMzpyUHfETz7KU-oDaURFy-d5)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53b19ea92f4a4794b3d670a4d8ce23b6&_e=E1ArQbd0zzmd6EvYowesphuPGd6vq7XpcbsbXhiNZf5TMvHBSQV2VnoK0Vowl8ZRVpkkz_racGC8p_oGpI_U5Xthqi5iuR9yzNWS0cUZPAmzi9uvCOpk6vgGrwcfH5tvFBIFGa-p5jVMZqBx03Ng4OqobT8K09KBx1crf2RWEKc1HQAvaYiilZaF0XebNru9jgQRFAWUOWoAE6Te4_C1cq6vd9uHrOKjCFtVZ6p5TlbVGnS62y2-y4LMxaqg-jMpuVzpJpv73AfFgUa8OLK-juZHkQZNvO_6SH4wn7XFME4jEXfgPmIgEEZ7Yr2c9htUf9jT-0EqNDS_DOqE0qlsoHjlBfkhRVxZ9EUmAuurFK6CL98jc8tahhmGWO9yra6-_7E7F0p5dtGLbtj7HSORsCen9gBb3E_kV7wbVYMzavDNkGoyIyiNQMorI3cyDR1C)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53b19ea92f4a4794b3d670a4d8ce23b6&_e=E1ArQbd0zzmd6EvYowesphuPGd6vq7XpcbsbXhiNZf5TMvHBSQV2VnoK0Vowl8ZRVpkkz_racGC8p_oGpI_U5Xthqi5iuR9yzNWS0cUZPAmzi9uvCOpk6vgGrwcfH5tvFBIFGa-p5jVMZqBx03Ng4OqobT8K09KBx1crf2RWEKc1HQAvaYiilZaF0XebNru9jgQRFAWUOWoAE6Te4_C1cq6vd9uHrOKjCFtVZ6p5TlbVGnS62y2-y4LMxaqg-jMpuVzpJpv73AfFgUa8OLK-jgrwFdfft8mGSpU4e3OxjbTpM5ddIauEeRCT_RvqIMSpoBSCNbsttfEv9AdteughZRPjjLn_4q1klHPs2ukFDtBiTnxvN92G4x0yJ3gheA_1vcJxbogW8QNKro8tQBStED3A8-nE2xvk37vi6fsfdwbxSEple2mbU2ibN40OrNez)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53b19ea92f4a4794b3d670a4d8ce23b6&_e=E1ArQbd0zzmd6EvYowesphuPGd6vq7XpcbsbXhiNZf5TMvHBSQV2VnoK0Vowl8ZRVpkkz_racGC8p_oGpI_U5Xthqi5iuR9yzNWS0cUZPAmzi9uvCOpk6vgGrwcfH5tvFBIFGa-p5jVMZqBx03Ng4OqobT8K09KBx1crf2RWEKc1HQAvaYiilZaF0XebNru9jgQRFAWUOWoAE6Te4_C1cq6vd9uHrOKjCFtVZ6p5TlbVGnS62y2-y4LMxaqg-jMpuVzpJpv73AfFgUa8OLK-jrQHhVkNtLcgLbdE-FkPLyNlbJgNOcxvki8B8hdZrf9RAPHqnp9kReaj5dIVd-ubsigi5-LZIHog8bm2uszXynhCUPLORxWkHe0Ya-_caAa7tO3b6z4X0ualCfr7lW16uKeHOXHNP15jOkbjWaRfco_0ZzsLdSzck__q5tKdeYhH).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09

Hillsdale College

This is Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

I watch the 117th Congress and pray they work together to protect and fix medicare and social security without forgetting their core objecti

| | |

| | Social Security must be protected, not destroyed
---
| | I watch the 117th Congress and pray they work together to protect and fix medicare and social security without forgetting their core objective - to provide for the general well-being of its citizens.
---
| | [](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/ddOODmHxB/c?w=dxB2uMGoKjeKusEa0ujdTcAM9Fx21EQmp-P6MKxYnNQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2ZyaWVuZHMtb2YtZHItYm9iLTEiLCJyIjoiZGRhMTZhMzctMjViZC00NTkxLTkzMGQtOWFiYTRmN2JkM2QwIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0)
---
| | Hardworking Americans have worked their whole lives to benefit from Social Security, and it would be shameful to gut it.
---
| | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/ddOODmHxB/c?w=ji0C9XQ8-HlrAJoU5z5peW4-u_3pEmPVzzaaIshepOc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2ZyaWVuZHMtb2YtZHItYm9iLTEiLCJyIjoiN2UyYzUzNDEtODVhNi00Y2I4LWFjYjMtNTNlNDY2OTc3ODNiIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0)

| | [](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/ddOODmHxB/c?w=E8j9NinKhF51i2ubcY1Wd4Q1VkDycyrMqo46kD-x0S0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2ZyaWVuZHMtb2YtZHItYm9iLTEiLCJyIjoiZjViMDk3NGItNTdkNC00OWI5LTk0N2ItYTJlNThkZGEwZTc3IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0)

| | Good afternoon. Yes, Congress must address the federal budget deficit and the national debt. However, we should do it without sacrificing the government's core role - to provide for the general well-being of its citizens. Crucial components of the federal budget need to be protected from destruction - education, healthcare, national defense, infrastructure, and Social Security.
It isn't either/or, e.g., 'balance the budget or save Social Security,' but both. Congress is obligated to do both. The task requires increased revenue and decreased spending, and we need compromise, collaboration, and cooperation to succeed as Americans. Some members of Congress are more focused on division and disruption, derailing problem-solving. That's not leadership or representation. It's obstruction. I look forward to overwhelming bipartisan support to fix Social Security and Medicare, not to destroy them. I watch the 117th Congress and pray they work together to protect our environment, not ignore the problems we face, that they improve the education of our youth, not accept its failure, that we support the middle class, families, and workers, and promote businesses and innovation. We need hope.We need solutions.We deserve a bright future. Please consider a contribution to my [Rural Fund](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/ddOODmHxB/c?w=DN72fE29-qjdrsRUXE_XHao5pdiTjQvrFF_jjzuH5Fo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2ZyaWVuZHMtb2YtZHItYm9iLTEiLCJyIjoiZGE3NTJlMWQtOWVhZC00MTUzLWIwZWItMGVlMDc0MTQ3ZjA2IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0), so we can advance Democratic principles like protecting and enhancing Social Security and Medicare. Thank you. -Dr. Bob Bob LorinserCandidate for US CongressMichigan's 1st Congressional DistrictNorthern Michigan & the Upper PeninsulaVoteDrBob.com
---

name: State Dems HQ
subject: This incredible moment wouldn’t have been possible without you
body:
When Democrats hold power, they act immediately to deliver for their constituents | | |
---
| | When the ultra-conservative majority Supreme Court overturned _Roe_ last summer, leaving abortion rights to the states, grassroots Democrats soared into action, investing in our movement to elect Democrats who will protect abortion rights in state legislatures across the country. _**And it paid off.**_ Through the support of this grassroots team, we secured historic victories last November – defending our existing majorities, flipping key chambers, and securing four new Democratic trifectas. **We’re already seeing the power of these victories: Just weeks into the legislative session, Minnesota Democrats put their new trifecta to work. Yesterday, Governor Tim Walz signed a bill codifying abortion rights in the state.** We’re thrilled. When Democrats hold power, they act immediately to deliver for their constituents – passing legislation to protect abortion access, voting rights, and so much more. **As we celebrate the work of Minnesota’s hard-won Democratic trifecta and the signing of this historic legislation, we want to take the time to say _thank you._ This incredible moment wouldn’t be possible without your support of our movement.** At moments like this, we’re reminded of the importance of our mission to grow Democratic power in state legislatures. Democratic majorities are truly life-changing. That’s why it’s vital that we continue to fight to elect Democrats to statehouses nationwide – together, we can secure a better future in states like yours and across the country. [If you’re able: Can you chip in $7 today to help power our work to elect state Democrats who will fight to protect abortion rights? Anything you can spare will make a meaningful difference.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zPxM5q-4kK8uu6lZcSOahKj7sxjMS7xBDkwcMIRCFdjTYWy79Lu0XzEhqQBsRDN1Rih49V5SWzWIQDo2elqUY-Ig_EXveiyQBDCtcQSkqmq7KSqXHYIVO1h0VlIeaggdSYqEKpkVQiJFDOwfFG_9fSAhpy2kDcXDgJ0ZSPKuhrSSQHvOECq2680E_gXZN-YYXV8vrE6DSiP_B46724ans3Xns90QERcu4ihxtWaGHG-WV5pwr0Cnev82-URqGug915FFO_HNuglRE7F1FvpV9IFStNVAx5y0GCDeSi9x3AZx4yagKYDZcHD9r1bK1rYFGZClApgUGiNVNFeLSwF3Zm2GSitIZmsnUbby7ggLjTtr5BPsOBEx-f-6hmAJNB-HFNQxp3R6Wg-qMj6ZT1PE7Z-87vF3NEJw4uvzWY3bNSvdX2pPKjQ-mfZEO3DhO_qVQ/3tc/ack0Ogc_SdmGrGc9S-dpkQ/h0/4ww-Cz4YVotjK4B8XkI-d2YES4LYMTzPIsNfmbzQ2cI) We couldn't do this without you.

subject: Woohooo! We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
Look – Becca’s doing her victory dance! | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58147901/390190970/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMThlZDEzOC05NGEyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o5B7LlIGZH3iV4M8Fp2cn8qKaZrnw5S32TLr2uHMePc=&emci=e73b0243-8da2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=118ed138-94a2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | **We did it, Peter! Thanks to your support, we were able to raise $10,677 in January and CRUSH our first FEC goal of 2023 – and no one is happier about it than Becca: ** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58147902/390190971/-412511982?refcode=E20179-20230201-PostEOMThanks-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMThlZDEzOC05NGEyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o5B7LlIGZH3iV4M8Fp2cn8qKaZrnw5S32TLr2uHMePc=) During her first month in Congress, Becca has centered integrity and strong ethical values in her work – and she was recognized for it by being appointed to the House Committee on Oversight and Accountability. It’s never been more important for us to rebuild our campaign operation and be prepared for anything the GOP may throw Becca’s way as she does this critical work to defend our democracy and hold bad actors accountable. _Every dollar you all donated to our campaign last month will go towards helping us do just that. _ **Thank you again for all of your support last month. 2023 is now off to an incredibly strong start – and we couldn’t have done it without you! 💪🏼** – Team Becca
---

* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58147903/390190972/537668883?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMThlZDEzOC05NGEyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o5B7LlIGZH3iV4M8Fp2cn8qKaZrnw5S32TLr2uHMePc=&emci=e73b0243-8da2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=118ed138-94a2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58147904/390190973/-1209379614?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMThlZDEzOC05NGEyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o5B7LlIGZH3iV4M8Fp2cn8qKaZrnw5S32TLr2uHMePc=&emci=e73b0243-8da2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=118ed138-94a2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58147905/390190974/411952208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMThlZDEzOC05NGEyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o5B7LlIGZH3iV4M8Fp2cn8qKaZrnw5S32TLr2uHMePc=&emci=e73b0243-8da2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=118ed138-94a2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272)
**Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room.** As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's making history as the first woman and openly LGBTQ person to ever serve Vermont in Congress. | | Good morning. Last November, voters in conservative, rural Dunn County, Wisconsin passed a referendum asking Congress to pursue a "publicly financed, non-profit, national health insurance program that would fully cover medical care costs for all Americans." Its passing in a red county proves that a growing majority of Americans — liberal and conservative — are tired of a broken, predatory health insurance system that reaps huge profits when we age and get sick.
* Imagine having a medical emergency when the closest ER is over 60 minutes away, the ambulance service is short-staffed, and response time is delayed.
* Imagine having a sick child, but there are no physicians or hospital beds within an hour's drive of your community.
* What if there [aren't enough nurses](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/39OODePDg/c?w=BeKyg9BYU-Qqt9DYTgJQng3etmBuUDm_hQEp_gZF48M.) and other professionals to take care of you?

This is the reality facing too many citizens in the 1st District, counties like Dunn, and all across rural America. It's high time someone does something about it. We must address these problems by working with local, state, and federal resources to implement final solutions. We have very successful models, but they need to be a funding priority. Privatizing healthcare completely -- a goal of many misguided Republicans in office -- will be at the dire expense of rural care accessibility. Our Congressman voted against medical care expansion and nineteen Michigan rural hospitals [are at risk of closing](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/39OODePDg/c?w=gWWP6D9c_ALsPmVWHq6tEoOC6JMebcmi0RsU56XG_mA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ydXJhbGhvc3BpdGFscy5jaHFwci5vcmcvU29sdXRpb25zLmh0bWwiLCJyIjoiMWQ2MzE2MGQtZjcyMC00OWZhLWExMzMtYjBkYjU5MTAwNjZhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0) because of financial losses and a lack of financial reserves. It could reduce the amount of rural care by over 30%.
Saving Rural Hospitals Millions of Americans live in rural communities that don't have essential healthcare services, such as hospitals, emergency rooms, or primary care clinics. They face long delays in getting care if they're in an accident or have symptoms of a heart attack, stroke, or an infectious disease such as COVID-19. Even if they have insurance to pay for health care services, [there is nowhere](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/39OODePDg/c?w=djC9SBCDs1T-ozKfBniirnG52Octk6BlKt0RxUjGpg0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ydXJhbGhvc3BpdGFscy5jaHFwci5vcmcvIiwiciI6IjFkNjMxNjBkLWY3MjAtNDlmYS1hMTMzLWIwZGI1OTEwMDY2YSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) they can use it in their community. Nearly 90% of RN respondents consider leaving an already critically short-staffed nursing profession within one year if staffing issues, poor environments, and patient flow challenges go unaddressed.
These are the issues I will work on. I am passionate about this, education, childcare, affordable housing, livable wages, infrastructure, and the future solvency of social security and Medicare. Let's work together to problem solve and unelect politicians who make problems worse. Thank you for considering a contribution to the Rural Fund so we can advocate for Democratic principles across Michigan's 1st District. -Dr. Bob Lorinserinfo@votedrbob.comVoteDrBob.com

clean_body: I am proud to have been physician in the rural UP for over 30 years, but federally we have a lot of work to do to ensure everyone has access | | Can't see this message? | | | | | Rural healthcare in UP / N. Michigan should've been a major Congressional priority | | I am proud to have been physician in the rural UP for over 30 years, but federally we have a lot of work to do to ensure everyone has access to care. | | | | I've practiced medicine in rural areas for 30 years — Iron River, Crystal Falls, and KI Sawyer. Congress isn't doing enough to advocate for accessible healthcare for Michigan's most vulnerable patients. | | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Donate: $10Express Donate: $25 | | Good morning. Last November, voters in conservative, rural Dunn County, Wisconsin passed a referendum asking Congress to pursue a "publicly financed, non-profit, national health insurance program that would fully cover medical care costs for all Americans." Its passing in a red county proves that a growing majority of Americans — liberal and conservative — are tired of a broken, predatory health insurance system that reaps huge profits when we age and get sick. Imagine having a medical emergency when the closest ER is over 60 minutes away, the ambulance service is short-staffed, and response time is delayed. Imagine having a sick child, but there are no physicians or hospital beds within an hour's drive of your community. What if there and other professionals to take care of you? This is the reality facing too many citizens in the 1st District, counties like Dunn, and all across rural America. It's high time someone does something about it. We must address these problems by working with local, state, and federal resources to implement final solutions. We have very successful models, but they need to be a funding priority. Privatizing healthcare completely -- a goal of many misguided Republicans in office -- will be at the dire expense of rural care accessibility. Our Congressman voted against medical care expansion and nineteen Michigan rural hospitals because of financial losses and a lack of financial reserves. It could reduce the amount of rural care by over 30%. Saving Rural Hospitals Millions of Americans live in rural communities that don't have essential healthcare services, such as hospitals, emergency rooms, or primary care clinics. They face long delays in getting care if they're in an accident or have symptoms of a heart attack, stroke, or an infectious disease such as COVID-19. Even if they have insurance to pay for health care services, they can use it in their community. Nearly 90% of RN respondents consider leaving an already critically short-staffed nursing profession within one year if staffing issues, poor environments, and patient flow challenges go unaddressed. These are the issues I will work on. I am passionate about this, education, childcare, affordable housing, livable wages, infrastructure, and the future solvency of social security and Medicare. Let's work together to problem solve and unelect politicians who make problems worse. Thank you for considering a contribution to the Rural Fund so we can advocate for Democratic principles across Michigan's 1st District. -Dr. Bob Lorinserinfo@votedrbob.comVoteDrBob.com | | | | | | | | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . If you feel you received it by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please .**

name: Laphonza Butler, EMILY's List
subject: History in the making
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
|
---
| | Our elected officials must reflect the country they serve. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58128450/390148584/-258323618?sourceid=1048568&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWQ5NGFhNS02ZGEyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSDiD42teGSpj2FRYiReEfmj8Aa-TPLeHK7ntX0Jw1I=&emci=2e813f9f-6da2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=29d94aa5-6da2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Today marks the first day of Black History Month. I am keenly aware, this and every month, of the Black women on whose shoulders we stand in our struggle for equality in America — some of them known to history, and many whose contributions never made it to history books.

The distance our country still has to go when it comes to equal representation in politics is striking. We know that there are not enough Black women in elected office, and we know one reason why. **In 2018, Black women running for office raised 55% less than white women.** In other words, it's a steeper climb for Black women, and I take it as a personal imperative in my role as EMILY's List president to help level the playing field.

This is a wake-up call for all of us in the political sphere: We cannot have representation, we cannot have _justice_ , without a government that reflects the people it serves. EMILY's List is devoted to raising the critical early money it takes to help Democratic pro-choice women launch, run, and WIN races up and down the ballot and across the country. And that's not just a February promise — that's a _founding principle_.

Even with the work left to be done — including electing state Sen. Jennifer McClellan to be the _first_ Black congresswoman from Virginia in just three weeks! — we remain hopeful. We know that with every Democratic pro-choice Black woman that EMILY's List endorses, supports, and helps elect, the more we'll see progress and legislation that recognizes our shared humanity and our role in making our nation a more perfect Union.

In solidarity,

Laphonza Butler
President, EMILY's List [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58128452/390148586/-258323618?sourceid=1048568&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWQ5NGFhNS02ZGEyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSDiD42teGSpj2FRYiReEfmj8Aa-TPLeHK7ntX0Jw1I=&emci=2e813f9f-6da2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=29d94aa5-6da2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58128453/390148587/2030400885?sourceid=1048568&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWQ5NGFhNS02ZGEyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSDiD42teGSpj2FRYiReEfmj8Aa-TPLeHK7ntX0Jw1I=&emci=2e813f9f-6da2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=29d94aa5-6da2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: In 2024, real progressive, Senator Tammy Baldwin, is up for reelection. Baldwin's a trailblazer, the first open lesbian ever elected to the Senate. Even though she's from a close swing state, we can always count on Senator Baldwin to lead the charge. If we want her to be there to do that in the next Congress, she needs our support now.
body:
Swing Senate seat in a swing state
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbb83e8d1-9849-47a7-bd22-4c720642ea85/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _A huge victory and a painful loss. _ That's what happened in Wisconsin in the 2022 election. _We won a huge victory reelecting Governor Tony Evers over a democracy-attacking Republican. Yet, in a heartbreaking loss, _Lt. Gov Mandela Barnes lost by only 1%_ to awful Senator Ron Johnson,_ who attacks vaccines and defends AR-15s like they're part of his family. _**In 2024, real progressive, Senator Tammy Baldwin, is up for reelection. Baldwin's a trailblazer, the first open lesbian ever elected to the Senate. Even though she's from a close swing state, whether protecting women's reproductive autonomy, fighting to raise taxes on billionaires or doing all she can to keep our kids safe from guns in school,[we can always count on Senator Baldwin to lead the charge.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf761cdd8-bf68-4df2-9a10-b2239c2d5b93/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**_

|

---
| _All the prognosticators have predicted we'll lose the Senate in 2024, because we have so many tough seats to defend.** And there's no world in which we lose Senator Baldwin's seat and retain a Senate majority.**_ [**_So, for the awesome trailblazing Tammy Baldwin and our Senate majority, can you join Blue Amp Action in giving Senator Baldwin $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38fd8d02-f9a8-4b91-958c-f70366ad8a2a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you so much, Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1021d4c7-a6c5-4a1f-8e99-886015bd695d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Gov Mandela Barnes lost by only 1% to awful Senator Ron Johnson, who attacks vaccines and defends AR-15s like they're part of his family. In 2024, real progressive, Senator Tammy Baldwin, is up for reelection. Baldwin's a trailblazer, the first open lesbian ever elected to the Senate. Even though she's from a close swing state, whether protecting women's reproductive autonomy, fighting to raise taxes on billionaires or doing all she can to keep our kids safe from guns in school, | | | | | | | | All the prognosticators have predicted we'll lose the Senate in 2024, because we have so many tough seats to defend. And there's no world in which we lose Senator Baldwin's seat and retain a Senate majority. Thank you so much, Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

clean_body: Friend: Don't miss Wednesday afternoon's top conservative news! | | | | | | | | | Your input is critical to us and to the future of conservatism in America. We refuse to be silenced, and we hope you do too. and never miss a story. To ensure our email makes it to your inbox daily and not spam, please add our email address to your email contact list. | ## ## ## ## ## | ## ## ## ## ## ## ## ## | | | ## ## ## ## You Might Like | | | | ---|---|---|---|---

name: Quentin James & Stefanie Brown James, Co-Founders of The Collective PAC
subject: How you can help us elect Black Democrats in 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8XlBGAFEs9HJpq1AChr_jaKjIHhLk3ta9B9NjQu-z4f0lr6FJx_n5s1T4gePcBZW-AKsyeP26iVLfSs1x5AGYozFoCldV__YrKbKX3rwDPFOMfBFytVE5kUo9Gb3UVZPJF7DWX1mQmWW9tUJCJMBTZESxJV90CjL0uLubDJ2mCbb2Yy3_rl3JRFKRAgpbe9dxJ3QDKwyKfAd95WIpRIefry6X-4VIx173f8i8o-nmQ00jTWbE7EIQzTlVpzgNBwTZvxPMtAKj4S8_PUdn2KJRksj3CCAmSwFx2RPBeGcOeX-QvVQ-PS1GTsdwyaHkP9UDw/3tc/6nhx7zXST2qAR6Tyo4r1zg/h0/SPnDan8Z8Wvucby398gdC-5G6R3BXxNsIUsXy91ANfU) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJlhvNiqQ372mJELSbBmz1l__l_srEU9Rhgc3YpAUOxdApSwX1EGf2h0g9JTlcWYfOTwiU3Tu8diuAwhkcb_Rrjy0izIZW2Mdy9FoGVLgWykRwr7pRroadSpN1g2etmTg-3oL2uby1a8GVYENPFA6fg3kiXQTqbTudJlUSJOip_08F7AJnXHdTFWmx83Z8V-JOkOqU2JldEGS7hUIxnC_FdED7MHkr3qTAR0OLVJUVY1A4gKHEtQ2RtS5BZ9_7lZoo7h7xbj6WzhTIfxNSnsJWf0YgxHPgq2SiC1utWP7noQ6L76HTeoq8weiDPDBnBELb/3tc/6nhx7zXST2qAR6Tyo4r1zg/h1/tFgsZlcvpQnLxYbVQk-VFRbtTl79jDJukgb6V49UYHA)

Hi there, Peter. It’s Quentin James and Stefanie Brown James, the husband-and-wife team behind The Collective PAC, which has been dedicated to supporting and funding Black candidates on the local, state, and federal levels and engaging Black voters in the political process since 2016.

We wanted to reach out to you personally during this Black History Month and ask for your support.

For over six years, we’ve been fighting day in and day out to **#BuildBlackPoliticalPower** and create a truly representative democracy — one that works for _all_ Americans — **and we hope you’ll agree with us when we say that this fight is more important than ever in 2023.**

[If you do, please consider donating to The Collective PAC this Black History Month. We know that our efforts make a difference. In 2022, we:
* **Invested over one million dollars into our endorsed candidates**
* **Contacted 3.1 million low-propensity Black voters directly** through our phone banking and text banking efforts and encouraged them to turn out to the polls
* **Supported 187 candidates on the Nov. 8th ballot,** 107 of whom won their races
* **Powered 16 History-Makers to victory** , including the first Black governor of Maryland and the first Black female mayor of Los Angeles

But here’s the thing: **_Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you, Peter._**

It’s Quentin James and Stefanie Brown James, the husband-and-wife team behind The Collective PAC, which has been dedicated to supporting and funding Black candidates on the local, state, and federal levels and engaging Black voters in the political process since 2016. We wanted to reach out to you personally during this Black History Month and ask for your support. For over six years, we’ve been fighting day in and day out to #BuildBlackPoliticalPower and create a truly representative democracy — one that works for all Americans — and we hope you’ll agree with us when we say that this fight is more important than ever in 2023. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | We know that our efforts make a difference. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | We’re so proud of the work we’ve accomplished so far, and we can’t wait to see where your support takes us from here. Quentin James & Stefanie Brown James Co-Founders of The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. Ever since they seized control of the White House, MILLIONS of illegal immigrants have poured into our country, and that’s not to mention the record number of “gotaways”... | [Source: Fox News] Friend, Biden and Kamala treat illegal immigrants better than YOU. They treat criminals better than YOU. And they happily do so because it’s all by design. Even though enough Fentanyl has poured across our southern border to kill every American 5 TIMES OVER , the radical Democrats still LOVE their open borders. Why? Votes. They view each and every one of those 1.2 million “gotaways” as another check next to their name on the ballot. That’s why we must FIGHT day in and day out to EXPOSE this madness and STOP the open-borders Democrats dead in their tracks. But I’m counting on patriots like YOU to help me keep up that fight. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America.

His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents.

You've seen Marine One on TV countless times, I'm sure.

If you saw Marine One picking up or dropping off President George W. Bush, you may have seen John hard at work.

**But John, now an honorably discharged and disabled U.S. Marine, is going to federal prison for one year.**

Did John attack the U.S. Capitol Police on January 6, 2021? No.

Did he lash out violently or endanger anyone? No.

Did he break or destroy anything? No.

John entered the Capitol Building through a window broken by someone else. He walked into the Capitol Building and into the chamber of the House of Representatives...that's it.

His alleged crime is called "obstruction of an official proceeding."

But as you recall, Antifa members rioted and committed violent assaults...Black Lives Matter members rioted, burned buildings to the ground, and terrorized whole cities...but they didn't even get arrested!

It sickens me that an honorable man like John Andries, who also suffers from multiple sclerosis, is doing hard time.

name: Democrats.org
subject: Emails like this go a long way.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
The money that we raise supports investments in our organizing teams, voter protection programs, state-of-the-art data and technology, and so much more. | |
---
Derek -- Because we’re genuine partners in this fight, we’re pulling back the curtain to be honest with you: **We fell short of our January online fundraising goal.** We know we sent you quite a few emails this week, and that can be a bit intense from time to time. But here’s some insight on the philosophy behind why these emails make such a big difference, Derek: **98% of donations to the DNC come from grassroots supporters giving less than $200. In fact, our average online gift this year is $21 -- yes,****_just $21!_** **[That means that emails like this go a long way toward funding our work to fight back against the GOP and elect Democrats everywhere. Added together, donations of $3, $5, or $10 from members of this team make a huge difference. clean_body: The money that we raise supports investments in our organizing teams, voter protection programs, state-of-the-art data and technology, and so much more. | | Derek -- Because we’re genuine partners in this fight, we’re pulling back the curtain to be honest with you: We fell short of our January online fundraising goal. We know we sent you quite a few emails this week, and that can be a bit intense from time to time. But here’s some insight on the philosophy behind why these emails make such a big difference, Derek: 98% of donations to the DNC come from grassroots supporters giving less than $200. In fact, our average online gift this year is $21 -- yes,just $21! As you’d imagine, falling short of our goal isn’t what we had hoped for to start off 2023, Derek. The money that we raise supports investments in our organizing teams who contact, educate, and turn out hundreds of thousands of voters; voter protection programs that protect the right to vote before, on, and after Election Day; state-of-the-art data and technology to make Democratic campaigns more efficient and effective; and so much more. The good news is we can still close this gap. You haven’t chipped in yet this year, so Democrats are counting on you to step up for the first time. Rush $10 now to help close the gap -- and when you do, you’ll receive your very own Official 2023 DNC Membership Card in the mail. Thanks for being a part of this work. We couldn’t do it without you, Derek. The Democrats P.S. It doesn’t take a big donation to make a difference. As we said, 98% of all gifts made to the DNC were under $200 -- the real power of our movement is in everyone on this team coming together and pitching in a little to do a whole lot. That was only possible because of your generosity, so **thank you.** But the work is far from over. We’re still in the fight to defend our frontline Congresswomen and win back the House majority. name: Garrett Arwa
subject: How does someone like Marjorie Taylor Greene even get elected?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
we could ask the same thing about Jim Jordan, Matt Gaetz...
|
---

Recently, Marjorie Taylor Greene boasted that, if she had planned the January 6th insurrection, it “would’ve been armed” and would have succeeded in overturning the 2020 election.

She spoke at a pro-Putin conference hosted by a white nationalist.

She’s spread bizarre conspiracy theories and misinformation about tragedies like September 11th and Sandy Hook.

**And now, Marjorie Taylor Greene sits on the House Homeland Security Committee._Yes, really._**

How does someone so extreme even get elected to Congress in the first place – much less get elevated to a position impacting our national security?

**The answer is one word: Gerrymandering.

[_By manipulating maps, Republicans can ensure their candidates win reelection over and over again, no matter how extreme they are. The NDRC is working to end gerrymandering and give power back to voters, where it belongs. Will you donate now to support our efforts?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58136923/390160048/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230201_FR_2A_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI5NjUxOWMxLTdiYTItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=q-KhgyYzWKNPV63DNLfZVpGN97pvXDXRaNPH8WEO6dE=)** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58136924/390160049/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230201_FR_2A_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI5NjUxOWMxLTdiYTItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=q-KhgyYzWKNPV63DNLfZVpGN97pvXDXRaNPH8WEO6dE=)
---
When politicians like Marjorie Taylor Greene, Jim Jordan, and Matt Gaetz never have to worry about a competitive election, they have free rein to advance extreme policies and play partisan political games. **That’s _dangerous_ for our democracy...and it leaves us with two options.**
**OPTION ONE: We can do nothing.**

We can stand idly by while Republicans continue using manipulated maps to elevate extreme politicians to the highest positions of power.

**OPTION TWO: We can fight to make gerrymandering history.**

By advocating for redistricting reforms and holding map-manipulating politicians accountable, we can make our elections fair and competitive.
**Attorney General Eric Holder said, “Unlike Republicans, Democrats don’t need to gerrymander to win.” _He’s right!_ And that’s why we’re taking Option 2.

Here at the NDRC, we’re committed to ending gerrymandering, and we’re getting results! Ahead of the 2022 elections, our work helped secure what _The New York Times_ called “the fairest map in 40 years” for the House of Representatives – but we’re just getting started.

[_Will you pitch in now to help us keep fighting for fairness?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58136925/390160050/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230201_FR_2A_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI5NjUxOWMxLTdiYTItZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=q-KhgyYzWKNPV63DNLfZVpGN97pvXDXRaNPH8WEO6dE=)**

name: Team AOC
subject: Jamie Raskin & AOC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria has some news.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230201-3851-header&t=1&akid=3851%2E2526796%2ENBexZ1)
It’s official: Alexandria was elected to serve as second-in-command to Ranking Member Jamie Raskin on the House Oversight Committee!
Alexandria has served on House Oversight since 2019, pressuring defense contractors to return misused public funds and Big Pharma to lower prescription costs, among other big wins.
[This term, Alexandria will go head to head with far-right Republicans newly appointed to the Oversight Committee — Marjorie Taylor Greene, Lauren Boebert, and Paul Gosar, to name a few. Can you help us support Alexandria’s fight by chipping in $3 today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230201.4KqQJa&refcode=em20230201-3851-P_FND_ANO_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3851%2E2526796%2ENBexZ1)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230201.4KqQJa&refcode=em20230201-3851-P_FND_ANO_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3851%2E2526796%2ENBexZ1)**
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230201.4KqQJa&refcode=em20230201-3851-P_FND_ANO_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3851%2E2526796%2ENBexZ1)
Republicans have already announced their plan to use the Oversight Committee to launch bogus investigations into Hunter Biden’s laptop and spread conspiracy theories around the pandemic. Alexandria and Rep. Raskin are going to have their hands full rebutting these dangerous distractions, but we know they’re ready for the fight.
[If you’re able to, please chip in $3 or any amount to let Alexandria know that you agree: the Oversight Committee must continue to hold the government accountable to everyday people, not a far-right agenda.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230201.4KqQJa&refcode=em20230201-3851-P_FND_ANO_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3851%2E2526796%2ENBexZ1)
We congratulate Alexandria on her post, and look forward to sharing updates with you on her work in the Oversight Committee!
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230201?refcode=em20230201-3851-P_FND_ANO_HDL&t=24&refcode2=3851_2526796_NBexZ1&akid=3851%2E2526796%2ENBexZ1)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230201-3851-P_FND_ANO_HDL&t=25&akid=3851%2E2526796%2ENBexZ1)**

Friend,
The Department of Justice just conducted a “planned” and “consensual” search of Joe Biden’s beach house for classified documents.
_**Meanwhile, FBI agents RAIDED my home without my knowledge and staged Mar-a-Lago to look like a crime scene – complete with flashing lights, sirens, and officers with guns.**_
_Biden’s home gets “consensually searched” with “cooperation” from his lawyers._
**We are once again witnessing the two standards of justice in our country. There’s one set of rules for the well-connected – and another set of rules for the people they write off as “deplorables.”**
**And that’s the reason the Deep State wants to destroy me. Because I’ve fought like hell to END the two-tiered justice system in America – and finally put YOU first.**
As we all know, if the Deep State could do what they’ve done to a U.S. President, they could one day do it to _**YOU**_.
Our fight for TRUE justice in America has only just begun. We will take back the White House, FIRE Deep State agents who’ve burrowed in our federal government, and escort them straight out of our federal buildings.

clean_body: He gets searched. I get RAIDED. | | | Friend, The Department of Justice just conducted a “planned” and “consensual” search of Joe Biden’s beach house for classified documents. Meanwhile, FBI agents RAIDED my home without my knowledge and staged Mar-a-Lago to look like a crime scene – complete with flashing lights, sirens, and officers with guns. Biden’s home gets “consensually searched” with “cooperation” from his lawyers. We are once again witnessing the two standards of justice in our country. There’s one set of rules for the well-connected – and another set of rules for the people they write off as “deplorables.” And that’s the reason the Deep State wants to destroy me. Because I’ve fought like hell to END the two-tiered justice system in America – and finally put YOU first. As we all know, if the Deep State could do what they’ve done to a U.S. President, they could one day do it to YOU. Our fight for TRUE justice in America has only just begun. We will take back the White House, FIRE Deep State agents who’ve burrowed in our federal government, and escort them straight out of our federal buildings. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. clean_body: It's the breadcrumb trail to what we can see. | | | Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this Peter, I was recently on Fox Business with Maria Bartiromo discussing Joe Biden’s corruption. Click or below to watch the entire exchange. | | The Hunter Biden laptop was just the tip of the iceberg. It's the breadcrumb trail to what we can see. Where are the documents that we don't know about around the world – with Biden’s business dealings with China, Ukraine and Burisma, and many others? This is just the beginning of what we need to investigate. And it’s a task that I take very seriously. Unfortunately, the left is doing everything in its power to stonewall, deflect and hold out until 2024 so that none of our questions are answered. We need to get to the bottom of this because we MUST have accountability. | | Want to hear a crazy story? I’m not your run-of-the-mill Republican. I’m a true patriot and a conservative with a proven record of fighting for the American people. My election in 2020 was a bitter FIGHT. At midnight on election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by NEARLY 30,000 VOTES! Over the next 90 DAYS , we fought against a team of lawyers who pulled out every shady tactic in the book to push my opponent ahead. After every ballot was scrutinized and legal vote counted, I was declared the winner by a slim 109votes! From that moment on, I knew I needed to lead the election integrity effort.And that’s why I founded and lead the Election Integrity Caucus in Congress. But my fight didn’t stop there. At the same, I was SPEARHEADING an effort to overturn the unconstitutional concealed carry laws that plagued states like mine. And I won. There are too many Republicans who talk a good game but never actually fight for YOU. Thank you,Claudia Tenney | | | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | P.O. Box 26352 Alexandria, Virginia 22313 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | | | |

name: Jason Crow
subject: My first victory speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Happy February, folks —

Though it was a bumpy start, the 118th Congress is officially up and running. I am deeply honored to be representing the people of Colorado’s 6th District.

I made a pledge during my first victory speech in 2018: As long as I have the honor of serving you in Congress, I will be there for you no matter what.

As a former Army Ranger, I’ve worked to bring servant leadership to the halls of Congress. My team and I are working to put the needs of our community ahead of partisanship and make this the most productive session yet.

As we’re entering this new session, I’m hoping to hear directly from you.

Will you complete my February Strategy Survey today? Here’s your personal survey link: [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-02-strategy-survey]

BEGIN THE SURVEY [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-02-strategy-survey]

Thank you for entrusting me with your support. Together, we will usher a new generation of leadership to Congress. Onward!

— Jason

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-january-2023]
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/p/_ip9EBc0-UqWUsBDgB-c0g2?unsubscribedata=lu%2FG6wwPAk2wWfIZ3jbYrzIbyIV8XWuCtR%2F8hHAsesnnv6qYIiceGspfTO9a3kZjHt0peQsSAfhHROwoPlKW3bXgKkJtC%2F1E5lgzesDOgwuLADf5UotTG%2B0l1il6Nd0AzFNpyl%2B6Jvx5uuytdo%2FGdA6Qiv5kd0Ba%2BxPD4UjZvVV0DWFzBBIxmiJVG0T2%2BtHxXq20De9gdzpebauxOrIZzKu0GFIw4N17dRcsmOeWEG%2BHhuvrdcCFumVnyDnDFIu6GOmkggm2WAmjQUtX7%2Bz8ddRCHBVp2AvXk%2FwdHVL1h8MT2GQIu4Cb%2F166U7bw3qV6Y2tAcCXFNHOeHp49Mp9K5V34zLCyqFTxdM1nF5gs4b%2F7Qo9tSYB3Ucpp2vGIHANdRQBE4rHQH3IvaFVaIHYnZokSooSqaUP2H9f3hcr1ZVBMLH6gXIAN0AYdE4DxxVjV] If this is not your preferred email address, you can update your information here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5AdTmae3UU6fPeitwGd55w2] We believe that emails are an important way for Jason Crow for Congress to stay in contact with supporters like you. We appreciate any feedback you might have -- positive or negative. You can contact us here [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com?subject=Feedback] with any questions, concerns, or ideas. To receive text updates from Team Crow, join us here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/bjvZx6_NWU2fx5btnSgikw2] .
