name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1312d3c2b4b40e1b5016af7d3dfbdcd&_e=sj2Pxit3QqMH-Jb-OY2eJ4c4xpJeqEAgRXy-dReitwjxqDKw97bhGCdIF3-3AhqwwRz3JIR_0hOln3tjuXuE61235YKT4DoDhcLTKzAACCAjrfj2gz25tkMfgJUm5rZhnGKvQMlL8cBhLI6uaOd3OHh7q2Bi4k5_WVw2XbmJLmIcOXpDbsJOzPGdzXjD1cLl6l45mRdhjZjRLFwNiIt58yyam5YZ9xVFApqE59pAsqPkVzFLCkUAZqZ10VKDkPb99Q9oas1xSedhMxjkuoTRifTUAThO6k3o7caRiYDS3_E%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1312d3c2b4b40e1b5016af7d3dfbdcd&_e=sj2Pxit3QqMH-Jb-OY2eJ4c4xpJeqEAgRXy-dReitwjxqDKw97bhGCdIF3-3AhqwwRz3JIR_0hOln3tjuXuE61235YKT4DoDhcLTKzAACCAjrfj2gz25tkMfgJUm5rZhnGKvQMlL8cBhLI6uaOd3OB8NbsMIS36cI9EQgXw0Gk0IwdC9kuhjv3qDdsuw5_Nq8Qsj7968t39MSIcFdK5OmiMSpuKmjrF4_T3Rxaa2x1bjuUUuAsEUk4-g3v-SPdROEhl5fC4rRWj_KOldtptCEAmmVlpMvcOduUq8bRX6be0%3D)
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1312d3c2b4b40e1b5016af7d3dfbdcd&_e=sj2Pxit3QqMH-Jb-OY2eJ4c4xpJeqEAgRXy-dReitwjxqDKw97bhGCdIF3-3AhqwwRz3JIR_0hOln3tjuXuE61235YKT4DoDhcLTKzAACCAjrfj2gz25tkMfgJUm5rZhnGKvQMlL8cBhLI6uaOd3OM3oE95u49yo0vyT-b3jqEZ5ozYTBvMlnfK6Jw1-7Pf6Mm9VZzFcSMB6L5LuFaJh6rO5fcH7ZPoGR5w9lbpcrzVaecyvP0XJotNKiC5Gf3wruH8OONZSwuwqDvfV9Y5n1AnDe1CPBeloh5Em2KvW7lg%3D)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1312d3c2b4b40e1b5016af7d3dfbdcd&_e=sj2Pxit3QqMH-Jb-OY2eJ4c4xpJeqEAgRXy-dReitwjxqDKw97bhGCdIF3-3AhqwwRz3JIR_0hOln3tjuXuE61235YKT4DoDhcLTKzAACCAjrfj2gz25tkMfgJUm5rZhnGKvQMlL8cBhLI6uaOd3OOlJE5l00yDv7gMzu_z-ky59bOvsO8b3AXzfxLnzF2e5qmXy0iL5WnVPl6dBjdfS69PUGPTu8iRYvFtnF27LfzkT9YMqlE4Oytv0BdyN3vp5M89a-jjqeF6nuCd8TfRMix1YoEl4PXayUPJim_pL4R0%3D)
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1312d3c2b4b40e1b5016af7d3dfbdcd&_e=sj2Pxit3QqMH-Jb-OY2eJ4c4xpJeqEAgRXy-dReitwjxqDKw97bhGCdIF3-3AhqwwRz3JIR_0hOln3tjuXuE61235YKT4DoDhcLTKzAACCAjrfj2gz25tkMfgJUm5rZhnGKvQMlL8cBhLI6uaOd3OM3A3YwGyM0YqVI4v0Q4F7b1XKZ32_JLCQ9WKbrcH83FrqxArqAHK7D82dRh6lJRCK7e5pTGZAonSbZP4q1m8mOSlEexJ_8VCis3FdQDp1LyZpWn-HngfXwF7lhV7SOsZXcuLteZRifJjK773fyaK2Y%3D)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1312d3c2b4b40e1b5016af7d3dfbdcd&_e=sj2Pxit3QqMH-Jb-OY2eJ4c4xpJeqEAgRXy-dReitwjxqDKw97bhGCdIF3-3AhqwwRz3JIR_0hOln3tjuXuE61235YKT4DoDhcLTKzAACCAjrfj2gz25tkMfgJUm5rZhnGKvQMlL8cBhLI6uaOd3OBWfsvVL8npKzvGM9JGGg_kr4A1MOE-suWspNeRIaIkudF3gNqhe6nXn-vulDmtkUPT7yByehLesPvwsk_rJoOjWKHuxxNlm7BLrzpmOuwwofVuWv9uBvJl7atiAxivTFbPeKtMXvb1xOK0TITjqssk%3D) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1312d3c2b4b40e1b5016af7d3dfbdcd&_e=sj2Pxit3QqMH-Jb-OY2eJ4c4xpJeqEAgRXy-dReitwjxqDKw97bhGCdIF3-3AhqwwRz3JIR_0hOln3tjuXuE61235YKT4DoDhcLTKzAACCAjrfj2gz25tkMfgJUm5rZhnGKvQMlL8cBhLI6uaOd3OHc2L3H8C-HkirKhjq_zjVZFgWsyxL3U06atbDLwltQRaTllGhtBj21G8Yfrol1myeaJlKHpbb7gVJq_k3KnPaU1yPlEsQa_bGK8mpoKS2YVnWJi2KpmFp8t61unRT3rtR9Js3771YadS-g_Zo7gYWY%3D)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e1312d3c2b4b40e1b5016af7d3dfbdcd&_e=sj2Pxit3QqMH-Jb-OY2eJ4c4xpJeqEAgRXy-dReitwjxqDKw97bhGCdIF3-3AhqwwRz3JIR_0hOln3tjuXuE61235YKT4DoDhcLTKzAACCAjrfj2gz25tkMfgJUm5rZhnGKvQMlL8cBhLI6uaOd3OOOPPj9ZMASo1X83xU4AbPq7b_CQSKdBu_dq4DM2EQLv7nTGFqfBrLRZtx5xFmwb1IgaMaXLgR-UvEQvKKoUzXK9CnnUuekocVO1_oV6o08iy90UepUZFHSExtbz5rdhfgIazSpQ2Lf7GMtagixocNk%3D) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

body:
they’re trying to chip away at our rights, but together we can protect the Constitution| | | **🚨 2A FLASH POLL 🚨** **Judges in state courts should protect our Second Amendment rights.** [_**_YES >>_**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a3c29cb11df54003865fec1e779e6c6a&_e=euEbelDTbel5hGGRNDyoZsoO4zVrOa_VQxNDU-sfDVUKNHQjnwD-8Wa3WVxn8P2pl5z_xQWdDoHF4hZ2M_-GqOiU2KVUPROLf-1dXey16ZOmiRBZjfkm5Qh6fZv73hysMsO_bx98YkBsh10Qkl5yEQbhQCD_8Ixt9NucIsDWaqOdjO2HAP01k2uOTCnrL8-7Bj_hg1IalCqCBpNaxLFK_4UZWYMlMfEeLnyTH4Q3fIrHYycLwCL5SUUBzxGM948cLcjqBQPqJurWHWfm5iZXUYlUP1BSjHAEain_AFIvsw_4D0wSNxQiWwXWs1kx3eZgsXErgyRjaKMMKj2GqmCpjUamAODeVW3TZXq643o-NMoVV-VG1kBZfgK3Sz4zob5K) [_**_ABSOLUTELY >>_**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a3c29cb11df54003865fec1e779e6c6a&_e=euEbelDTbel5hGGRNDyoZsoO4zVrOa_VQxNDU-sfDVUKNHQjnwD-8Wa3WVxn8P2pl5z_xQWdDoHF4hZ2M_-GqOiU2KVUPROLf-1dXey16ZOmiRBZjfkm5Qh6fZv73hysMsO_bx98YkBsh10Qkl5yEQbhQCD_8Ixt9NucIsDWaqOdjO2HAP01k2uOTCnrL8-7Bj_hg1IalCqCBpNaxLFK_4UZWYMlMfEeLnyTH4Q3fIq5BfIRE1qThf_TRhdyL4v3-eyAOHdk-iM_jq4QgjGZ0-UlGjpL8_ubKQOQ-O3o5qAYewts6n4qNzFXN6YW2sbAAzuWJJLnHitSVSFJgKGdwJjPe6Vo53ejnYmfRL6ylqb6BqmgDodBBpfo6KPkEiFD)
---
| | Peter, In last year’s landmark _Bruen_ decision, the Supreme Court reaffirmed our Second Amendment rights _are_ guaranteed, both inside AND outside the home. **Now, woke judges at the state and federal levels are trying to circumvent this monumental decision, and effectively rewrite the law of the land.** For too long, radicals in this country have utilized our judicial system as their [**_liberal enforcement offices_**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a3c29cb11df54003865fec1e779e6c6a&_e=euEbelDTbel5hGGRNDyoZsoO4zVrOa_VQxNDU-sfDVUKNHQjnwD-8Wa3WVxn8P2pl5z_xQWdDoHF4hZ2M_-GqOiU2KVUPROLf-1dXey16ZOmiRBZjfkm5Qh6fZv73hysMsO_bx98YkBsh10Qkl5yEQbhQCD_8Ixt9NucIsDWaqOdjO2HAP01k2uOTCnrL8-7Bj_hg1IalCqCBpNaxLFK_4UZWYMlMfEeLnyTH4Q3fIrDs_A7PuIK5dc6wAIb1CWz703wEudpx-RYG7pu_XWLA8GpPzFnNWscJmhZUedvNMEIg2A6y2kj70lJO1g7aNW753kW_F97RUzvR5yRinUCV30gKMuTYTmOJzdkAW47iv0VwZcBNZkkqwlZHDGuOZLG). State court judges step beyond their authority when they practically rewrite laws, forfeit liberty, and overrule the will of the people. **_Thankfully, Supreme Court Justices Samuel Alito and Clarence Thomas are watching these state courts like a hawk._**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a3c29cb11df54003865fec1e779e6c6a&_e=euEbelDTbel5hGGRNDyoZsoO4zVrOa_VQxNDU-sfDVUKNHQjnwD-8Wa3WVxn8P2pl5z_xQWdDoHF4hZ2M_-GqOiU2KVUPROLf-1dXey16ZOmiRBZjfkm5Qh6fZv73hysMsO_bx98YkBsh10Qkl5yEQbhQCD_8Ixt9NucIsDWaqOdjO2HAP01k2uOTCnrL8-7Bj_hg1IalCqCBpNaxLFK_4UZWYMlMfEeLnyTH4Q3fIrZDUjqwY9AmGwFOD_mpkS0qK6d5dPsiPfPhlbz-6UALakJyj4se7yyTVSzT3J3oTIXiASo8GX5cIxI3T3lICxG_Y-2E00vYPyvVZdgqw8fkwmJu2XiHcUMdJACdspYbyENBGMhMLKEh7JqiaR3VN9Q)
---
Peter, your right to keep and bear arms is not equally protected in every state and jurisdiction. In fact, the Left continues to chip away at our Second Amendment rights in areas where judges are bought and paid for by George Soros and Michael Bloomberg. **We need judges who respect our God-given rights and defend them.**[_**Do you agree?**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a3c29cb11df54003865fec1e779e6c6a&_e=euEbelDTbel5hGGRNDyoZsoO4zVrOa_VQxNDU-sfDVUKNHQjnwD-8Wa3WVxn8P2pl5z_xQWdDoHF4hZ2M_-GqOiU2KVUPROLf-1dXey16ZOmiRBZjfkm5Qh6fZv73hysMsO_bx98YkBsh10Qkl5yEQbhQCD_8Ixt9NucIsDWaqOdjO2HAP01k2uOTCnrL8-7Bj_hg1IalCqCBpNaxLFK_4UZWYMlMfEeLnyTH4Q3fIp-sBTcMVdxnb4YPN9tppgvfm_XCx923cUaUoM2sgrcgl7MCCV6FfarYPXaA6afNLIWIM4-1NqLgjohTvx73FifFngZ1ekzPa3hCtVeMZKJ18lGDfNKrlW5OfJisFBATJ95WaxYiCGBNcD2B4I8QGlt) If we want to protect our Second Amendment rights for generations to come, we must invest in electing judges who will follow every SCOTUS decision, including controversial ones like _Bruen_. **_Because if woke judges ignore this ruling, NOTHING is stopping them from cherry-picking future SCOTUS decisions and chipping away at our other rights._**
---
[**PROTECT THE SECOND AMENDMENT**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a3c29cb11df54003865fec1e779e6c6a&_e=euEbelDTbel5hGGRNDyoZsoO4zVrOa_VQxNDU-sfDVUKNHQjnwD-8Wa3WVxn8P2pl5z_xQWdDoHF4hZ2M_-GqOiU2KVUPROLf-1dXey16ZOmiRBZjfkm5Qh6fZv73hysMsO_bx98YkBsh10Qkl5yEQbhQCD_8Ixt9NucIsDWaqOdjO2HAP01k2uOTCnrL8-7Bj_hg1IalCqCBpNaxLFK_4UZWYMlMfEeLnyTH4Q3fIpCJ01ORm8Hay7-gJVu3mRvfls2Jn6Cwv3FX07qfe7L6LH9zfUdj_6bY97U4HI-YaITPOKeV6Zh8l2WduBB6UmHKv_KT5v9yP625WBwtFkQJrCtlG2-3UInc9jwiIpuh49SZc92gslL0z7IIipJ8Y30)
---
| | Fair Courts America exists to defend our judicial system from activist judges who want to dismantle our constitutional rights and legislate from the bench. Peter, we’re counting on grassroots conservatives like you to stand with FCA to ensure our 2A rights are protected for generations to come. [_**_Will you chip in to the Fair Courts America 2A Defense Fund and help us elect judges who will defend our right to keep & bear arms in every state?_**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a3c29cb11df54003865fec1e779e6c6a&_e=euEbelDTbel5hGGRNDyoZsoO4zVrOa_VQxNDU-sfDVUKNHQjnwD-8Wa3WVxn8P2pl5z_xQWdDoHF4hZ2M_-GqOiU2KVUPROLf-1dXey16ZOmiRBZjfkm5Qh6fZv73hysMsO_bx98YkBsh10Qkl5yEQbhQCD_8Ixt9NucIsDWaqOdjO2HAP01k2uOTCnrL8-7Bj_hg1IalCqCBpNaxLFK_4UZWYMlMfEeLnyTH4Q3fIopr3znvu-I868-5iccWr5aXcPSRu81F6exnXmEsopt-JgBd8XI5bbvzXudrlZ3CrYE5R3sh7seIc9VD5uydIWvBFo9bXa76Yli2TRAj4UVoJn1SFv5tK62gTxTwjPMQi939i4otfgCRUoUpXLWUndf)

clean_body: they’re trying to chip away at our rights, but together we can protect the Constitution| | | 🚨 2A FLASH POLL 🚨 Judges in state courts should protect our Second Amendment rights. | | Peter, In last year’s landmark Bruen decision, the Supreme Court reaffirmed our Second Amendment rights are guaranteed, both inside AND outside the home. Now, woke judges at the state and federal levels are trying to circumvent this monumental decision, and effectively rewrite the law of the land. For too long, radicals in this country have utilized our judicial system as their . State court judges step beyond their authority when they practically rewrite laws, forfeit liberty, and overrule the will of the people. Thankfully, Supreme Court Justices Samuel Alito and Clarence Thomas are watching these state courts like a hawk. Peter, your right to keep and bear arms is not equally protected in every state and jurisdiction. In fact, the Left continues to chip away at our Second Amendment rights in areas where judges are bought and paid for by George Soros and Michael Bloomberg. We need judges who respect our God-given rights and defend them. If we want to protect our Second Amendment rights for generations to come, we must invest in electing judges who will follow every SCOTUS decision, including controversial ones like Bruen. Because if woke judges ignore this ruling, NOTHING is stopping them from cherry-picking future SCOTUS decisions and chipping away at our other rights. | | Fair Courts America exists to defend our judicial system from activist judges who want to dismantle our constitutional rights and legislate from the bench. Peter, we’re counting on grassroots conservatives like you to stand with FCA to ensure our 2A rights are protected for generations to come. In justice, Andrew Wynne Executive Director Fair Courts America | | | | | Paid for by Fair Courts America | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d3569507d4ed4a2086874563a7fff2de&_e=dDFQfFWWYwpBdz7sblcQNMwL1rTM7IKeKrEcbGxTfKCuL7jaZs6NMolN2MsTP4DocmMLfJN9KfO_3nH_5A817VsPwqsvfm6_QBfgUymVhXTkoZVnNHRiG8HbMe_eG0t1Oj6Jg8diBu-T3bke2_M_cjx_1qNjIz5SMjkiJ-ETrX5evuhBmRId9EI5OwZ6YQ87UXwOVEa0itnLWzxm8kU5ThHOBKjk_n3wYenFcSb_RYvS-U6EJXN1ZrnhYhwJq-HMrFgELBFVgxwVXDuyMlpdx2SZDFHHOiVKHxbZfRiyarEIsI2dU0iZ3Zr8ogogmsYC)

_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d3569507d4ed4a2086874563a7fff2de&_e=dDFQfFWWYwpBdz7sblcQNMwL1rTM7IKeKrEcbGxTfKCuL7jaZs6NMolN2MsTP4DocmMLfJN9KfO_3nH_5A817VsPwqsvfm6_QBfgUymVhXTkoZVnNHRiG8HbMe_eG0t1Oj6Jg8diBu-T3bke2_M_choUlHvPEH3eEqzXuqMNt0lzEPr4-jfZDswCV2cC77wc-E-1kRYxt4Emld8sskIrsH8xAQHE21jMBO6KS1WgIwuODv3g8tTignKT6pgQrMic2ITQFN9ODyY6YqBJ5h6SCsprveaw2ZcxO4nMIM5ArksWWIP9wZKlBTwL6GZ9PBig)
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d3569507d4ed4a2086874563a7fff2de&_e=dDFQfFWWYwpBdz7sblcQNMwL1rTM7IKeKrEcbGxTfKCuL7jaZs6NMolN2MsTP4DocmMLfJN9KfO_3nH_5A817VsPwqsvfm6_QBfgUymVhXTkoZVnNHRiG8HbMe_eG0t1Oj6Jg8diBu-T3bke2_M_cum1pu0FFdPESzUkGcP3zXcdzpOwVV220Tqm1OeBcH77z2TMJnYVrueQ9RpNF4R2_NWgk2Euf21S8Uxih1-xyPzoJ9foe4VAHdqt_xc-QmMWUVbkkjl5qKnYyaIGCjDA1tx4eUQkVhKwJjdJk_xE-D08ssa33kNoFTDgoM2vFE6W)

I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d3569507d4ed4a2086874563a7fff2de&_e=dDFQfFWWYwpBdz7sblcQNMwL1rTM7IKeKrEcbGxTfKCuL7jaZs6NMolN2MsTP4DocmMLfJN9KfO_3nH_5A817VsPwqsvfm6_QBfgUymVhXTkoZVnNHRiG8HbMe_eG0t1Oj6Jg8diBu-T3bke2_M_cla5zBA2_JOXUo3uvc0Qjah8f7Yxd3xqTpvzpvk-h7ySWn2ebO4SFk9uvgAMdkS4ahtMXQ4khUIbr84KP_s7WZXHlVREMTN49WTGGVky8Wh7v3DEqwozUykzAKb4Tg45wfzw8k8CWcoqFnr89upBZW9Hc_Z8-7KezQ7mJIPNCR31) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d3569507d4ed4a2086874563a7fff2de&_e=dDFQfFWWYwpBdz7sblcQNMwL1rTM7IKeKrEcbGxTfKCuL7jaZs6NMolN2MsTP4DocmMLfJN9KfO_3nH_5A817VsPwqsvfm6_QBfgUymVhXTkoZVnNHRiG8HbMe_eG0t1Oj6Jg8diBu-T3bke2_M_cg1l4lnpzBJ95wb-L5K09q1DlQdRVT6KP_Qji1mhvSCRp_AqD9--XUmO9yJC_0sFk1Pk9y8CqXTaxbyshk7lBIEp41EmpvuDTOX2aYU7MAY35EFA9Jx59sV5shKAodUuKrT_8D4mNnfHUMg4spxUd4PEHIGhspEgxnvN3IWizev5)

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: This Black History Month
disclaimer_text: paid for by Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer
body:
This Black History Month marks an opportunity to reflect on the challenges the Black community has overcome and those who have blazed trails in the community. | | | Amanda is fighting to ensure that our minority and women-owned businesses have the resources they need. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wB7DWu1u8h5QTGLUn-vuE3xxbeoFOMIG80cXeEGH5Noe0V2AkwT6-U_3HUY2hp8zJeqB138rQl-J_ePU6uNy0rz5wSuPC6yJETYpo859A2X06yVDTubeHTgrbhsHjnpJpVSCsbkvU5j4YlFSsBsvDwJ5ObhJec7Zfe2-gFPAan-bCdSGPywjMkqgqgyaen3W5o4ZL6Jre-8lrtytsEyAmwmxVkKKTP6kHUtfa6mNUisTKtdQc7C_N9WYOWlqcG3F5_dlR7gNceFCAqrE4BqzefgYSEg2QjnBY0vLUCHF7cMVKnjkEGBJPkQrjjFULQYf0/3tc/UQGY9Xa5RgqRSbnCnlWWqA/h0/UcFFPS6Gx-Xwn5r3kXpV_sXZgOy97oyiu7Uol6iceso) | |
Dear Friend, This Black History Month marks an opportunity to reflect on the challenges the Black community has overcome and those who have blazed trails in the community. This month I will be reflecting upon the many challenges that Black men and women have battled and overcome around the country and right here in Houston (including my own family), many of which we are still fighting today. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wB7DWu1u8h5QTGLUn-vuE3WPPWvCC2U04B5_Qp_U_HaoQfXei0UiBwu3MrxSinaoRHwEuD3CGo4iortjZk9sWZFtyZphxNGQ2RGmhnfGvKvaSCfVRU6i7GeRRmGZ14lKqaHwt76FJt-CdJx_9Y0zHbnEARG9jgtsQR8NcBrLkoNjFs3Xn1Yk0IRq3LW08JY1C4a2c1v4kC2Qutxn1KLxxW9H722VaSuukjOD708KZN5ILvLhzEmVHXvvQsuyQAIeT3YVGl2SQrTe6Q1ctSvO-UNP6NhU8_O008tRbx4-A1NuYS5TYxEsH2RjniSUhT50c/3tc/UQGY9Xa5RgqRSbnCnlWWqA/h1/ixA0lGCyzzKFFizryjxF6disvYRqwYCfWAKbV9WT6hY) As you might know, if I’m elected - I would be the first black woman to ever serve as the Mayor of Houston. I am so humbled by that opportunity. Let’s take many moments this month, and every month, to reflect on the important contributions of so many Black women and men before us - and let’s make some history of our own this fall.
Onwards, Amanda K. Edwards

---

Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. Friends,

Today is a day to celebrate all women and girls in sports. As a dad to three daughters, I understand firsthand what it means to ensure our girls can compete on a fair playing field and have safe locker rooms.

**Today is a day to make our voices heard in Washington, D.C. to keep biological males out of girls' sports!**

clean_body: Keep men out of women's sports | Friends, Today is a day to celebrate all women and girls in sports. As a dad to three daughters, I understand firsthand what it means to ensure our girls can compete on a fair playing field and have safe locker rooms. Today is a day to make our voices heard in Washington, D.C. to keep biological males out of girls' sports! | As your Senator, I will always stand up for girls and bring common sense back to Washington, D.C. Our children deserve a break from the Left’s woke propaganda. Joe Biden and his liberal administration have turned a blind eye to our daughters, and I won't stand for it any longer. I intend to fight for women and girls in sports, not just today but every day. I am in this to stand up for my daughters and yours! God Bless You, and God Bless America, | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Andy Beshear
subject: I wanted to reach out personally
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I wanted to take a moment to reach out and catch you up on the latest race updates. Hey Peter — Andy here!

**January has come and gone, and a lot has happened in this race for governor. I wanted to take a moment to reach out and catch you up on the latest race updates.**

12 Republicans have officially filed to run against me this year. They have already spent over a million dollars, and one opponent has even gone up with ads on the air targeting my record! That's not including the tens of thousands of dollars in outside money that has been raised to attack the work we’ve done together.

We have a tough fight ahead of us – but I have good news. We've started off the new year in a strong spot. New polling shows I'm leading the pack, and a majority of Kentuckians say they approve of the job my administration and I have done. We need to keep up our momentum and ensure we're ready for whatever attacks and outside spending come our way.

Can I count on you to make a donation to my re-election campaign? Any dollar amount you donate will help me compete with my 12 opponents and protect Kentucky's progress >> [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-february-23**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58146331/390167090/-500812825?refcode=em23_230201_unfmtd_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230201_unfmtd_fnd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzNjNTczZi04NmEyLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=916MAz7XI0vxOdlWubo_8-WuY1wB8N96KjlahqEqdKo=)

Grateful to have your support,

Andy

clean_body: I wanted to take a moment to reach out and catch you up on the latest race updates. Hey Peter — Andy here! January has come and gone, and a lot has happened in this race for governor. I wanted to take a moment to reach out and catch you up on the latest race updates. 12 Republicans have officially filed to run against me this year. They have already spent over a million dollars, and one opponent has even gone up with ads on the air targeting my record! That's not including the tens of thousands of dollars in outside money that has been raised to attack the work we’ve done together. We have a tough fight ahead of us – but I have good news. We've started off the new year in a strong spot. New polling shows I'm leading the pack, and a majority of Kentuckians say they approve of the job my administration and I have done. We need to keep up our momentum and ensure we're ready for whatever attacks and outside spending come our way. Can I count on you to make a donation to my re-election campaign? Any dollar amount you donate will help me compete with my 12 opponents and protect Kentucky's progress >> = Grateful to have your support, Andy | PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a reply brief on behalf of the Daily Caller News Foundation and itself in the Supreme Court of Delaware asking for limited discovery, including, at a minimum, deposing a university representative.
